title: The Tsundere Definitely Can’t Go Dere
genre: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: Zettai ni Derete wa Ikenai Tsundere
synopsis:
“Don’t get the wrong idea, okay. I definitely don’t like people such as you!”

This template tsundere phrase marked the beginning of mine and Aotsuki Miyuu’s story. Because of her cold and indifferent attitude, she always stands out negatively in class. However one day, we ended up talking more and more with each other, and I started to see the warmth behind her cold words. Why is she so distanced and unaffectionate towards people despite being so kind? That seems to be related to her past that I don’t know about…

This is a story about love, telling the coming along of a boy and girl until they finally act affectionate towards each other.

title: What You Left Me with One Year to Live
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Tragedy
alternative: Yomei Ichinen no Kimi ga Boku ni Nokoshite Kureta Mono
synopsis:
Mizuki loses hope due to his mother’s death. One day, Misaki, an off-season transfer student, arrives. After school, Misaki will help Mizuki work as a member of the library committee. As the distance between the two becomes shorter, Misaki suddenly admits that her life expectancy is short.

“Until I die, I want you to go accompany me in the things I want to do.”

Mizuki made every effort to for her sake. But Misaki still has a hidden secret. The shy Mizuki and the innocent Misaki. A pure love story with a time limit of two opposite things.

title: I’m Humanity’s Savior. Well, I’ll be Dead in One Year
genre: Action, Comedy, Drama, Mystery, Romance, Supernatural, Tragedy
alternative: Watashi, Kyuuseishu Nanda. Maa, Ichinengo ni wa Shinderu ndakedo ne
synopsis:
In one year, humanity’s Savior Kamishiro Fuuka—will die.

And yet one day, during our first meeting no less, she approached me.

“Please go out with me.”

As her boyfriend, it now became my duty to go through all sorts of events and plans she marked in her ‘Savior Notebook’ until the day she will die. Meeting in spring, checking out the summer fireworks, the cultural festival in fall, running away during the cold winter…

The more memories we built together, the easier I realized—that she was still just a normal girl. So could I, the strongest shadow user and hunter of humanity’s evil, possibly save her before it’s too late?

title: She is Reading My Thoughts Again Today
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Tonari no Kimi de Atama ga Ippai
synopsis:
“I’m going to be sitting next to you! I hope we get along well, okay?”

Kisaragi, who is now in the same class as me, seems to be able to “hear the thoughts of others”.

There was a huge difference between “hearing” and “reading” the thoughts of others, and she was tired of being able to hear everyone’s thoughts, regardless of whether she wanted to or not.

Well, of course I felt pity for her, but there wasn’t anything I could do about it.

That was what I thought, but…

Somehow, it looks like when she’s beside me, her power is only limited to my thoughts, and she can get some peace and quiet.

But even so, aren’t you a little too close to me?!

No, it’s not like I’m getting nervous just because there’s a beautiful girl right beside me or anything like that!

——That’s right. Today, my thoughts are once again being read by her.

title: Filming a Kiss Scene with my Genius Actress Childhood Friend
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Tensai Joyuu no Osananajimi to, Kiss Scene wo Enjiru Koto ni Natta
synopsis: Kaito is a high school boy trying to become an actor, no matter how small the role, in order to live up to a promise to his childhood friend Reina. A new student transfers to his class. It is Rena, who has grown up to become a beautiful girl and a popular actress of the highest caliber! When they are chosen to star together in a new drama, their feelings for each other, which had been a bit awkward, grows even stronger than before! They read the script during their breaks, and go on dates (as rehearsal), in order to prepare for their roles as best they can. But the climax of the show, the kiss scene, is anything but simple…

title: The Emotional Student is Growing
genre: Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Sodachi Zakari no Oshiego ga Yakeni Emoi
synopsis:
Tsubakiya Hinata, 14 years old.

As for me, Onodera Tatsuya – a teacher who just took office. Hinata is a student and an old neighbor to me.

Due to her rapid development, she has become more mature than her peers, and because of that, Hinata quickly becomes the center of false rumors.

But in truth, Hinata was still much more childish than she looked.

“Hey brother, carry me, carry me!”

“No no no. What’s the point of getting old and asking to be carried?”

“I can’t stand it!! Don’t you always carry me? Come on, carry me!”

In the middle stage between adults and children, a fleeting glint exists only at this moment.
For those who didn’t take long to mature, the luminosity was so dim that it was barely noticeable.

“By the way, brother still a virg*n, right?”

“Shut up, why would a child care about such things?”

Then at some point it will flap its wings and fly to new horizons. So at least for now, I want to follow every step of the way while I can.

Today, I will continue to face Tsubakiya Hinata.

title: The Mythical Hero's Otherworld Chronicles
genre: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Mystery
alternative: Shinwa Densetsu no Eiyuu no Isekaitan
synopsis:
Once upon a time, a boy was referred to as a “War Hero.”

In another world called Aletia, the boy who had saved the Lost Kingdom, conquered their neighbouring countries, and led to the rise of a grand empire decided to throw everything away, returning to the modern era at the cost of his memories.

As three years passed, the boy who was happily enjoying his daily life was once again called back to the other world.

However, what awaited him was the Aletia of 1000 years in the future.

As his past glories became a “myth,” the legend of the youth referred to as the, “Twin Black Hero King,” begins.

title: The Strongest Failed Aristocrat’s Dark Demon Sword
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Martial Arts, Mature, Mystery, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: Saikyō Rakudai Kizoku no Kenma Kiwameshi Antō Tan
synopsis:
The Sword Saint and the Grand Sage’s true identity is a failing student at the academy!? A new clandestine fantasy begins!

The apathetic Roy Luvel, a minor noble on the outskirts of a small country, is known as a poor student at the academy, earning the nickname “The Failing Noble.” However, he harbors a certain secret.

【The Guardian of the Sword Nation, the White Sword Saint, Cloud】

【The Guardian of the Magic Empire, the Black Grand Sage, Eclipse】

The true identities of the most praised individuals in these two great nations are none other than Roy, who pretends to be incompetent!

To protect his family, Roy hides his identity and leads a triple life, secretly working in each country and enjoying freedom at the academy. Moreover, he catches the interest of beautiful girls at the academy who aspire to become Sword Saint and Grand Sage… Roy’s extraordinary daily life and battles are fiercely intense!

“I’d love to quit being a guardian, but until a successor appears, I guess I’ll keep protecting the world.”

The new clandestine fantasy of the ultimate noble who has mastered both sword and magic begins here!!

title: The Gal Like Light-Novel and Me
genre: Comedy, Romance, Seinen
alternative: Ranobe Mo Ore Mo Sukina Gyaru
synopsis:
Ryosuke Yoda is a male high school student who loves light novels and sometimes tries to find light novels recommendation on SNS.

But when he participated in an offline meet-up with a light novel reader he had known for a long time on SNS——the one who came was the popular gal in his class, Miona Tsumakawa!

On top of that, she suddenly confessed to him!?

Ryosuke Yoda’s ordinary youth takes on a new color as he forms a relationship with Miona Tsumakawa through their shared love of light novels.

title: Who Decided That I Can’t Do Romantic Comedy in Reality?
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life
alternative: Genjitsu de Rabukome Dekinai to Dare ga Kimeta?
synopsis:
A supreme utopia (romcom) created using data!

“I want to have a romcom-like experience.”

Haven’t all romcom lovers who enjoy light novels thought this before? Being all lovey-dovey with the heroine, and leading a fulfilling high school life with the best of friends. However, there’s no way something that exciting could happen in reality. I have no younger step-sister, no childhood friend, no classmate who’s an idol, no mysterious senpai, and not even a male best friend character. That being the case, what can I do? Obviously, I have to put it together myself! For a romantic comedy, you need both data analysis and constant practice! As well as…
notes: Winner of the 14th Shogakukan Light Novel Award for Excellence.

title: Beyond the Friendzone
genre: Comedy, Drama, Mature, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Koibito Ijo No Kotowo, Kanojo Janai Kimi To
synopsis:
A fun, carefree, and casual relationship.

Spent the night with an ex-girlfriend. Exhausted from his demanding job, Yamase Fuyu reunites one day with Ito, his girlfriend from university, and they go out for drinks. As they bond over complaints and old stories, Fuyu thinks how nice it is to have this kind of friendship. But in a moment of drunkenness, they end up sleeping together. Although Fuyu regrets it, Ito sternly tells him, “Don’t apologize.” She continues, “Don’t talk about doing things properly. Let’s just stay together because it feels good.” Ito, too, was tired of the societal pressures to be correct and the constraints of adulthood. Thus, they form a peculiar relationship: ‘excluding bothersome things like work and love, and just doing fun things.’ A short story series offering comfort and a touch of eroticism to those weary from society.

title: You Are My Regret
genre: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Asada Yuzuru’s regrets. It was Mizuno Ai, the sweetheart in middle school. I like Ai. But she suffers from her freedom. A romance in the past high school. The love between the two gradually became a thing of the past and should become a memory. However, in the summer of his first year of middle school, Ai reappears in front of Yuzuru.

“I like Yuzuru.”

……With the same help as before. You can’t convey it unless you put it into words. But I can’t understand it from words alone. The two opposites collided and passed each other… What was the answer that was finally found? A love story and dialogue between a boy and a girl who have regrets.

title: Why is My Strict Boss Melted by Me?
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, School Life, Sci-fi, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: Kibishii Onna Joushi ga Koukousei ni Modottara Ore ni Dere Dere suru Riyuu
synopsis:
Ginjirou Tokuyama and Yom bring you a romcom full of unrequited but mutual love!

Average company worker Shimono spends his days constantly being helped and scolded by his superior and section chief Kamijou Touka. One day, he finds himself having traveled back in time to his high school years. He sees this as a chance to aggressively approach the section chief a second time around, only to find out that very woman had turned into a girl constantly acting lovey-dovey towards him!

Turns out that she also time leaped back in time to the same point as Shimono. She was under the impression that she was the only one who traveled back in time, deciding to act as lovey-dovey and close with Shimono, who she actually had feelings for at the time.

“W-Wait, are you actually the Shimono-kun from the sales department?! Ahhh, this is so embarrassing, I want to dieeeeee!”

Through this leap in time begins a romantic story depicting this mutually unrequited love!

title: She's a Curious Non-Otaku Eroge, But ...
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Hiota no Kanojo ga Ore no Motteru Eroge ni Kyoumi Shinshin Nanda ga……
synopsis: Kazuma, a highschool student who loves eroge • was been confessed by the honour student and beautiful girl, Misaki Honoka, who is the school’s prodigy. What’s more, Honoka had declared that she would try her best to become a “heroine” that Kazuma likes?! “Can you …… train me?” What kind of eroge is this?

title: Good-Bye Declaration
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life

title: My and Her Game War
genre: Action, Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life, Sci-fi, Shounen
alternative: Boku to Kanojo no Game Sensou
synopsis:
Kishimine Kengo, a boy who moved into a high school that was an all-girls school until several years ago. In spite of the so-called harem environment where he was surrounded only by girls, he wasn’t good at socialising and his sole hobby was immersing himself in reading. He lived a quiet life.
But, he decided to participate in club activities that he hadn’t done until now, and so his high school life changed into something stormy and full of drama. He joined the one where he played modern games – in short, the game club. Kishimine was supported by the beautiful student council head and a pe*verted teacher, and he displayed unexpected talent. Now the curtain has been raised on the exciting gaming life of an ordinary boy.

title: My Teacher-Girlfriend
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
Can sensei be the heroine? Please?

Due to a traumatic experience, I have a distrust of people called “sensei”. I, Saiki Makoto, was called by after school by the most popular and beautiful teacher at my school, Fujiki Maka-sensei.

“I… love you” Eh– a confession out of the blue!? “Until you say you love me, I will continue to pursue you”

Ever since then, I’ve been called by for “guidance counselling” after school, somehow watched AV together, being given excessive skin-ship, went on dates together. Over time, I gradually became conscious of Sensei…? But isn’t it bad for Sensei to go out with her student?

A romance that is absolutely NG, the forbidden love between us two.

title: Tomorrow, When Spring Comes.
genre: Drama, Mystery, Romance, School Life, Seinen, Supernatural
synopsis:
“Stay with me this time.”

On graduation day, I was reflecting on my dull high school years. My grades were bad, I’d given up on my dream, and my girlfriend and I had parted ways. She was now a national musician. I’d found myself in a completely different reality.

But that day.

Nito Chika, my ex-girlfriend, has disappeared.

Dumbfounded… I found myself time-traveling into the past on the day of the entrance ceremony.Can I save Nito in this world?

…No, that’s not good enough.I’m hoping that this time we can be on equal footing—able to stand alongside her.

I’ll try my hardest to rewrite those three years!

A youth redo love story starting from graduation (the end).

title: Will You Support Me Because I Like You?
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: Anata no Koto ga Sukina Watashi wo Oshite Kuremasu Ka?
synopsis:
A romantic comedy where I, a ‘Fan,’ get supported by my oshi!

“Kei’s Game Commentary! I really like that channel!”

Nozomi Yukina, also known as Yuki, is a member of a popular idol group and is also my oshi. But unexpectedly, she is also a fan of mine!?

Thanks to Yuki’s declaration of being my fan during a live stream, I, a game streamer who had single-digit subscribers, became an overnight sensation!

Furthermore, when Yuki found out that we’re classmates, her usual cool demeanor completely changed, and she became obsessed with me!?

“To have the real Kei-kun right in front of me is the best…!”

But it doesn’t stop there. A super popular VTuber (who is actually my childhood friend) and a legendary cosplayer (who is actually my sister) on hiatus both start publicly declaring their love for me… It’s a romantic comedy where I, the fan, get supported by my Oshi!

title: My Mother is the Strongest Magical Girl
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, School Life

title: If I Survive the SSS-Rank Demon Realm with a 'Useless' Skill, I'll Become the World's Strongest Alchemist: Building a Comfortable Base and Enjoying a Fun Life in Another World with My Companions~

genre: Drama, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, Seinen, Slice of Life
alternative: Tenseisha de Aru Watashi ni Idonde Kuru Mubou de Yubou na Shoujo no Hanashi
synopsis:
“A prodigy at ten, a genius at fifteen, a common man past twenty.”

This is a story of the struggle of an ordinary guy like me who is a “reincarnator” and a reckless and promising girl who is a “genius”.

title: Shiinamachi-senpai no Anzenbi
genre: Action, Comedy, Mystery, Psychological, School Life, Seinen, Supernatural
synopsis:
“Today is my safe day, so please pay me a visit in my room.”

These bold words were addressed to me, Sakuradamon Jirou, from Shiinamachi Kaguya-senpai, a senior library monitor. Filled with anticipation, I visited the “Clock Tower Caretaker’s Room” where Senpai lived, only to discover Senpai collapsed on the floor, all covered in blood. Then the situation proceeded to develop rapidly in an unexpected direction! The culprit is someone from around me? What secrets does Senpai harbor? Also, the truth about the past and the blood relations that I have kept hidden all these years and never told anyone, to think that–

title: I Got Kicked Out of the Hero’s Party, so I Went Back to My Hometown, but the Entire Party Followed Me
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Yuusha Party wo Kubi ni Natta node Kokyou ni Kaettara, Member Zenin ga Tsuitekitan da ga
synopsis:
“Fine, I’ll Marry Everyone and Start My Harem Life!”

“Jin… our journey ends here.”

Jin, who had been adventuring with his childhood friend and Hero, Leki, in a party to defeat the Demon King, is suddenly told they’re parting ways—right before the final showdown. Heartbroken, Jin returns to his hometown. But soon after, his former party members, who swiftly defeated the Demon King without him, start proposing to him one after another!

“Jin, do you remember the promise we made when we were kids?”

“You said you’d take me as your bride, didn’t you?”

“Jin, what do you think we should name our baby?”

Unknowingly, Jin had promised marriage to all three of them! Now, he’s on the path to building a polygamous harem.

“W-Wait, everyone, calm down!”

title: Losers Must Be Happy as Much as Possible!
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 負け犬同士はぜぇぇぇぇぇったいに幸せにならなくちゃいけない
synopsis:
“As fellow losers in love… why don’t we soothe each other’s wounds?”

After years of unrequited feelings, Amou Watanuki finally managed to become lovers with his childhood friend Karen Suzaki

only to witness her cheating just one month into their relationship!

To make things even more chaotic, the school’s number-one cool beauty, Sachika Mamiya, barges into the scene and punches Karen’s affair partner!?

According to her, that cheating guy is actually her fiancé.

Perhaps out of sympathy toward a fellow betrayed soul, Sachika makes an unexpected offer to Amou:

“Why don’t we have a fake romance?”

If they can at least experience—even in form only—the things they could never do with their original partners, maybe their hearts can heal.

But once it begins, this make-believe romance with Sachika feels so fulfilling, it’s hard to believe it’s only pretend…!?

A heartbreak romantic comedy begins!

title: My Student’s Parent was my Ex-Girlfriend
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Seito no Hogosha ga Motokano datta
synopsis:
The awkward distance between them — doesn’t end even after a broken heart!

A bittersweet adult romcom about two people who once parted ways, now weaving their lives side by side once more!

Back in high school — Shirosaki Yuuto had been dating Kamijou Mirei, the school’s madonna.

But first love is never meant to last forever.

“Well then, I guess this is where we say goodbye……”

Ten years after parting ways with Mirei, Yuuto takes up a post as a teacher at Sakuramorioka Private High School.

The girl he meets there is a student in his very own class — and the adopted daughter whom Mirei has taken in and raised as her own.

Even as he tries to maintain an appropriate distance as teacher and guardian, for some reason Mirei keeps closing that gap, little by little……?

title: I’m Being Pressed by S-Rank Female Adventurers
genre: Action, Adult, Fantasy, Harem
alternative: 逆転世界で嫁き遅れSランク女冒険者に迫られています
synopsis:
Ryou is a dull-looking office worker working for the Adventurers’ Guild in Cassandra City.

When he rescued a mysterious fairy trapped in a vial, he discovered he was transferred to a parallel world!

In this world where men are scarce, and the values of beauty and ugliness are reversed, Ryou finds himself in a situation where he is irresistible just because he exists as a man!

“…I’m going to take a room upstairs. Do you want to go with me?”

On top of that, he is now being pressed by the S-rank female party, with whom he had no relation in his previous world!?

How will Ryou interact with these women, who were now deemed “ugly” and have been ridiculed by society for being “spinsters” – women who are way past their marriageable age?

Will he be able to change their views? Or change the values of this world as a whole? Ryou’s encounters with ugly (read: beautiful) women begins here!

title: The Quintessential Quintuplets – Spring Summer Autumn Winter
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Gotoubun no Hanayome - Spring Summer Autumn Winter
authors: あさの ハジメ & 春場 ねぎ
synopsis:
”This is a year in the lives of us five Nakano sisters — our everyday, from January to December.”

New Year’s has arrived, and with it the start of the quintuplets’ final year of high school. But the mood is bittersweet: before long, exams will be behind them and graduation ahead, and days like this — all five of them together, just having fun — won’t come so easily anymore. Once they scatter into their busy futures, they’ll never have it quite like their high school years again.

So they make a promise. Once a month, no matter what, the five of them will get together — a day that belongs to them and them alone. They call it “The Quintuplets’ Day.”

Supervised in full by original creator Negi Haruba, here’s a brand-new chapter in the everyday lives of the Nakano quintuplets!

title: Jishou F-Rank no Oniisama ga Game de Hyouka sareru Gakuen no Chouten ni Kunrin suru Sou desu yo?
genre: Adult, Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Sci-fi, Shounen
alternative: 自称Ｆランクのお兄さまがゲームで評価される学園の頂点に君臨するそうですよ？
synopsis: Shishio Academy is a school where everything is decided upon by the results of games. During the entrance exams, Guren ended up with the worst rank: The F-rank, just as he had planned. But once the academy’s ‘darkness’ begins to attack his beloved little sister Karen, Guren has to show his true skill!

title: Eroge no Hakushaku Reijou wo Hoshi Meido Ochisaseru Akuyaku Onzoushi ni Tensei shita Ore wa Zama wo Kaihi suru. Sono Kekka, Mein Heroin ga Yuusha Gakuin de Mainichi Gyaku Yobai ni Kuru no daga
genre: Action, Adult, Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
alternative: エロゲの伯爵令嬢を奉仕メイド墜ちさせる悪役御曹司に転生した俺はざまぁを回避する その結果、メインヒロインが勇者学院で毎日逆夜這いに来るのだが……
synopsis:
“Lord Nord, would you like some milk this morning?”

I was reincarnated into the erot*c world I had just played, “The Resurrected Hero’s Harem Academy”. However, instead of being the hero protagonist, I became Nord, the son of the evil noble family who seized Elise, the heroine, and was eventually killed by the hero.

This was no time to relax and enjoy milk from the maid! In order to avoid the flag of death and live a relaxed peaceful life, I tried my best to stay away from Elise… However, all my actions were misinterpreted by her, making her level of attraction to me increase even more

“Please look at my innocent body that no one has ever seen before…”

She fell in love with me seriously, voluntarily signed up as my personal maid, and even started coming to my room at night!??

Winner of the Special Award in the Rom-Com Category of the 9th Kakuyomu Web Novel Contest!

title: Can a Boy–Girl Friendship Hold Up? (No, It Can't!!)
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
synopsis:
At a certain countryside middle school, a boy and a girl swore eternal friendship to each other.

Heading towards that shared dream——the bond between these two remains unchanged over the span of two years.

Himari Inuzuka, a cheerful girl who has yet to find her first love, and Yuu Natsume, a botanical enthusiast who loves flowers, still spend their days peacefully as best friends in the gardening club in the second year of high school.

「If Yuu can’t get married, I have to take responsibility.」

「I’m having trouble now because after Himari said that, your brother began calling me ‘My brother-in-law!’」

However, when Yuu reunites with his first crush, the gears of their relationship suddenly go out of sync!

Will Himari, now having known love, be able to break free from being just the ‘ideal friend’?

title: I Got A Cheat Ability In A Different World, And Become Extraordinary Even In The Real World
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Sci-fi, Slice of Life
alternative: Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru ~Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta~
synopsis:
Tenjou Yuuya has been a bullied boy since the past.

He lives in the home of his beloved grandfather while he goes to school. As usual, he receives a harsh bullying, and he takes an extended absence from school to have some time to heal his wounds.

While on this long time of absence, he takes the opportunity to clean his grandfather’s house and goes to a room he never went before, where his grandfather keep many different objects that he gathered from his travels around the world. While he was arranging the objects, he found a door not on a wall among the objects.

Out of curiosity he opens this door, what he found on the other side was…

title: The So-Called 'Solitary Flower' is a British Beauty Who's Awkwardly Attached to Me Now That She's My Stepsister
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: Kokou no Hana to Yobareru Eikoku Bishoujo, Gimai ni Nattara Fukiyou ni Amaete Kita
synopsis:
“H-Hey… can you feed me (I wish he would say ‘ahh’)…?”

A heart-fluttering romantic comedy with a Kuudere stepsister and her classmate, spun under one roof!

When Shirakawa Kento’s parents remarried, his new stepsister becomes Sophia Frost, a British girl with blonde hair and blue eyes who is also his high school classmate.

She is known for her cool demeanor and always being alone, dubbing her as the ‘Solitary Flower’ for her beauty.

When they first started living together, Sophia continued to act coldly towards Kento, saying “I don’t have anything to say to you”, but as they spent more time under the same roof…

“I-It’s not like I like your scent or anything…!” “Could you, um, call me Sophia…?” Slowly, she starts awkwardly seeking affection from Kento…!?

This kuudere British beauty who can’t be honest easily is too cute in this heart-fluttering romantic comedy!

title: I Love Love, Really Love You, so I Want To Tell You How Much I Love Being With You
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Sukide sukide daisukinanode, issho ni suki o tsutaetai
synopsis: Eija is a foreign exchange student from Finland. Her school life is solitary, and she is called the Ice Elf. In reality, however, she simply has difficulties communicating with others! Furthermore, her main purpose for studying abroad in Japan is for otaku-related activities! Ouga Aoi, as a member of Eija’s host family and as her classmate, sets out to fulfill Eija’s wishes, but…

title: The Only Thing the Gal Who Can’t Do Anything Can Do
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Naan ni mo Dekinai Gyaru ga Yuiitsu Dekiru Koto
synopsis:
The worlds most enviable cohabitation rom-com spent with a gal stepsister who is a god-tier illustrator!

Let me tell you about the “jackpot” I just hit.

Number One: The gal who transferred into my school ended up seated next to me.

Number Two: As a result of my father remarrying, that gal became my stepsister.

Number Three: The gal who became my stepsister turned out to be the god-tier illustrator I fiercely stan.

It truly is a cheat-tier jackpot, but life isn’t that simple.

She is someone who “can’t do a-ny-thing” other than draw—changing her clothes, doing her makeup, taking a bath, sleeping beside her… taking care of absolutely everything has become my job!? But in exchange for my help, she says she’ll draw illustrations based on my requests!?

The curtain rises on the world’s most enviable cohabitation rom-com spent with a gal stepsister who is a god-tier illustrator!

title: The Story of How I Came to Call You “Natsuki”
genre: Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Kimi o Natsuki to yobu made no monogatari
synopsis:
All the heroines have the same first name!?

It all started in April — the season of new encounters.
I, Kageyuki So, transferred into Seishinkan Academy, a private middle and high school with a six-year system, through the only available transfer slot.

The place was filled with rich kids as far as the eye could see, but even as a regular guy, I slowly started to make some friends.

The one thing that kept bothering me, though—every single girl I got close to had the same first name: Natsuki.

Every one of them is a total beauty, and I can’t say I mind getting closer to them.

I don’t mind… but…

The name “Natsuki” also reminds me of a traumatic memory from my childhood.

Naturally, I started calling them all by their last names instead.

Ow, ow… my stomach hurts just thinking about it… the trauma’s flaring up again…

Even so—

Will there come a day when I can finally call one of them by her first name, “Natsuki”?

title: Brainwashing Skills Make Me Unrivaled in Another World - If My Skills are Discovered, I'll Be Executed, so I'm Trying to Live Honestly and Wholesomely, but for Some Reason, I'm Being Loved by Beautiful Girls
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Sen’nō Sukiru de i Sekai Musō! ? ~ Sukiru ga Baretara Shokei sa Rerunode Kenzen Seijitsu ni Ikiyou to Shitara, Naze ka Bishōjo-tachi ni Aisa Rete iru Kudan ni Tsuite ~
synopsis:
“I Don’t Even Need Brainwashing, and They’re All Head Over Heels for Me!?”

Hugh, a young noble with memories of his past life as an overworked corporate drone, just wants to live freely in this new world. But the skill he’s been granted? A brainwashing ability that can dominate anyone! Fearing execution if his dangerous power is exposed, Hugh vows never to misuse it. However, during the academy’s entrance exam, he’s forced to reveal his skill! In a desperate move, he tries brainwashing himself and discovers a cheat-level ability to freely alter his own skills.

Determined to live an honest life, Hugh plans to keep things wholesome—until, without even using his brainwashing, he’s suddenly swarmed by beautiful girls declaring, “Be my one and only knight!” and “I’ll do anything for you!” Why are they so obsessed with him!?

A wholesome, heartfelt fantasy of unmatched brainwashing skills and a high-affinity harem begins!

title: My 5 Step Sisters
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
A youthful graffiti spun with 5 stepsisters under one roof!

This spring, second-year high school student Rikuto Miyanaga gained a stepsister. Actually… make that five of them!?

However, the eldest daughter, Chinatsu, absolutely hates men, and threatened him: “Don’t go near my little sisters!”

Although he secretly closes the distance with the kind-hearted second daughter, Mio, he gets attacked in his sleep by the gyaru third daughter, Karin. The fourth daughter, Fuka, looks like a refined young lady but has a huge gap with her true personality, and the fifth daughter, Sorane, is a totally clingy child…

This suddenly commenced cohabitation life is simply full of turbulence!

In the midst of all this, Rikuto learns of Chinatsu’s feelings as she stubbornly tries to protect her little sisters all on her own—and he makes a decision.

“Let’s form a united front. A united front between you and me to protect the little sisters.”

The curtain rises on our youthful romantic comedy, starting our lives together under one roof!

title: Please Leave Me Alone
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, School Life
alternative: どうか俺を放っておいてくれ なぜかぼっちの終わった高校生活を彼女が変えようとしてくる
synopsis:
“Let’s start a strategy meeting for making friends.”

This is a story about her and me. It’s the worst and the best second-life high school rom-com ever.

Love, friendship, and the sparkling joys of youth. The high school life that I’ve looked forward to- still ended with me being alone. Then, just a day before the graduation ceremony…

“Don’t die! Nanamura-kun!”

Sora Hanamitsuji, she’s a beautiful girl that even models can’t compare. My life ended after getting hit by a truck to protect her. …That should’ve been the case.

“It must be because the gods got bored.”

However, with this accident, Hanamitsuji-san and I returned to the day of our high school’s entrance ceremony. The second high school life is no longer as charming and youthful. I was going to spend it modestly and alone. …But, she said that won’t do.

“Well, I’ll help you make friends.”

This is a story about my second high school life. It’s the worst and best teenage rom-com ever.
notes: Manga Special is very short so I just combined it with Volume 2

title: Amamori Junna is Humid
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
Clingy at every chance. A seemingly cool heroine who’s actually overflowing with affection makes a gentle entrance.

When club activities end early due to rain, Kurimoto Shigure returns to the audiovisual room to retrieve something he forgot—and there, he meets a lone girl named Amamori Junna. Sharing similar tastes in books and music, the two begin to meet secretly on rainy afternoons after school, when their schedules align.

“I like the name Shigure.”

“I prefer being alone and don’t want to deal with unnecessary people… but if it’s you, Shigure, I don’t mind.”

Junna, who only appears on damp, rainy days, is expressionless and dry in demeanor, yet oddly close in proximity and eager for affection. Then, on a sunny day, Shigure discovers Junna’s “secret”—and from that moment, the distance between them shrinks to the point where he can feel her breath. Her overwhelming affection begins to spill out uncontrollably…

title: When I Confessed to the Girl I Liked, Her Twin Sister Came Along as an Extra
genre: Adult, Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life, Smut
alternative: Suki na Ko ni Kokuttara, Futago no Imouto ga Omake de Tsuitekita
synopsis:
One summer day, Nakaba Masaki suddenly confesses his love to his classmate, Yuzuki Tsubasa, who happens to be alone with him in the classroom after school.

He was already preparing to be crushed by the words that came out of his mouth, but what he received was a shocking answer: “I’ll date you if you want to date my twin sister too.”

For a moment, he didn’t know what they were talking about, but he knew he couldn’t back down, so he agreed to date the two of them together.

But then, more unexpected events await.

Oh!

title: I Made the Girl I Liked My Maid, and Now She’s Secretly Doing Something in My Room
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Sukidatta Ko o Meido ni Shitara, Ore no Heya de Kossori Nani ka Shiteiru
synopsis:
I tried hiring my poor classmate. This maid is a little suspicious!?

Kiyomiya Keiji is the only son of a distinguished, prestigious family. But due to circumstances, he can’t inherit the family, and he was enjoying living alone in a separate residence. One day, the honors student Hisaka Sayaka, who is even respected by her upper-class classmates, shows up at his door in a maid uniform.

“Even I’m not so much of a s*um to hire a classmate with money.”

“If you don’t hire me, a homeless girl in a maid uniform will be born.”

“So I’m s*um even if I refuse!?”

“If you do it now, the ‘service’ you’re hoping for will also be included.”

“…”

“Ah, you wavered a little.”

My sanity can’t handle living under the same roof with a girl I secretly have a crush on!

But what is Sayaka doing, occasionally rummaging through my room?

title: After Helping “Ice Princess” From Another School, I Decided to Start as a Friend
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Takou no Koori Hime wo Tasuketara, Otomedachi kara Hajimeru Koto ni Narimashita
synopsis:
Minori Souta is an ordinary high school student. Today, he lives his daily life as usual.

Even though he’s like that. Every time he went to school, he felt happy.

Because there was a beautiful girl on the train that he boarded.

She had pure white hair and blue eyes. Her Western-like face was somehow fragile and pretty. She has an outstanding style and is so beautiful that she could be considered an idol or an actress.

[Ice Princess]. That’s what she called at the high school next door.
Souta followed her with his eyes every time he got on the train. She rejected all the students that tried to talk to her, and now there are no other high school students on this train except for him and her.He thought he would just go on with this ordinary life. He had no desire to get close to her. He never thought about it.

But—one day. An incident occurs.

Souta saw her being mol*sted.

No one tried to help her. Souta gathered up his courage and saved her.

The next day. Souta thought that he would return to his ordinary life, but she appeared in front of him.

“Um…you helped me the other day. I just wanted to say thank you.”

Shinonome Nagi, aka [Ice Princess]…… She was the girl he had saved yesterday.

Souta was puzzled, because she was someone he only saw from the distance, nonetheless, he accepted her gratitude. ….But, he kept his distance again.

He was. Because he doesn’t hate his daily routine.

It was then.

“Something, I want to ask. To you.”

Souta couldn’t bear to hear those somewhat sorrowful words. And decided to listen to her request.

“While I’m on the train. I want you to……stay by my side.”

At those words–Souta couldn’t even refuse. He accepted it.

However. Souta didn’t yet know that he would be toyed around by her again and again.

title: The National Young Lady Bought Worthless Me for 300 Million
genre: Drama, Ecchi, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 国家令嬢は価値なき俺を三億で
synopsis:
Keiya, a young boy raised under the crushing oppression of toxic parents, is “purchased” for 300 million yen by a beautiful girl the moment he graduates from middle school.

The girl’s name is Eina Ouhouin. She is a mysterious figure possessing overwhelming wealth and authority that surpasses even the power of the state. Due to the circumstances of a meeting during their childhood, Eina’s love for him is incredibly “heavy” and intense.

”Because you look at me as a woman, I am always happy. I love you. I adore you, my Keiya.”

Doted on by her in this way, Keiya begins a decadent yet blissful high school life. Meanwhile, disaster inevitably strikes those who would dare to mistreat his pure kindness…

title: The Case About Two Sisters Becoming Extremely Obsessed With Me After I Saved Them
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Otokogirai na Bijin Shimai wo Namae mo Tsugezuni Tasuketara Ittaidounaru
synopsis:
Aina and Arisa are two twin sisters who are quite popular among the high school students, however, there are rumors that both hate men, although there is an exception…

There is a young man who stands out among the rest and is the exception to this rule, since it was he who rescued both sisters along with their mother from a fateful destiny.

Now, both sisters want to pour all their love and desire on him, while one spoils him with her big breasts, the other wants to be his faithful servant.

Thus begins the comedy-romantic/harem of these protagonists.

title: “Let’s Have S*x” My Proposal to My Classmate Just Before She Jumps Off
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Tobioriru chokuzen no dokyusei ni『Sekkusu shiyou!』to teian shite mita.
synopsis:
My first love, Kurumi Koga.

Her beauty and personality, far beyond that of a typical high schooler, sparked jealousy, isolated her, and now on the verge of despair, she stood at the edge of the rooftop, ready to jump.

So, the only thing I could do was—

“Let’s have s*x!”

“…W-what?! You pe*vert… (utterly disgusted)”

“Maybe I am! But is that okay? If you die here, your final memory will be ‘some random pe*vert’s confession scene’! Talk about ruining the mood!”

“…W-what are you saying to me?! Pe*vert, pe*vert, PERVERT!”

“There’s a reason for this. Because I love you more than anyone in the world! Marry me!!!”

“W-what?! No way…!?”

I’ll scream my love with all I’ve got and make a place for you in this world!

The sweetest, most absurdly straightforward protagonist and a secretly shy, cool high school girl star in a 100% sugary love comedy—here it begins!

title: Since I’ve Entered the World of Romantic Comedy Manga, I’ll Do My Best to Make the Heroine Who Doesn’t Stick With the Hero Happy
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Rabu kome manga no sekai ni haitte shimattanode, shujinkō to kuttsukanai hiroin o zenryoku de shiawaseni suru
synopsis:
This girl is a losing heroine? Then I’ll make her happier than anyone!

One day, I got hit by a truck, and then I found myself as the best friend of the protagonist in a rom-com manga. Ahh, this must be a dream, I thought, and right in front of me is my favorite losing heroine, Sei Shimada.

“I love you.”

But the dream didn’t end even after I confessed my love and felt content…!?

title: Something as Simple as Reincarnation Can’t Fill the Hole in My Heart
genre: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
alternative: 転生程度で胸の穴は埋まらない
synopsis:
“That’s why the story of ‘love’ with you is what fills my ‘loneliness.'”

In a world where human desires manifest as unique magic, the transcendent beings known as Adepts wield their powers to protect humanity from the malevolent God, granted every privilege in return.

After a long journey of training, Konoe, a reincarnated soul, finally earned that exalted title.

—All for the sake of using the love potion.

“If I had a love potion, could even someone like me become someone’s one and only?” Haunted by trauma from his past life, Konoe has lived unable to trust others. Because of this, his unique magic never awakened, leaving him to suffer in solitude even after reincarnation. But then, a golden-haired girl, afflicted by a fatal illness, came to him seeking salvation

—”For you, Konoe-sama, I would do anything!”

This is the tale of a white loneliness, devoid of desire, meeting a golden love.

title: After a Desperate Struggle to Avoid Annihilation, My Party Became Unwell
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Psychological, Romance, Supernatural
alternative: Zenmetsu END wo Shinimonogurui de Kaihishita. Party ga Yanda.
synopsis:
“–Wolka?! Noooooo!! Y-you can’t die on me!!”

Wolka, an adventurer, is a reincarnator from Japan. During a dungeon exploration, his party is ambushed by a powerful monster, and Wolka suffers fatal injuries while protecting his companions; in his final moments, he finally remembers the world he had reincarnated into was that of a dark fantasy manga he read in his previous life — that he and his companions were minor characters to be annihilated then and there.

But Wolka, empowered by his hatred for bad endings, desperately presses on for the sake of his companions — and defeats the monster. It only cost him an eye and a leg — but in exchange, he and his party escaped their intended fate. What he did not account for, however, was how the experience changed the young girls that were his companions.

“I swear I’ll protect you this time!! So please, please, don’t abandon me..!”

“I’ll always be by your side… You’re fine with that, right, senpai?”

“I would give my life for yours… That is what I decided.”

This is the murky, otherworldly story of a reincarnated man who values happy endings above all and the girls who harbor intense feelings for him!

title: I Was Caught up in a Hero Summoning, but That World Is at Peace
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Yuusha Shoukan ni Makikomareta kedo, Isekai wa Heiwa deshita
synopsis:
Suddenly appearing in a different world, it looks like I got caught up in a Hero Summoning. And of course, I’m not the Hero, but it’s another guy……and while being very cautious and scared of the cliche-like development, I was thrown into the maelstrom of war……or not.

The Demon Lord? It was defeated a thousand years ago. Hero? He’s just the main actor in a festival. Nobles? They’re kindly taking care of us. The Demon Race? They have good relationships with Humans. Wars? It’s already 800 years since the last one. Monsters? The Guild and Order of Knight are taking care of them. Return to Earth? It is eventually No-Risk.

What I’m planning after being caught up into this? I’m gonna enjoy the life in a different world as much as I want to, go on a cultural exchange and sightseeing, and after experiencing the festival that is only held once every ten years……I shall go home safely.

The other world was――at Peace.

A kind world where the three races, the Spirit World’s Magical Races, the Celestial World’s Divine Races, the Human World’s Human Races, they are kind neighbors to each other, with everyone living a peaceful and fulfilling life.

But although I wished to peacefully spend a year before my return, for some reason, the heavyweights of this world keeps gathering around me, and……

title: The Reason Why This Genius Little Girl Who Doesn’t Get Along With Anyone, Wants To Be Only Spoiled By Me
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Darenimo Natsukanai Tobikyuu Tensai Youjo ga, Ore ni Dake Amaetekuru Riyuu
synopsis:
“That’s because… you.”

In my class there was an eight-year-old girl.

She was a genius child who skipped classes, and her appearance was adorable like a princess. However, she was very cold by nature and reluctant to get along with anyone.

I thought the only person she could trust was her sister who was also in the same school as her… but one day, when I gave her a candy, she suddenly clung to me very strongly!

This genius princess who turned out to be very lonely was just being spoiled with me.

The love she showed knew no bounds, and she was trying to set me up with her sister who was famous for being the prettiest girl in school so that she could become my sister-in-law?

This is a story about a little girl who is lonely because of her intelligence, and an ordinary young man who can be found anywhere.

title: The Eminence In Shadow
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Martial Arts, School Life
synopsis: Just like how everyone adored heroes in their childhood, a certain young man adored those powers hidden in shadows. After hiding his strength and living the mediocre life of a mob character by day while undergoing frenzied training by night, he finally reincarnates into a different world and gains ultimate power. The young man who is only playing at being a power in the shadows, his misunderstanding subordinates, and a giant organization in the shadows that gets trampled…. This is the story of a young boy who had adored powers in shadows possibly eventually reigning over the world of shadows in another world.

title: After My Sister Enrolling in Girl Knights’ School, I Became a Hero
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Imouto ga Onna Kishi Gakuen ni Nyuugaku Shitara Naze ka Kyuukoku no Eiyuu ni narimashita. Boku ga.
synopsis:
Taking Care of My Knightly Sister, and Somehow I Got Noticed by the Queen

My sister enrolled in an all-girls knight academy. She excelled at the academy, which is renowned as the best in the kingdom–

“I told them you’re way stronger than me, brother!”

Uh, I’m just an ordinary guy… (Actually, that’s a lie. My brother is insanely strong. He just doesn’t realize it.)

Because of that, female knights from the academy came to see me, so I had a mock battle with one of them (the strongest knight in the academy instantly realized the vast difference in our abilities).

I also took care of them after exercise (my brother’s massages were a huge hit with the knights, and even the nobles started talking about it!)

Just by being myself, I caught the eye of the princess–wait, why?

An Unintentional Harem of Female Knights by a Self-Proclaimed Commoner Rising to the Top!

title: If a Mentally Unstable Girl Changed Into an Wife’s Apron…
genre: Adult, Comedy, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: メンヘラが愛妻エプロンに着替えたら
synopsis:
“Pien?” “Landmine?” But she’s a beautiful girl, so I’ll let it slide!

“Let me ‘commute’ to Shinsuke’s house? I’ll do anything for you,” said Kotosaka Shizune, a university student and a mentally unstable beauty, as she suddenly proposed to Shinsuke Aigaki. Besides being a college student, she also had another identity as a ‘sugar baby’ called ‘Kotone.’ After Shinsuke found out about this, she asked him to become her ‘commuting husband’ as a way of keeping him quiet about her secret. “I thought I was done with mentally unstable girls. That’s what I thought.” Shinsuke had become cautious around women due to troubles with mentally unstable girls in the past. Nevertheless, he reluctantly agreed because of his concern for Shizune, and gradually, he found himself attracted to her dedicated role as his ‘commuting wife’!? A heartwarming and comedic story of cohabitation with a girl with a secret!

title: Kosotto Hajirau Sugata wo Ore dake ni Misete kuru Gakuen no Ohime-sama
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: こそっと恥じらう姿を俺だけに見せてくる学園のお姫さま
synopsis:
“Hey, don’t you want to see the inside of my uniform? You can do anything, you know?”

After school, in an empty classroom with no one around. The girl who took the photo of herself in her revealing uniform and indecent appearance was Shinomiya Rinoa, the elegant and adorable “School Princess”.

Even though I understood that it was a bad thing, I couldn’t resist photographing her alluring appearance, which was different from her usual appearance-Click.

“Anno-kun, did you get a good photo?”

I was caught by the person right away. I should prepare to die socially…

“…Will you take a picture of my embarrassing appearance?”

“…What did you say?”

Why is it like this, I’m going to have a secret photo shoot with Rinoa!?

In my room, she changes into a uniform, in the bathroom into a competition swimsuit, and at her house-. A thrilling secret romantic comedy starts from one photo. A story of a young and slightly dangerous love story, spending time with her who is free in s*xual terms.

title: No Way a Boy Wouldn’t Want to Be Pampered by a Beautiful Onee-san!
genre: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Kirei na Onee-san ni Yashinawaretaku Nai Otokonoko nante Iru no?
synopsis:
“You’ll never have to work for the rest of your life, okay?”

A heart-pounding cohabitation begins—with a beautiful, wealthy, and slightly mysterious older woman!

After my dad suddenly disappeared, I lost both my home and my part-time job.

The one who came to my rescue was a regular customer from the café where I worked—an elegant older woman.

She offered to let me stay at her place on one condition: that I help her out with household chores until I can get back on my feet.

But… she handed me a wad of cash just for tidying up!? Who is this woman!?

“I’ll give you as much money as you want—just become my full-time househusband!”

All I want is a normal life… so how did things end up like this!?

In the spring of my second year of high school, my sweet and strange cohabitation begins—with a beautiful, rich, and slightly mysterious onee-san!

title: For Some Reason, I'm a Topic of Conversation Between S-Rank Beauties
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Naze ka S-kyuu Bijo-tachi no Wadai ni Ore ga Agaru ken
synopsis:
“Actually, I had a life-changing encounter that will greatly affect my future.”

Sara Himekawa, Rin Kohinata, and Yumena Takamori are high school girls known as the ‘S-class beauties.’

While the class is filled with envy-inducing love stories, there’s Haruya Akasaki, the quietest guy in class.

In fact, the guy they’re talking about is Haruya Akasaki!!

A romantic school harem comedy about a shy boy and the ‘S-class beauties’ has begun.”

title: Spirit Master Who Is Thought to Be Hiding His True Ability Is Actually Always Fighting Very Seriously
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Martial Arts, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Shin no jitsuryoku o kakushite iru to omowa re teru seirei-shi, jitsuwa itsumo metcha honki de tatakattemasu
synopsis:
“Spirit Mages” fight evil threats to humanity by borrowing the power of contracted spirits.

Roak Aleas, a second-year student at Utrea Academy, the training institution for Spirit Mages, possesses skills ranking second in his year. Yet, he has never once summoned a contracted spirit, leading the entire academy to focus on him, evaluating that he “must be hiding his true power.”

However, as for Roak himself–

“Why don’t I summon my contracted spirit? Because I don’t have any (—)!”

His strength comes solely from endlessly honing his swordsmanship and martial arts using the only spirit he can contract – a micro-spirit. In reality, he’s always fighting desperately just to stay alive…!?

Amidst all this, he gets chosen as a member to explore the highly dangerous “Lunar Ruins”…!?

The Spirit Mage who everyone thinks is hiding his true power actually always fights with everything he’s got. He’s not refusing to summon his Contracted Spirits, he just doesn’t have any! — this Spirit Mage is still too strong!?

A fantasy of misunderstood overpowered heroism, surpassing even the strongest through effort alone!

title: How to Seduce a Fickle Angel Obsessed with Games ~After I Taught a Cheating, Beautiful Angel a Lesson, She’s Now Begging Me to Marry Her~
genre: Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Supernatural
alternative: 遊戯に夢中な気まぐれ天使の堕としかた ～チート使いの美少女天使をわからせたらなぜか嫁にしてほしいとせがまれています～
synopsis:
To ensure humanity’s survival, you must win the game against an Angel—and make her fall, body and soul?! ​

“Hey, let’s make a wager. If you beat me, I’ll do anything you want.” ​

The angelic girl Luxuria appeared as an enemy of mankind. She challenged humanity to a game with their territory on the line—possessing the overwhelming power to use any cheat or foul play she desired, provided she wasn’t caught. However, Shuto Tsuda, an ordinary high schooler present at the match, becomes the first human in history to defeat an Angel. ​

“Because I lost to you, I’ve become a Fallen Angel. From now on, I’ll devote myself entirely to you… so, will you make me your wife?” ​

Having tasted defeat, Luxuria transforms into a Fallen Angel and begins aggressively pursuing Shuto, begging him to marry her…?!

​The curtains rise on a high-stakes battle of wits and schoolyard rom-com at the front lines of Valhalla Academy!

title: The Princess I Took Care Of Keeps Clinging to Me
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Osewa Shita Oujosama, Zutto Kuttsuite Kuru
synopsis:
The more I attend to her, the more the Princess’s possessiveness grows—?

Leon has been appointed as the caretaker for Tetra, the Third Princess. Even as he accompanies Tetra—who struggles to be honest with her feelings—to the Academy, noble ladies he previously served as a caretaker for begin to approach him… and the now-possessive Princess refuses to leave his side.

title: The Result of Finding Out That the Beautiful Girl in My Class Who Hates Men is Actually a Brocon
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Otoko Girai na Kurasu no Bijou ga, Jitsu wa Burakon dato Shitteshimatta Kekka
synopsis:
Mizuno Eiji, a siscon high school student, receives the worst news from his older sister: “I have a boyfriend now.”

In order to identify the man who stole his sister, he follows her on a date and… sees a suspicious figure watching the two of them as well.

That person is Hasegawa Aoi, his classmate who is famous for hating men despite being a beautiful girl!

“I can’t believe you are actually a brocon.”

“I never thought you are a siscon.”

The two form an alliance to break up the beloved sister and brother couple. While chasing after them, they end up posing as fake lovers who are going on dates together… and Aoi kissed Eiji on the cheek.

“You’re the only one who is… special.”

Brocon x Siscon, two people who shouldn’t be able to get along is actually a perfect match…!?

title: A Solo Gal who Doesn't Get Close to Anyone wants to stay over Every Day
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Darenimo Natsukanai Soro Gyaru ga Mainichi O Tomari Shita Gatte Kuru
synopsis:
A sweet teenage love story full of surprises occurs when Machikawa Iori, a high school student who lives alone, offers to share his place for a month with his virtual friend who’s in trouble. However, a virtual friend that Iori thinks is his type turns out to be Ayana Suzuhara, a shy beautiful girl who sits next to him at school.

Ayana is considered not to be familiar with anyone at school and she is also not good at household matters. Iori who wants to help his friend, attentively taking care of Ayana’s every need under the same roof. Over time, the awkward Ayana began to slowly depend on Iori.

“I want you to hug me to welcome you home.”

“If I make a bento for you, will you eat it.”

“…s*upid. You’re the one who made me like this?”

The lonely girl who is known as the coolest girl in school, is now a very adorable roommate. This is a sweet, heart-pounding young love story..

title: Escaping the Villain Route: My New Life as a Mob
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: エロゲの悪役に転生したので、モブになることにした
synopsis:
Before I knew it, I was surrounded by heroines, living a harem life!

I realized I had been reincarnated in the world of the popular eroge, Soshite Sekai wa Aiiro ni

And of all people, I reincarnated as the tr*shy villain character, Nishikikoji Kaede, who follows the Ruin Route in every single path.

While I was happy to see my favorite heroines up close, ruin awaited me no matter which route the game progressed down. To peacefully enjoy this game world I loved, I decided to dedicate myself to becoming a Mob, watching the heroines from afar… or so I planned.

My innate busybody nature got the better of me, and I couldn’t help but lend a hand to the struggling heroines, resulting in me becoming friends with all three of them before I knew it.

Meanwhile, the original protagonist is starting to make some suspicious moves—

I can’t remain a Mob anymore!

An eroge reincarnation harem rom-com!

title: Girls Who Are Cuter When They Don’t Appeal With Their Special Abilities
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: Inou Appeal Shinai Hou ga Kawaii Kanojo-tachi
synopsis:
Whether you’re special or ordinary—

Good luck to you who’s struggling with your “character”!

” Since the dawn of history, succubi have all been the same kind of character, haven’t they? ”

That’s what she said—Myudento.

They are young people who, starting from puberty, awaken characteristics of fantasy beings like succubi or yuki-onna…

Yet, because their abilities are so minor, they have no real effect on society and end up blending into modern life.

A completely normal high school boy, Komori Tsubasa, gets constantly dragged around by his childhood friend and upperclassman succubus, Saiin Sakuya.

Eventually, he ends up founding the Literature Club, where he takes on student worries and consultations.

One day, a gyaru-style catgirl (werecat) high schooler, Shishihara Maon, shows up at his door…

” I feel like… my personality isn’t as strong as everyone else’s. ”

” Huh? ”

They’re a little unusual—but their worries are just your average adolescent problems.

And for these girls with special powers…

What can a completely normal guy like “me” actually do?

title: Twisting The Arm Of Fate With Cheat Magic!!
genre: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Romance, Seinen
alternative: Cheat Majutsu de Unmei wo Nejifuseru
synopsis:
Summoned from a different world, Souji was the strongest magician. This is because all the magic theory that he developed in-game became “real”. Furthermore Souji knew the “events” that were going to happen from now on. This world is moving according to the history in the game.

Souji rescues many beautiful heroines from their miserable fate one after another. As their beauty and abilities aren’t inferior, they became Souji’s “comrades”. The strongest magic theory, and the strongest bishoujo party. Souji, who has all the elements to become the strongest, marches forward! This is the tale of him rising to the strongest transcendence!

title: The Girl Who Can Clearly Say ‘I Love You’ Is Unbeatable
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: ちゃんと好きって言える子無双
synopsis:
There’s always just one surefire way to win in a romantic comedy—simply saying “I like you!”

The girls who have feelings for high school boy Izumi spent their days unable to take that first step forward.

[The School Idol Who Only Wants to Be Pampered When It’s Just the Two of Them] Amasaki Amane.
[Even Though I Was Disowned, My Former Fiancée Just Won’t Leave Me Alone!] Shiragiku Hakua.
[The Angel of the Academy… But the Devil Next to Her Is Surprisingly Easy] Kasuga Haru.
However, transferring into their class is Nanase Nano, a seemingly ordinary girl who is actually a natural-born main heroine! Nano starts her fierce assault on Izumi with her shameless and straightforward approach.

“Izumi-kun, I like you. Please go out with me.”

“Here, say ‘ahh’~♪”

“Izumi-kun, you’re the one who made me into this kind of girl, you know?”

In a panic, Amane and the others can’t help but spring into action—”This girl… She actually did it!?”

title: She Is My Very Own Cosplayer Sister
genre: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: このコスプレお姉さんは、僕専用らしい
synopsis:
*The Girl Who Came to Me Was All-In on Wearing and Stripping*

“Every guy loves a naughty onee-san, right!?”

“That’s just prejudice.” “Come on, can’t you show a little more interest!?”

Higashiura Riku, a high school boy in the crafting club, encounters a senior who’s obsessed with stripping.

Her name is Miyoshi Hiyori—a busty cosplayer with a hobby of excessive exposure!?

Drawn to Riku’s costume-making skills, she insists he create exclusive outfits just for her.

At first, Riku refuses, but as he’s exposed to her all-in attitude toward wearing and stripping,

he starts making costumes, and ends up living in the same room as Hiyori—

“Hey, I’m taking measurements, so stand still. Stop striking sexy poses on your own!”

title: Dual World Harem
genre: Action, Adult, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
alternative: I Will Rise From Unemployment! I, a NEET, Acquired a Special Skill and Formed a Harem in Both Japan and Another World!?
synopsis:
Touya Kougou quit his job at a shady retail company and became unemployed.

When he rescued Kyui, a bird from another world that had collapsed by the roadside, he acquired Erot*c Skills that seduce women–!?

Heading to another world with teleportation magic, he powers up and has a harem-filled life with noble ladies and beauties!

Furthermore, he’s even popular in his world using his Erot*c Skills!?

title: Aristocratic Daughters Got Used To Me
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Kizoku reijō. Ore ni dake natsuku
synopsis:
For me, it was just a normal thing. But they trusted me deeply.

After being reincarnated, I found myself in a school life surrounded by nobles. I was born into a wealthy and arrogant noble family, but I tried to behave as a modern person, treating everyone kindly regardless of their social status. I didn’t let the class difference bother me.

Amidst this school life, Luna, a noble young lady, took a liking to me. She was usually quiet and didn’t open up to anyone, but she was different with me. She would have meals with me and even go on dates, albeit shyly.

“I have no intention of spending time with anyone other than you.”

In this school life, I also became close to other noble girls and maids. They were all graceful, refined, and would occasionally act sweetly towards me.

As my relationships with these lovely ladies deepened, a heartwarming school romantic comedy began to unfold!

title: The Dorky NPC Mercenary Knows His Place
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Harem, Sci-fi
alternative: Kimootamobu yōhei wa, minohodo o ben (waki ma) eru
synopsis:
The Galactic Empire – a superpower that claims 70% of the inhabited planets in the known space as its territory. In this vast empire, John Uzoss made his living as a mercenary. He considered himself an “otaku” and a “mob” and lived by the motto of “know your place, don’t overdo it,” trying to lead a peaceful life day by day. As a result, he always went all out to avoid any flags that might lead to events!

However, the protagonist characters around him always seemed to inexplicably self-destruct, one after another…! Despite his best efforts to stay a mob no matter the request.

“I’ll put it bluntly. Would you consider switching to my side?”

“Would you like to join my team as staff?”

His unwavering commitment to being a mob, cultivated through years of experience, along with his swift and precise decision-making skills and unshakable mental fortitude in the face of trivial matters, earned him the nickname “Dust” by some out of awe. But there were those who watched him closely, biding their time…?

Unbeknownst to him, it’s a thrilling space fantasy featuring an unwittingly talented mob mercenary!

title: Repeat Vice – The Villainous Noble Doesn’t Want to Die, So He Swore to Not Die As One of The Four Heavenly Kings
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Mystery, Supernatural
alternative: Ripīto Vaisu: Akuyaku Kizoku wa Shinitakunai no de Shitennō ni Naru no o Yamemashita
synopsis:
In a world where a popular RPG has become reality, the arrogant nobleman Rofus, who has been burdened with the memories of being brutally slain as a “lowly villain” within the game, starts to take action to avoid his doomed fate!

First, he punishes the corrupt officials who would incite a rebellion. Then, as he begins to subjugate the monsters ravaging his domain, he awakens to the true power he couldn’t wield within the game!

“I’m doing this for myself. Don’t get the wrong idea, you commoners.”

Yet, despite his unyielding attitude as a villainous noble, he somehow earns the admiration of the townsfolk, and even the heroine, who was supposed to hate him, falls head over heels for him!? The ultimate low-level villain’s heroic saga begins!

title: On My Way Home From Work, My Beautiful Single Boss Asked Me to Do Something for Her
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Mature, Romance, Seinen, Slice of Life
alternative: Shigoto-Kaeri, Dokushin no Bijin joshi ni Tanoma rete
synopsis:
A cool and beautiful boss asks for—a favor unrelated to work!?

“Please…. I want you to hold me.”

Sanezawa Haruhiko, a young employee, is invited to a hotel after a company drinking party by his strict boss, Monou Yuko, who is feared in the company as the “Empress.”

To the bewildered Sanezawa, she bashfully requests—

“Would you… just make a baby with me?”

A secret relationship between a man and a woman, without love, begins.

“H-Hey…! Act normal at work!”

The face my female boss shows only to me. The rule of not falling in love.

Yet, we are gradually drawn to each other—

A beautiful boss and her subordinate, a forbidden and immoral adult love comedy begins!

title: A Toxic 20-Year-Old Game Streamer Accidentally Reveals His Nice Personality Because He Forgot to End the Stream
genre: Comedy, Romance, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: 煽り系ゲーム配信者（20歳）、配信の切り忘れによりいい人バレする。
synopsis:
“What happened today is a secret between us, okay?”

Nakayama Haruto is a gaming commentator known for his toxicity as the streamer ‘Oni-chan’. After finishing his usual streaming session, Haruto accidentally forgot to end the stream. As a result, his secret life as a streamer working to support his younger sister’s education and living expenses is exposed. Furthermore, it’s also revealed that he meticulously prepares scripts to provoke others, all while being, in reality, a genuinely nice person!

To make matters more complicated, during a livestream by the popular VTuber and professional gamer, Ayaya (aka Shirayuki Aya), Haruto unintentionally reveals his true personality once again. Unexpectedly, this led to them growing closer to each other as they continued to play games and go on outings together.

Thus begins a one-on-one romantic comedy between the business-minded toxic streamer and the popular VTuber heroine!

title: The Love Comedy Which Nurtured With a Mom Friend
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Mama Tomo to Sodateru Love Comedy
synopsis:
A busy but precious daily life raising a child with a high school girl.

Kuremoto Kyōta is a high school student and doting onii-chan who loves his 3-year-old sister. With both of his parents working, he handles the housework and childcare.

Akiyama Sumi is a solitary, beautiful, and brilliant girl whose presence keeps everyone at a distance.

One day, at his sister’s kindergarten entrance ceremony, Kyōta spots Sumi with her cheeks flushed, clicking away on her camera like a professional photographer. “Iku, you’re so adorable…” It turns out she was an incredibly devoted nee-chan, too!

Learning that they both take care of their younger siblings, they slowly grow closer. Cooking, dropping off their siblings at kindergarten, weekend outings… their relationship was exactly like “mom friends.”

And so, their romantic-comedy-style childcare story begins!

title: The Girl I Picked Up in the Back Alley Turned Out to Be the Heroine of a Bad Ending Otome Game
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: 路地裏で拾った女の子がバッドエンド後の乙女ゲームのヒロインだった件
synopsis:
Could you let me stay at your house?

“Hey, you’ll catch a cold if you stay out here like this!”

Ash Leben, a reincarnator into the world of an otome game, attends the Royal Academy of Magic in the lower-noble class. One rainy day, he encounters Fine Staudt, the game’s main heroine, crouched in a back alley, soaked to the bone. She confides in him that she has been labeled a “villainess” by the Academy’s Four Knights and her friend Elise and is being pressured to withdraw from school.

Determined to help, Ash challenges the Four Knights to a duel, rescuing Fine from her plight. Afterward, Fine asks, “Please let me live with you as the caretaker of your estate,” and thus begins their life together.

This is a school romantic comedy about saving the heroine after her bad ending.

title: Rich Girl Caretaker
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen
synopsis:
A high school boy, Itsuki Tomonari, gets involved in a kidnapping and ends up taking care of Hinako Konohana, a young lady from one of Japan’s largest conglomerates.

On the surface, Hinako seems to be a brilliant and charming girl, but in reality, she is a lazy girl with no life skills. However, due to family reasons, Hinako has to play the role of the “perfect young lady” at school.

Wanting to protect her, Itsuki takes care of her in a very caring manner. Eventually, Hinako begins to fawn on Itsuki with all her might…

“Now…if Itsuki isn’t around, I would hate it.”

This is a love story that begins with a cute young lady with a gap that transcends the master-servant relationship.

title: The Misunderstood Saintly Life of a Villainous Scion
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Shounen
alternative: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu – Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdai Shitai Dake na no ni
synopsis:
Intending to Live a Carefree Life as a Villainous Heir, But Inadvertently Declared a Saint!?

“My path to domination starts here—!”

Ouga Vellet, the eldest son of the infamous corrupt lordly Vellet family, is a reincarnated individual. Having been taken advantage of due to his kindness in his past life, he now revels in the life of a mischievous villainous heir. From then on, Ouga spared no compromise, pushing the limits of “tyranny” to achieve his ambitions.

He wanted power. He decided to deceive the expelled female knight captain and recruit her as a pawn. He desired a harem. He believed that by helping the oppressed commoner girls, they would readily accept him. He even saw potential in operating within the underworld. His plan was to start by squeezing the bad guys. Connections were also crucial. He aimed to excel in the Magic Academy. Thus, he envisioned his days as a carefree ruler (+ effort) under the authority of his family… But things took an unexpected turn.

“Wow, Ouga-sama, you’re amazing!”

…Just for “arrogant behavior,” why does his reputation keep soaring without his control?

However, Ouga remains unaware. He doesn’t yet know that this evaluation will become something beyond his own management. Where will the misunderstanding lead? A self-declared saint due to a misunderstanding about being a villainous heir? The curtain rises on a life of misconceptions and misconceived saintliness!

title: Romelia Senki: Forming a Military Organization Because Humanity Still Looks Screwed After Defeating the Demon King
genre: Action, Drama, Fantasy, Josei, Seinen
alternative: Romelia Senki: Maou wo Taoshita Ato mo Jinrui Yabasou Dakara Guntai Soshikishita
synopsis:
Rising from the ashes, a fallen noblewoman stands to save humanity!

“Countess Romelia. I’m breaking off our engagement,” declared Prince Henri, right after defeating the Demon King. By the prince’s side were Saint Elizabeth, the sage Ekaterina of the Unreturning Forest, and the Eastern swordswoman Lu Hime, all pointing accusatory fingers at her as “useless.”

But the prince and his comrades didn’t know something. They didn’t know that Romelia possessed a miraculous power called “Grace,” which bestows good luck.

Having lost her fiancé and been abandoned by her friends, Romelia did not break. Her homeland was still infested with the Demon King’s forces, and many people were held captive by the demon race as s*aves. To rescue them, Romelia embarked on a mission, encountering numerous difficulties along the way.

First, she didn’t have an army. There were no healers to tend to injuries, and she lacked the funds. But Romelia was determined to solve every problem aggressively.

“No army? Let’s intimidate local lords and take their forts.”

“No healers? Let’s negotiate with the church for their assistance.”

“No money? Let’s negotiate with merchants to secure funds.”

“Newly recruited soldiers are inexperienced? Let’s have them gain experience by hunting monsters.”

And so, Romelia, along with her loyal followers, marches into battle!

title: The Exiled Merchant Saves the World with the Power of Gold
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Shounen
alternative: Tsuihō sa reta shōnin wa kin no chikara de sekai o sukuu
synopsis:
After the Hero’s Death, What Will Save the World? —Money!?

The Inhumane Demon Lord Subjugation Begins—Where Money Talks!!

Torao, a merchant with an unpopular profession, was a member of an S-rank adventurer party. However, being mediocre in combat and caught embezzling funds, he hears:

“You’re fired!”

And just like that, he’s expelled from the party.

Left with no choice, Torao teams up with the girls he spent the embezzled money on, aiming to defeat the Demon Lord. But their first job is shockingly to recover equipment from the corpses of his annihilated former party…!?

“It doesn’t matter. You’re not my comrades anymore.”

Even if they say, “We always thought we were comrades,” it’s too late now—.

A story of deviation from templates and betrayal, brought to you by the author of the hit series “Who Killed the Hero?”

*Note: This is a significantly revised and retitled version of

“The Merchant Who Was Kicked Out of the Party for Being ‘Useless’ Saves the World with the Power of Money.

Even if They Say ‘We Always Thought We Were Comrades,’ It’s Too Late Now,”

originally posted on the web novel site “Let’s Become a Novelist.”

title: I Have been Reincarnated As a Lazy, Arrogant Noble, but When I Destroyed The Scenario Through Effort, I Became The Most Powerful With Extraordinary Magical Power
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Supernatural
alternative: Taidana ryōjoku kizoku ni tensei shita ore, doryoku de shinario o bukkowashitara kikaku-gai no maryoku de sai kyō ni natta
synopsis:
Avoiding Destruction, I Somehow Became the World’s Strongest

I reincarnated as Weiss Fansent, the depraved villainous noble in my favorite academy game. Wait, if things continue like this, I’ll be exposed by the protagonist for my misdeeds, lose everything, and ultimately meet my end as a minion of the Demon King in the destruction ending!?

If that’s the case, I have no choice but to gain overwhelming power and avoid the path to destruction!!

With little time left until the entrance exams, I began learning swordsmanship and magic from the S-rank adventurer Miruku Abitas, enduring grueling days of effort.

A few years later, when I displayed my mastery of all elemental magic and creation magic during the entrance exams, everyone around me was left stunned.

Huh, did I just do something incredible!?

This is a fantasy story set in another world, where I, reincarnated as a lazy and wicked noble, strive to smash the flags of doom and become the strongest through hard work.

title: The Way to Absolute Dungeon Administration – There Is No Reason To Meet With the Opponent!
genre: Action, Adult, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Psychological, Romance, Seinen, Slice of Life, Tragedy
synopsis: One day, on a sunny leisure day, a woman visited my house and asked me if was interested in managing a dungeon along with support offered from a goddess. But of course, I refused. Eh? I shouldn’t ignore a person in trouble, moreover if it’s beautiful woman? No way, that’s too bothersome, why do I have to do that? I’m perfectly satisfied with my comfortable life now, throwing it away is just overly s*upid… …sigh, fine, so it’s go to another world, become a dungeon master, manage a dungeon and deal with the Mana circulation problem? Understood, but how to do it?

title: The Cutest Is Amamiya, the Second Is Me
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Sekai de Ichiban “Kawaii” Amamiya-san, Nibanme wa Ore.
synopsis:
A beautiful model girl named Hikari, known as the “cutest in the world,” became a topic of conversation in society. However, in reality, he is a boy and in his daily life, he is a quiet high school student named Hikaru Haruma.
