Hikaru has a tendency that worries him. That tendency is “there’s no girl cuter than me (when dressed as a girl).” Whether it’s the classmate who is the school idol, the sharp-tongued junior, or the polite and gentle senior, he always thinks, “Aren’t I cuter?” It’s like a disease for him.

However, one day, he discovered the hidden side of his classmate, Amamiya-san, who is plain and unremarkable…

“Believe me, Amamiya-san! You’re cute! Very cute! Cuter than me! It means you’re the cutest in the world!”

“Eh, eeeh!?”

This is a battle between a man who likes to dress as a woman with excessive self-confidence and a girl who is genuinely earnest despite lacking confidence, with the theme of “cuteness.”

title: The Straw Millionaire, the Cat, and the Princess ~Rise to the Top with the Space-Earth Trade Skill!? A CEO! A Hero? …A Space Pirate!?~
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Mecha, Sci-fi, Shounen
alternative: Warashibe chōja to neko to hime ~ uchū to chikyū no kōeki sukiru de nariagari! ? Shachō! Eiyū? …… Uchū kaizoku!?~
synopsis:
His Employees are a Cat and a Super Beauty!? Making a Fortune with the Exchange Skill!

Tonbo, a poor college student living in Tokyo where dungeons have appeared, suddenly awakened a skill that… can exchange things from faraway space and Earth, the “Space Trade” god skill!

Together with Mars, the space cat that was exchanged with an orange peel, he starts a business to get some money for the time being, and becomes a big hit with the dungeon adventurers, and the story gets bigger and bigger in no time…!?

At the end of the exchange, he somehow gets a beautiful girl too!?

He also gets a giant robot, the man’s romance…?

title: Encore of the World’s End
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Mystery, Romance, Seinen
synopsis: The valuable treasure, the “Encore” which was left by the legendary Brave Hero Elline, has the recording of the end of the world and the reincarnation of the world. The countries and parties all over the world are searching for the location of its whereabouts; the age to fight for the Encore. The boy called Ren who wants to become a MASTER Knight has no talent in wielding swords despite looking exactly like the Brave Hero Elline, he has been having a lifestyle where people taunts him as the “Fake Brave Hero”. The one that appears in front of him is the legendary Dragon-Princess Kyelse, who had awoken from her seal. She mistook Ren for Elline. Though she gets disappointed since he simply looked like him, she later finds out a hidden potential in him. And she invites him to the journey to find the Encore together with the Archangel Phia and the Demon-Lord Elise that saved the world before. “Do you want to come with us?”. —This is the prelude of wild excitement played by the heroes. The boy known as the fake Brave Hero cross paths with the legend now!

title: I Became Friends with the Second Cutest Girl in My Class
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Class de 2 Banme ni Kawaii Onna no Ko to Tomodachi ni Natta
synopsis:
I, Maehara Maki, someone who couldn’t make any acquaintances or friends in high school, finally had someone to hang out with outside of school. A girl.

Her name was Asanagi-san. The boys in my class called her ‘The class’ second cutest girl’ behind her back.

On Fridays, she would refuse her best friend, Amami, ‘the cutest girl in class’ invitation just to hang out in my house with me.

Together, we played games, watched some movies, read some manga while eating junk foods like pizza and hamburgers, and chugging cola without a care in the world. To others, we may seem sloppy, but it was a precious, secret time together for Asanagi-san and myself.

title: Thus, the Boy Runs Through the Labyrinth
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Tragedy
alternative: Kaku Shite Shounen wa Meikyuu o Kakeru
synopsis:
The boy with nothing stakes everything to challenge the labyrinth—this is the story of an adventure!

The Era of Labyrinth Overabundance. Every economy revolves around labyrinth cities, and people dream of conquering labyrinths to grasp glory.

The boy, Ur, is in a dire predicament.

1. His parents died, leaving behind debts.
2. His sister was taken as collateral for the debt.
3. To buy her back, he needs 1,000 gold coins.

He has no money, no status, and no power. Seeking everything necessary to overcome injustice and resolve everything, the boy steps into the labyrinth with Shizuku, the magician he met there.

Conquering the labyrinth, defeating monsters, and hunting bounties—there’s no time to steadily build achievements.

Overcoming trials that rush like a storm, the ordinary boy runs through the labyrinth!

title: Chrono's War Record
genre: Action, Adult, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Romance
synopsis:
Chrono(real name Kurono) Crawford, a noble of the Cepheus Empire, had a secret. It was that he came from a different world… From modern Japan. He didn’t know how or why he was sent here, he wasn’t bestowed with any “cheat” abilities and his knowledge of modern technology was only that of a teenager’s.

A young man with modern values in a savage world, he is abandoned by his superiors, left in command of the Empire’s rejects consisting of demi-humans such as Minotaurs, Dwarves, and Elves, and thrust into a position as head of a poor fiefdom.

Chrono will do everything he can to rebuild and strengthen his forces and revitalize the land, aided in part by his knowledge from the other world. He is also aided by many capable women and becomes a harem king.

title: The Strongest in the Supernatural School Lurks in Peace – A Beyond-Standard Monster Pretends to Be Incompetent and Dominates the School from the Shadows
genre: Action, Drama, Psychological, School Life, Shounen, Supernatural
alternative: Inō gakuen no saikyō wa heion ni hisomu ~ kikaku-gai no kaibutsu, munō o enji gakuen o kage kara shihai suru ~
synopsis:
In the unique educational institution capable of granting superpowers to individuals, the Senei Academy, there is a student named Yuto Amemori. Due to certain reasons, he wants to lead an inconspicuous school life. However, his superpower, the ability to “impair vision,” is pathetically weak. This power triggers the protective instincts of his classmate, a beautiful girl aiming to be a superhero, Kasumi Asahina.

As a result, Kasumi insists on protecting him, saying, “I’ll protect you!” And this leads to an unwanted relationship between the two. Yuto becomes a target for delinquent students who dislike this situation.

But the truth is, Yuto hides his true abilities to appear as an ordinary person. In reality, he possesses the most potent superpower since before his enrollment. Secretly, Yuto starts plotting to eliminate obstacles, involving Kasumi in his schemes.

This is the tale of a monstrous entity pretending to be powerless, scheming behind the scenes to dominate the school. The story begins!

title: Predator-Type Magical GIrl
genre: Action, Fantasy, Gender Bender, School Life, Seinen, Supernatural
synopsis:
Humanity finds itself on the brink of extinction due to the emergence of the Incubi, otherworldly monsters that capture humans to use as breeding material. And the only ones that can stand against these enemies are the Witches – magical girls given powers by supernatural beings.

High schooler Renka Azuma is one such girl; her alter ego is Silver Lotus, a magical girl controlling countless insects to fight the Incubi day after day.

On a certain day, Silver Lotus rescues a fellow Witch, a novice named Azure Nova, from an Incubi attack. This meeting with this self-proclaimed fan of hers is an encounter that introduces a change to Silver Lotus’s otherwise solitary daily life?!

Here begins a dark fantasy about an unorthodox magical girl who commands insects to devour monsters!

title: Immortal Detective, Reidou Momiji
genre: Drama, Mystery, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
synopsis:
July ■. On a summer day when the mysterious beauty Reidou Momiji transfers to our school, a classmate is mu*dered. It was a locked-room killing.

“Let’s solve the case together, Tennai-kun.”

“You sound like a detective from a mystery novel.”

I, Tennai Haruma, a member of the nearly defunct Literature Club, am inexplicably roped into investigating the case by the new transfer student.

Then, Momiji is mu*dered—or so it seemed. In an ultimate locked room, unsolvable by anyone.

“Please find the culprit who killed me, Detective.”

An immortal detective and her “ordinary” partner. A school mystery tackling an impossible mu*der case begins with a bang!

When the truth of the case comes to light, I’ll share one final ×× with you.

title: Only Sense Online
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Gender Bender, Sci-fi, Shounen, Slice of Life
synopsis: Yun is a novice MMO player who equipped only unpopular skills labelled as garbage. However, soon after the official launch of the game, the NPCs stopped selling Recovery Potions. Everyone finally started to notice the importance of Support Magic and Items. And that spells trouble for Yun as well as all the other support-based players. They received orders for recovery potion from endless flood of players en masse, some more aggressive players even go as far as forcing the support players to be their personal craftsman. In order to prevent this from going out of hands, all the support players grouped together to form a community to keep things in order.

title: After I Lectured an Unfriendly Girl Who Doesn't Let Strangers Approach her, She Really Took a Liking to Me
genre: Psychological, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Tanin wo Yosetsukenai Buaisouna Joshi ni Sekkyou shitara, Mechakucha Natsukareta
synopsis:
This guy made my otherwise ordinary days a little more fun!

One day, Naoya Ookusu, the class president, gave a lecture to one of his classmates, Risa Enami about her lackluster attitude. But from that day on, Enami has been trying to go home with him for some reason. Why on earth?
sourceUrl: https://animestuff.me/docs/assets/html/After I Lectured an Unfriendly Girl Who Doesnt Let Strangers Approach her She Really Took a Liking to Me.html

title: The Book Hater’s Love for the Library Witch
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Hongirai no Ore ga, Toshoshitsu no Majo ni Koi wo Shita
synopsis:
Two entirely opposite people bridge the distance between their souls through “books”.

Souta Shimizu is publicly acknowledged as an extrovert after his high school debut.

His topics with his friends are mostly learned on his phone. The content in there is interesting and exciting. There is so much you can enjoy without lifting an arm.

In contrast, reading is exhausting and time-consuming in today’s information-overloaded world.

Its cost-efficiency is incredibly low as entertainment.

Souta just doesn’t understand the mindset of those bookworms.

Until he met her during the autumn of his first year in high school-

title: Chitose Is In The Ramune Bottle
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Chitose-kun wa Ramune Bin no Naka
synopsis:
Japanese most important Light Novel Award “KONORANO” winner of 2021 and 2022, second in 2023

As far as normies go, it’s hard to beat Saku Chitose. The most popular guy in his high school? Check.

An ironclad reputation that can repel even vicious online attacks? Check.

A group of friends as attractive on the outside as they are on the inside? Check.

But when a teacher asks Saku to help rehabilitate a student who been shut away in their room for months to school life, his perfect world will never be the same.

What is this, some kinda normie harem story?

title: Koroshiya-san to Hajimeru Icha Love Shinkon Seikatsu
genre: Adult, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: 殺し屋さんと始めるイチャラブ新婚セイ活 (美少女文庫)
synopsis:
“It’s fine….. It doesn’t hurt anymore……”

‘I took the v**ginity of Ms Sophia, a professional assassin.

Separation scars.

She silver haired, cool assassin, my classmate turned into a normal girl.

Friend, no, she turned into my own wife. ……

(Of course, if we have s*x like this, and try to be comfortable while taking care of each other, it will deepen our trust and help us understand each other. ……)

“Move, Naoto,…… and let’s finish like this.”

“I want you ……”

Her usual expressionless behavior completely disappeared due to Naoto presence.

Her face became sunk in pleasure as it was swept away by Naoto’s movements. The gap between the two is unbearable.

Sophia, an assassin, begins a new life after her life saved by him.

After H’s love affair, the two became lovers …… and a married couple.

And become a real family!

title: Chikasugiru Karera no, Juunanasai no Tooi Kankei
genre: Drama, Romance
synopsis:
Sakamoto Kenichi lives with a distant relative, a girl named Izumi Rina, in the house he shares with his mother.

Rina’s reserved personality, caring nature, and defenselessness from growing up in an all-girls school make Kenichi, who is troubled by his distance from others, aware of adolescent sexuality for the first time.

Seventeen years old, Kenichi tries to hide the fact that he is living under the same roof with a girl the same age as him from his friends, but Mori Yuriko, his childhood friend, finds out, and the distance between them changes slightly.

A love story that reflects a seventeen-year-old in the throes of a sensitive and volatile relationship.

title: Latina-san the Brown Girl Wants My Body
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, School Life
alternative: Kasshoku musume no ratīna-san ni ore no karada ga nerawarete iru
synopsis:
“High schooler Makoto Itou may have a slightly higher s*x drive than his peers, but he’s really just an ordinary boy in high school. However, his mundane life takes a drastic turn when he encounters the bright and cheerful Latina, a brown-skinned transfer student from a foreign country! After rescuing her from a group of overbearing men, Makoto… is being pressured into marriage and making babies with Latina?!

Between the passion of her appeal and the appeal of her body, Makoto finds himself – and his lower self – in danger of letting it all out! After all, Makoto isn’t without troubles himself; he became unconfident after experiencing a major setback when he first started high school… But the earnest, straightforward, and kind-hearted Latina, with her unconventional values, is sure to restore his vigor!

Thus begins the energetic romantic comedy of the high school girl with sun-kissed skin!”

title: Kissing My Student, It’s Over if We’re Caught
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, School Life
alternative: 教え子とキスをする。バレたら終わる。
synopsis:
I’m in a secret, bad romance with a love dependent student—

「Having a secret meeting with a student one is in charge of at school… Isn’t it exciting?」

The special relationship with Kirihara that no one can know about began when I took up my post at Mori Kawara High School as a teacher.

At school, she’s the serious student council president who has earned a lot of trust from other teachers, but when it’s just the two of us, she becomes mischievous, clingy, and jealous.

On weekends, I cook meals at her place, play games together, and pamper her as if we were lovers.

Unable to reject her because she knows my weakness, and despite knowing it’s wrong, we continue to pile up secrets little by little every day…

「Sensei, my feelings of liking you have grown very strong.」

As Kirihara openly confronts me with her feelings, the emotions I’ve been holding back grow even stronger.

Even though it would all be over if it were exposed, that sense of immorality ironically only accelerates things further—

title: Aren’t You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-San?
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
synopsis:
Sato Koharu is a pretty girl that everyone can recognize.

But her attitude with anyone is so bitter that she got nicknamed “salt-god Sato-san.” Anyone who tried to get close to her got emotionally injured in a brutal way.

Though for some reason, I was able to save Sato-san from pick-up boys where I was working at. Which made her like me, and thus I became a friend of “salt-god Sato-san.”

In front of everyone, she is a salt-god, but in front of me, she is so sweet. This is a high school life story between Sato-san and I.

title: Venom
genre: Drama, Romance, Supernatural
alternative: VENOM 求愛性少女症候群
synopsis:
For some reason, meeting with friends became tiring. Going to class is exhausting.

Something that’s supposed to be normal became a burden to me.

Anyone would be troubled if something so weird happens so suddenly, after all…

“Needy Girl Syndrome”, a supernatural phenomenon that affects girls who feel something missing from their lives.

I thought it was just some rumor, until it happened to us, who can’t find satisfaction from our lives.

title: In a World Where Strength Is Ranked, I, a High School Teacher, Was Transported Along With My Students and Rose From a Mere Side Character to the Rank of Sword Saint
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Supernatural
alternative: Saikyō rankingu Ga aru i sekai ni seito-tachi to shūdan ten'i shita kōkō kyōshi no ore, mobu kara ken hijiri e to nariagaru
synopsis:
Weak abilities? No problem! A teacher with unmatched swordsmanship dominates a fantasy world with nothing but his blade!

–[The Strongest Rankings]

In this world, people’s strength is ranked by a system, and high school teacher Shigeto Kusunoki found himself transported there along with his students.

While his students gained overpowered abilities, Shigeto’s powers were weak, and his rank was among the lowest. Ridiculed by his students, Shigeto tried to adapt to this new world, supported by a priestess named Mirei. But then, one of his students, Yuzuki Kimishima, was sent to a monster-filled ruin from which no one had ever returned.

Determined to save his student, Shigeto set off alone into the deadly ruins to rescue Yuzuki.

In the depths of despair, his one remaining weapon, the swordsmanship he had honed before being transported, held an extraordinary power in this world.

“You’re sacrificing yourself for me… I… I…” Yuzuki, who admired him, could only watch as Shigeto fought on, cutting down enemies to protect her.

As he continued to fight, Shigeto’s rank soared to unimaginable heights, and soon his name began to spread throughout the world.

–This is the story of how a mere side-character teacher dominated a fantasy world with nothing but his sword and became a Sword Saint.

title: Having Had My Bride Stolen, I Just Want to Live Peacefully
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 花嫁を略奪された俺は、ただ平穏に暮らしたい
synopsis:
Can I take my sister’s place?

“Hold on! That marriage, just wait a minute!”

On the day of the wedding, the groom, Arata, is left alone after his bride is kidnapped in front of a large crowd. The next morning, an exhausted Arata is visited by his fiance’s younger sister, Nene — before he knows it, he has begun a life of being doted on and pampered by Nene!

title: The Girls Who Traumatized Me Keep Glancing at Me, but Alas, It’s Too Late
genre: Comedy, Drama, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Tragedy
alternative: 俺にトラウマを与えた女子達がチラチラ見てくるけど、残念ですが手遅れです
synopsis:
I, Yukito Kokonoe, have bad luck with women. I’ve always been in trouble, my mother hates me, my sister dislikes me, my childhood friend who I thought I’m in love with rejects me before I confess my feelings to her, and then she tells me a lie while I’m still heartbroken. As a result, I found myself completely emotionally broken, and it was too late to do anything about it, but…

“It’s my fault …… everything is my—-”

“I’m sorry, Yuki!　I’m not like that—-”

For some reason, I think the women who traumatized me are glancing at me. ……

This is a love comedy about a boy who has been hurt too much to accept kindness and the women who have hurt him, a love comedy of misunderstandings that doesn’t start at all, starting when it’s too late!

title: I Am Not the Hero of Shadows!
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance
alternative: Ore wa kage no eiyū jaarimasen! Sekai kusshi no majutsu-shi? ... ... Nani sore (bō)
synopsis:
–’Hero of Shadows.’

A man who appears in crises and battlefields around the world, rescuing people with outstanding magic and then disappearing in the blink of an eye. His true identity is supposed to be shrouded in complete darkness… or so it was thought.

“My identity has been exposeeeeed!!”

Phil Salemabard, a young noble with a notorious reputation in the streets. Despite secretly acting as the ‘Hero of Shadows’ for a certain reason, one day, his true identity is revealed to the public. Despite his attempts to deceive, girls ranging from a nobleman’s daughter, a lovely saint, and even a princess of the kingdom approach the ‘Hero of Shadows,’ feeling indebted to him!?

A new hero tale (?) begins, unfolding from the revelation of his identity!!

title: I’m in Love with the Gorilla Sitting Next to Me
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
I’m cursed with seeing members of the opposite s*x as animals, and I might just be falling in love with the “gorilla” sitting next to me.

Muscular and burly, with coarse body hair and a rugged, chiseled face—literally too inhuman to be considered a romantic partner, yet her voice, gestures, and responses during conversation are all those of a cool girl.

Day by day, I’m getting along with Gorilla-san(?)

As we interact, I’ve come to realize that I’m indeed attracted to her… but I can’t seem to find the most crucial thing: a way to break the curse!

Then one day, a “cat” wearing a boys’ school uniform—one of my senpais—appeared and said——

“I know how to break this curse.”

This is the story of my mundane daily life with the gorilla, colored by a curse.

title: Hikikomori Wizard Lord of The Seven Cast
genre: Action, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, School Life, Shounen
synopsis:
“Playing Seven Roles Alone, Yet All as One—The World’s Strongest Magician Is a Hikikomori!?”

Bran, a magician attending a magic academy, is the ultimate Hikikomori, he sends magical clones to attend class in his place while he himself happily goes back to sleep in the morning.

But his true identity… is none other than the world’s strongest group of seven magicians—“Seven Cast”!?

title: The Quarter-Beauty of the Class Became My Stepsister. I Had Been Unknowingly Flirting With Her
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: クラスのクォーター美少女が義妹になった。知らないうちに口説いてた
synopsis:
Nanase Chloe, a beautiful quarter-blooded girl who is out of reach.

She was supposed to be far from me, but our parents remarried and we became siblings!?

We suddenly started living together.

I was friendly with her because we were from a peaceful family, but she was strangely embarrassed by my every word.

I complimented her on her cooking, told her she didn’t need to rush to get closer, and said, “We’ll be together forever, so it’s okay, but…” and told her we should live happily as a family.

“Let’s be happy together, isn’t that a proposal?”

I was wooing her without even realizing it!?

“I’m no good, but please…”

Under the same roof, an unconscious love comedy begins!

title: This is Wizard’s Last Card
genre: Action, Fantasy, Mystery, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: これが魔法使いの切り札
synopsis:
Not about strength. “Become a Mage to live joyfully.”

Seeking a life beyond combat, swordsman Rix enrols in a magic academy. Despite being deemed unfit for magic, Rix navigates campus life with sheer combat prowess, striving to grasp a new way of life through his unique ‘magic’.

title: Classmates With the Girls I Was Close to Loving
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Ano koro ii kanji datta joshi-tachi to onaji kurasu ni narimashita
synopsis:
I ended up in the same class as the girls I once had a “good thing” going with.

A high school rom-com about regrets and unspoken feelings, where love that was left behind finally gets a second chance!

Ryota Yoshiki had three girls he once shared a “good vibe” with.

His childhood friend from elementary school, who he had grown distant from—Reimi Nikaido.

His carefree gyaru* female friend—Yui Yuzuha.

And his laid-back study group companion—Yuka Hanazono.

What if he had been brave enough to confess back then?

In the spring of his first year of high school, those old regrets begin to stir—because now, all four of them are in the same class!

The girls, who once had mutual feelings for Ryota, start getting closer to him again—whether it’s in an empty classroom, during after-school dates in the city, or even at his house at night—as they try to figure out his current feelings.

“I’m really glad you’re here, Ryota.”

“I love spending time with you, Yoshiki.”

“I wonder if we can be close again?”

Trust, affection, admiration—the feelings they kept locked away start to heat up once more!

title: The Hidden Strongest Knight Executed in the Kingdom as a Traitor ~The True Strongest One went through Regression and Became a Hero on the Imperial Route~
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Romance, School Life, Tragedy
alternative: Hangyakusha Toshite Oukoku de Shokei Sareta Kakure Saikyou Kishi
synopsis:
The kingdom’s strongest knight, Aldia, was the central figure in ending the war between the Kingdom of Leshfeld and the Vulcan Empire. Although Aldia became a hero, he was executed as a traitor for false reasons. With regret in his heart for being unable to save the Empire’s Princess Valtrune, who saved him when he was on the verge of death despite being enemies ――.

However, when Aldia woke up, he found himself in a world six years before the war broke out! Determined to save Valtrune’s life, which he could not do before, Aldia decides to pledge loyalty to the Princess as a knight of the Vulcan Empire in his second life and change the world!

This is a regression story of a once-executed knight who returns to be the strongest again!!

title: From Toxic Classmates To Girlfriend Goals
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Yatarato Sasshi no Ii Ore wa, Dokuzetsu Kuudere Bishoujo no Chiisana Dere mo Minogasazu ni Guigui Iku
translationGroup: Fungus Fantls & JP Translations for fun
synopsis:
Shirogane Koyuki, a girl known for her beauty and equally harsh tone, giving her the nickname ‘Venomous Snow White’, is saved by Sasahara Naoya as a man tried to hit on her.

She may try to act strong, but on the inside, she is merely a young girl. Having been saved by Naoya, Koyuki falls for him, and Naoya on his end falls for Koyuki’s innocent and cute attitude.

Both fail to be honest with each other, but eventually bring themselves closer to admit their feelings for each other.

title: I Have A Rejuvenated Ex-wife In My Class
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Ore no Class ni Wakagaetta Moto Yome ga Iru
synopsis:
Kohei Kurose and Yuzuhana Koikawa were hit by a car right after they filed for divorce and they both went back in time on the day of the high school entrance ceremony.

Knowing that they had both returned to the past, they said, “I will never get involved with you again in order to live a happy life! I swear!

But, they both share the same hobbies and are very compatible with each other.

As a result, everytime I go, I end up having to spend time with her. I was reluctant at first, but as time went on I realized that spending time together is much more fun than spending time alone

This is a story about an ex husband and wife who return to their youth and are attracted to each other again.

title: I Started Working As A Lover Agent, And For Some Reason, I’m Receiving Requests From Beauties
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life
alternative: Koibito Daikō no Baito o Hajimeta ore, Nazedarou… Fukusū no Bishōjo Kara Shimei Irai ga Haitte Kuru
synopsis:
This sense of distance――

It’s sad and frustrating.

Ryoma Shiba, a University student who lacks money, searches for a part-time job with a high hourly wage. On the other hand, Himeno Kashiwagi is a girl who proclaims she has no interest in love but wants a boyfriend.

At the same time, they both hear about “Lover agent” from their friends and immediately register, unexpectedly scheduling a date with one another.

On the day of their first meeting, they were both nervous, but despite that, they held hands and drank tapioca, passing the time as a couple would.

In the midst of all this, Himeno’s friend discovers them, and the situation gets awkward. When Himeno had trouble explaining, Ryoma lies, saying they were “dating”.

Ryoma acts as a real boyfriend, making Himeno’s heart pound…

This is a real love story that begins with a rental relationship.

title: The Master Swordsman's Story Starts with the Zero Ability to Attack.
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Supernatural
alternative: 攻撃力ゼロから始める剣聖譚 ～幼馴染の皇女に捨てられ魔法学園に入学したら、魔王と契約することになった～
synopsis:
Wielding the Ultimate Swordsmanship and the Power of the Demon Lord

Born into a prestigious family of swordsmen, Eugene was branded a “defective swordsman”—his defense was unmatched, but he lacked any offensive power. Leaving his homeland behind, he enrolls in the continent’s most renowned magical academy.

There, Eugene is recognized as the only one immune to the miasma of the Sealed Prison, a dungeon teeming with mythical creatures. Tasked with reaching its very depths—a feat that even the most seasoned archmages have failed to accomplish—he ventures into the abyss.

At the very bottom, he encounters the legendary Demon Lord Erynyes, who once ruled over the continent. To his surprise, Eugene is the only one capable of forging a contract with her…!

Armed with the power of the Demon Lord, the once-failed swordsman embarks on a journey to become the strongest Sword Saint in this epic fantasy adventure!

title: When I Start Being a Home Tutor for my Childhood Friend’s Younger Sister, The Unfriendly Childhood Friend is Angry ~I am Completely Unaware That She – My High School Idol – Likes Me
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Osananajimi no Imouto no Kateikyoushi wo Hajimetara Soen Datta Osananajimi ga Kowai
synopsis:
His childhood friend Takanishi Aisa is a popular beautiful girl even when the two were in school.

It’s not a surprise that they now are estranged.

But, Aisa have only had eyes for Kouki…?

As Aisa’s younger sister Minami’s home tutor, the two once again come into contact.

It’s a romantic comedy about the unfriendly class idol Aisa and Kouki who is afraid of that cold attitude.

title: The Devil Princess
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis:
–I dream of a world filled with light. Family. School. Friends. Trains. Buses. Movies. Books. “I” grow up in a world of light… and, in the end, I am enveloped in darkness within a white room. Upon waking from the dream, I find myself transformed into a small demon in a world known as the Demon Realm. “–I want to go back–” What spreads in the heart of ‘me’ is the yearning for the world of light seen in the dream. And one day, I leap into the “Summoning Gate” that appears before me. When ‘I’ wake up again, I am born as a human baby. It’s the Holy Kingdom. A human world different from the one ‘I’ wished to return to. Despite being a demon, with only the power of a baby, ‘I’ am filled with fear. The fact that ‘I’ am a demon must be kept hidden—…

Now, beloved humans. Offer that despair to the “Demon [Me].”

title: Kurusu-san Who Does Not Speak, is Full of Love in Her Heart
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
alternative: Shaberanai Kurusu-san Kokoro no Naka wa Suki de Ippai
synopsis:
Kurusu Rurina, a (mid-term) transfer high school girl, doesn’t adjust well to her new class due to her apathetic and withdrawn attitude.

On the other hand, Kaburagi Ritsu has an ability to hear other people’s inner thoughts. With that, he can act wisely to live a life that is far from all the problems that will come to him.

At first glance, Rurina seemed like the type of person who couldn’t succeed due to her lack of social skills. But strangely, she always looked up at him excitedly thinking “I want to be friends with Kaburagi-kun!”

Talking about Rurina again, she’s a pretty girl but difficult to be approached and doesn’t get along. He often glared at Kaburagi-kun’s seat, but actually──.

(Kaburagi-kun, your sleeping face is so cute…I want to see it all the time)

Against his will, this ability is passively activated, thus repeatedly making Kaburagi feel uncomfortable.

And of course, those beautiful thoughts── Kaburagi-kun could hear them too!

title: Because I Became My Oshi’s Enemy
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance
synopsis:
A hundred years have passed since the emergence of {Divine Gifts}, supernatural abilities that manifest more frequently in women. The world now resembles a gender-reversed society.

However, Ibuki, a college student reincarnated into this world, possesses the {Divine Gift} of {Separation} despite being male.

While his power surpasses human understanding, it comes with an inconvenient {Price} – forced physical contact with those around him.

What he chooses to do in this world is… surprisingly, become a devoted fan!?

He absolutely adores Hinata, who belongs to the righteous organization [White Scales of Justice]!

As a new recruit, she’s cheerful and innocent. Her {Divine Gift}’s {Price} makes her a bit of a glutton (!?), which is incredibly endearing.

Sometimes as a childhood friend and brother, other times as a member of the evil organization [Covenant of Salvation], he secretly watches over Hinata and his other favorite idols from the front lines (…).

One day, he nearly has his true identity exposed to Hinata’s partner, Rui…?

I’ll protect my idol’s future! A secret Illuminati driven by love alone!

title: A Very Popular Idol Classmate Has Taken A Liking to Me, A Person Who Doesn’t Want to Work for Whole Life
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Daininki Idol na Classmate ni Natsukareta, Isshou Hatarakitakunai Ore
synopsis:
I want to show the real me to you alone—

Rintarou Shidou, a high schooler dreaming of becoming a stay-at-home husband, shares a classroom with Rei Otosaki, the dazzling center of the mega-popular idol group Millefeuille Stars. The two have never crossed paths—until one day, when Rei nearly collapses from hunger, and Rintarou offers her a home-cooked meal.

“I’ll pay you 300,000 yen a month. So… can I come eat every day?”

And just like that, their unexpected connection—a quasi-cohabitation life—begins.

Rei starts barging into Rintarou’s apartment, leaving him flustered and struggling to navigate their sudden closeness. But the Rei he sees up close is unguarded, vulnerable, completely different from the polished idol on stage or the cool girl in class.

A heart-pounding, blush-inducing romantic comedy about a regular guy and his superstar classmate kicks off with a spark!

title: Can I Still Be Your Heroine Even Though I'm Your Teacher?
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Kimi no sensei demo hiroin ni naremasu ka?
synopsis:
Never should be exposed, just the two of them in their youth.

「I’ll be making your meals from now on, Sensei.」

I, Reiyu Tenjō, am a high school teacher.

When I shared some food with my neighbor, it turned out to be my student, Yuunagi Nishiki. If this fact is discovered, I might be fired from the school?

That’s why we signed a 『Neighbor Agreement』 in order to keep our secret.

Since we both live alone, the plan was to help each other out when one of us was in trouble——but somehow, I got won over by his cooking.

Instead of helping him, I find myself increasingly spoiled and dependent that I can’t live without him anymore.

‘No, Reiyu Tenjō. He’s your student, someone you are not supposed to fall in love with!’

Drawing closer and then apart——their love sways ambiguously like waves.

A youth romantic comedy filled with secrets between a teacher and student begins here.

title: Evil Leader Next Door!
genre: Action, Comedy, Mecha, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis:
A silver-haired beauty next door to me!? Everyday comedy spent with a former evil boss!

The private life of Kusama Midori, known as Banshoku Green the green member of the Rainbow Sentai Banshokuger, who defeats the monsters all over the city, was rough. During the day, he worked as a part-time high school teacher (world history). After school, he wore his green battle suit and spent his days exhausted, battling strange creatures with overtime guaranteed, unable to even receive the figures he ordered every day.

Next door to Midori’s room, a silver-haired sexy foreign lady named Kuri Ashella, and her daughter, Taratat, moved in!? Encounters on the way home, chance meetings at the supermarket, and being cared for when exhausted and collapsed on the sofa, the dreamy life next door with the beautiful mother and daughter begins… or so he thought. However, their true identities were none other than the archenemies of Midori and the others, former evil leaders of the enemy organizations!?

title: The Delinquent Shimizu-san Sitting Next to Me Has Dyed Her Hair Black
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Tonari no seki no yankī Shimizu-san ga kami o kuroku somete kita
synopsis:
Shimizu-san, you dyed your hair black.」

「Ah, yes.」

「Why did you dye it all of a sudden?」

「Because…yesterday…」

Shimizu-san, who sat next to me and had dyed her hair from blonde to black gradually lowered her voice, slightly blushed, and laid her face down on the desk.

title: Even Though I Was Rejected by the Two Most Beautiful Girls in His Grade, for Some Reason They Seemed to Be Fond of Him
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: 学年の二大美少女にフラれたのに、何故か懐かれたらしい
synopsis:
Rejected, But Now They Love Me!? A Laid-Back Harem School Romantic Comedy

At the urging of his popular friend, Eita ends up confessing to two beautiful girls: the gentle and airheaded Aira Yuzu, and the serious, no-nonsense class president, Himeno Mei. Naturally, he’s expected to crash and burn… or so he thought. But for some reason, both girls start getting attached to him. Why!?

title: I Started Working a Housekeeping Job and Ended up Being Liked by the Family of the Most Beautiful Girl in School
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Kaji Daikou no Arubaito wo Hajimetara Gakuen Ichi no Bishoujo no Kazoku ni Kiniirarechaimashita
synopsis:
My Part-Time Job is at the House of the Cutest Girl in School. A Shy and Awkward Housekeeping Rom-Com with the School Idol!

During his second year of high school, Haruto Otsuki starts a part-time job in housekeeping during the summer vacation. His first client turns out to be none other than Ayaka Tojo, the most beautiful girl in school! Despite being bewildered by this unexpected turn of events, Haruto continues doing his housekeeping duties. Over time, he becomes well-liked by Ayaka’s family and begins regularly visiting her house.

From making home-cooked meals that delight Ayaka, to going grocery shopping together like a newlywed couple, and even going on shy movie dates like young lovers, they begin to grow closer by spending these special moments outside of school. This charming and awkward housekeeping rom-com featuring the most innocent and beautiful girl in school and a secretly high-spec guy begins!

title: My Female Friends Are Surprisingly Willing to Do It if I Ask Them
genre: Adult, Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Smut
alternative: 女友達は頼めば意外とヤらせてくれる
synopsis:
“Please—I beg you, show me your p*nties!!”

“W-What are you gonna do if I show you!?”

Aoi Hazuki, the most beautiful gyaru in school, and Toshiya Minato, an ordinary first-year high school student, live in the same apartment complex and attend the same school. The two are such close friends that they hang out at each other’s places after school.

As usual, they’re having fun together, just the two of them, when Minato suddenly begs Aoi to show him her panties. At first, Aoi resists, but with a firm, “I’m not your girlfriend, okay?” she reluctantly lifts her skirt. From that day on, Minato’s “requests” start to escalate little by little, until…!?

A steamy romantic comedy about the cutest girl in class and her friend, filled with youthful mischief!

title: Reincarnated as the Mastermind of the Story
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
alternative: Monogatari no Kuromaku ni Tensei Shite ~Shinka suru Maken to Game Chishiki de Subete wo Nejifuseru~
synopsis:
『The Legend of the Seven Heroes』── A game that boasted of its worldwide popularity.

Ren, a university student who cleared its sequel while setting a world record, got reincarnated as a baby inside that game.

(Could it be that I reincarnated as the protagonist of 『The Legend of the Seven Heroes』?)

While indulging in such a thought, hearing his name from his mother’s mouth made him doubt his ears.

It was because that name was of a classmate of the heroes who later betrays them halfway into the story and also turns out to be the mysterious and powerful enemy who maneuvered behind the scenes to try and plunge the world into the depths of despair.

Wishing to live in peace, Ren decided to continue with his life in a remote region.

However, he ends up getting acquainted with the saint whose life was supposed to be taken by him in the game, and is led to an unexpected and unfortunate destiny.

It’s the start of a fantasy story filled with dramatic developments and heart-pounding adventures that are impossible to take your eyes off……!

title: Is It Okay If I Stay This Close to You? – Starting a Chill Break with the Class Idol
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Kimi no Gachi Koi Kyori ni Ite mo Ii yo ne? ～Kurasu no Ninki Aidoru to Kimama na Ikisaki Hajimemashita～
synopsis:
A Breath-of-Fresh-Air Romcom with a Chill (and Super Cute) Idol!

At Sezaki Touya’s high school, there’s a certain someone who stands out—a nationally beloved idol named Shizuku Himeno.

Nicknamed the “Goddess of the Classroom,” Shizuku is admired by all for her dazzling looks and sunny personality. But—

“Yah-ho, Sezaki-kun. Wanna take a break with me?”

The girl who flops down next to him and says that? That’s the real Shizuku—totally laid-back, a little clingy, and full of surprises.

In front of everyone else, she shines like the brightest star. But ever since Touya accidentally caught a glimpse of her true self, she’s been showing that side to him more and more.

From sneaking off to arcades together, to singing their hearts out at karaoke, to spending quiet nights side-by-side in the park… their secret little hangouts gradually bring them closer—both emotionally and physically.

And so begins a low-key, high-fluff story of a free-spirited idol and the boy caught in her wake—a secret escape just for the two of them.

title: Sir Black Knight Who Does Not Want to Be an Additional Ranger
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Sci-fi, Tragedy
alternative: 追加戦士になりたくない黒騎士くん
synopsis:
“Me, Ain’t I seen as a villain even by regular folks?”

It’s been about a year since the sudden appearance of the monsters, the enemies of humanity. Katsuki Homura, who had wandered into a research facility and stolen a combat suit, operated in the shadows as the “Black Knight.” He fought off the monsters that came after him and occasionally rescued people under attack by these monsters.

However, he was ultimately a criminal who used the stolen combat suit to wreak havoc in the city during battles with monsters. His envisioned fate as the Black Knight was to be defeated by the “Justice Crusader” and meet his end. But for some reason, he was invited to join the Justice Crusader?! In reality, in the eyes of the public, the Black Knight was a popular figure as a dark hero, and shocking truths were revealed!? What will be the fate of the Black Knight? This is a comedic tale of a misunderstood dark hero who sees himself as a villain and the chaotic events that follow, fueled by his enthusiastic fans!

title: I’m a Kept Man for the Three Most Beautiful Girls in School
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Kounai san dai Bijo no Himo Shitemasu
synopsis:
Tempted by 3 Beautiful Girls—Even Cuddling is Part of a Kept Man’s Job.

The “Three School Beauties” everyone admires—Karasumaru Kage, Ono Tsukasa, and Daigo Sakurako. For a poor, lonely guy like me, Kyousaka Kei, they were supposed to be out of my league… until I saved them from a potential assault and they became intensely fond of me.

“I want to get closer to you, even just a little. I want to know more about you, Kyousaka.”

Then, they asked me to do a part-time job fulfilling their requests. I thought it would be simple errands, but things gradually escalated…

“Hey, hug me tight.”

“Wanna kiss?”

“Touch me there. Harder.”

And it’s all because— “““It’s okay, it’s part of the job.”””

A lovey-dovey life at 5,000 yen per hour… Is this… being a kept man?

“Yes. We want to take care of you, Kei-kun.”

title: Did You Think You Could Live Normally in a World With a 1:5 Gender Ratio? What if Emotionally Intense Girls Were Toyed With by an Oblivious Boy?
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: Danjo Hi 1:5 no Sekai demo Futsuu ni Ikirareru to Omotta? Gekiomo Kanjou na Kanojo-tachi ga Mujikaku Danshi ni Hanrou saretara
synopsis:
A Close-Call, Unwitting Heartthrob Romantic Comedy!

Masato suddenly finds himself transported to a world that’s just a little more populated by women than his own. But hey, he’s got an identity, he can go to college—so apart from the slightly more assertive women, life doesn’t seem all that different, right? Confident in this naive assumption, Masato begins his new life, completely unaware of the impact his casual kindness (by his old world’s standards) has on the women around him. He doesn’t realize just how much his words and actions have saved them—or how deeply they’re beginning to fall for him. And when they catch even a hint of another woman in his life, the light in their eyes fades as they spiral into intense, possessive emotions…

This is the story of a protagonist who believes he can live a normal life, unknowingly causing heroine after heroine to fall for him—until he’s finally “taught a lesson” by the overwhelmingly devoted love of these girls.

title: My Childhood Friend Seems to be The Main Heroine
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Seinen, Slice of Life
alternative: Ore no Ssananajimi wa Main Heroine Rashii.
synopsis:
But being by Saito’s side feels the most comfortable.

Saito’s childhood friend, Machigane Riri, is a universally acknowledged beauty. They start their romantic comedy story with a fateful encounter at the high school they both attend… or so it should be.

“Ayato, let’s go home together!”

Why is she always by my side, who supposed to be just a background character?

title: I Will Inspire Your Insipid Days
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: あんたで日常(せかい)を彩りたい
synopsis:
My roommate was the “Mysterious Truant”─

At the private Shumonzuka Girls Academy.

Hanabishi Kanon, a student aspiring to pursue a career in entertainment and arts, encounters Tachibana Natsume, a student shrouded in mystery who has never once shown her face at school.

Natsume, with her destructive depictions and unique sense of color, satirizes daily life, gathering numerous followers.

At the same time, she harbored a significant flaw.

“Unable to lead a normal life.”

The act of helping her led Kanon to start living together with Natsume, but Kanon too harbors a secret─ pretending to be the opposite gender as a stand-in for his sister─.

title: The Story Of How A Beautiful Foreign Student Who Lives Next Door Started To Visit My House After I Helped A Lost Little Girl
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Maigo ni Natteita Youjo wo Tasuketara, Otonari ni Sumu Bishoujo Ryuugakusei ga Ie ni Asobi ni Kuru You ni Natta Ken Nitsuite
synopsis:
One day, Charlotte Bennett comes to study abroad in Akihito Aoyagi’s class.

All of his classmates are attracted to Charlotte’s innocent, elegant behavior and cute appearance, but Akihito calmly feels that she lives in a different world and takes a step back. However, when he helps Charlotte’s younger sister, Emma, who was lost, Akihito’s daily life changes drastically. After finding out that the Bennett sisters live in the next room of the apartment building, and also that Emma has grown fond of Akihito, the Bennett sisters come to visit his room every day. The three of them play dominoes, sit around the dinner table, and go out together. As they spend time together, Akihito and Charlotte grow closer, despite their clumsiness― A sweet and enticing love comedy next door begins!

title: I, a Tired Office Worker, Start Living Together with a Beautiful Highschool Girl whom I Met Again After 7 Years
genre: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Kutabire Salarymen no Ore, 7nenburi ni Saikai shita Bishoujo JK to Dosei wo Hajimaru
synopsis:
Amae Yuya, an office worker in his third year of employment, is completely exhausted by the daily grind. Then, for the first time in seven years, Yuya meets Aoi Shiratori, a girl eight years younger than him who used to live in his neighborhood. She had grown up to be a beautiful JK girl who was good at housework, and she said to him,

“Yuya-kun, would you like to live with me under the premise of marriage?”

Aoi desperately wants to live with Yuya, her first love. Yuuya, who is puzzled, agrees to live with Aoi as a guardian for the time being, but Aoi’s aggressive approach makes him very nervous inside.

title: I Won’t Allow You to Have a Romantic Comedy With Someone Else
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life
alternative: Watashi igai to no rabu kome wa yurusanai ndakara ne
synopsis:
After a year of continuing my approach without giving in to her cold shoulder, I finally got her attention. I entered into a boyfriend-and-girlfriend relationship with Yoruka Arisaka, a solitary beauty who did not try to get close to anyone in the class. Moreover, even though she was so cool, it seems she actually really loved me!

“Even if this is obvious I like you, but it doesn’t seem it’s transmitted.”

Eh, isn’t this cute existence dangerous? Despite her bullishness, she has zero romantic defense power, and her desire to flirt is already at her limit! Moreover, is this a prohibited act in public? As if this isn’t enough to keep their feelings for each other secret, a love rival appears…?

An explosive romantic comedy that begins with a lover!

title: I Want to Live the Harem Life of My Dreams With the Hypnosis App I Got
genre: Adult, Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Teniireta saimin apuri de yume no hāremu seikatsu o okuritai
synopsis:
I’ve never had a girlfriend. The app installed on my phone was a hypnosis app that could control anyone. After testing it, the app’s power was real. With this, a harem life isn’t just a dream. Let’s do our best, me, now is the time to abandon conscience… wait,

“Why do all the girls I target have troubles!?”

A beautiful gal, a plain girl with hidden beauty, a cool ojou-sama junior—by the power of the hypnosis app, their secrets that they couldn’t tell anyone are revealed!

(I just wanted to do erot*c things…!)

The self-proclaimed loser, but fundamentally a good guy protagonist, ends up running around helping people!? All-ages hypnosis harem romantic comedy!

title: Asahi-san, the Light-Attribute Beauty, Somehow Started Hanging Out in My Room Every Weekend
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: 光属性美少女の朝日さんがなぜか毎週末俺の部屋に入り浸るようになった件
synopsis:
Asahi Hikaru is a beautiful and popular girl known for her bright personality, intelligence, and charm. She’s a top student at school, famous for her radiant personality, and is also a promising young tennis player and a model, seemingly blessed with every talent imaginable.

On the other hand, her classmate Kageyama Reiya is ordinary in academics and below average in sports. At school, he’s the kind of dark, introverted otaku who loves video games and is unnoticed by everyone.

Light and shadow, or rather, light and darkness.

The two should have been complete opposites, destined never to cross paths.

However, in the spring of their second year of high school, Reiya accidentally discovers that Hikaru is also a gamer when they end up on the same bus.

This chance encounter leads Hikaru to start spending her weekends in Reiya’s room.

Without worrying about anything else, they spend unhealthy and unwholesome, yet incredibly fun, hours just playing games together. As they continue to spend time this way, the distance between their hearts begins to close.

“If you ever feel like skipping out, you’re always welcome to come over.”

“Well then, maybe next time I’ll check out the comfort of your gaming cushion.”

This is the story of a bright girl with hidden scars, who finds healing through a dark boy’s “curse” and experiences her first love, shining in rainbow colors.

title: One Day, Out of The Blue, I Got a Gal's Forgiving Wife
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: Aru Hi Totsuzen, Gyaru no Iinazuke ga Dekita
synopsis:
Nice to meet you. My proud husband♥

“Hey, hey, why are you always pretending to be asleep?”

During break, I, Eizawa Shuuji, who pretends to be asleep, am often approached by my classmate, Miran Hanazuki.

I was confused by Miran, but my parents told me unexpectedly,

“Actually, you have a fiancé…”

And what’s more, it turns out to be Miran who’s always trying to get on my nerves!?

We are always together at lunch and after school.

At first I was confused by this sudden engagement, but Miran accepted me gently and led me with her straightforward feelings…?

“Let’s eat together♪”

“Um, I want to go to that restaurant that Shuji seems to like! ”

An introvert guy and a gyaru.

A lovey-dovey comedy about two polar opposites who connect with each other, begin!

title: Jikan wo Tomete Dere Makuru, Saikyou Muteki no Kurono-san
genre: Action, Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Sci-fi, Slice of Life, Supernatural
alternative: 時間を止めてデレまくる、最強無敵の黒乃さん
synopsis:
“Ah, duhhh~~!!! Kai-kun, I love you so much──!!!”

— Time stop canceled

“Eh? Kurono-san, what’s wrong?” “No, it’s just my feelings.”

User of time stopping ability. An agent with invincible power. The cold black-haired beautiful high school girl, Kurono Shia.

Her secret is to stop time and secretly show her sweet side to the guy she likes. She can do anything without anyone knowing, but the guy she’s eyeing, Kairo, also has a secret–,

He’s actually aware of all the events that happen when time stops! *However, his body could not move. *

Without knowing that, today Kurono-san will continue to show her sweet side, making her smile and flutter!

Love stopped in time will only accelerate! This chronos romantic comedy begins!

title: Listen, Actually, It’s My First Time. 87 Days Until My First Time With a Loose-Ish, Innocent Girlfriend
genre: Romance, School Life
alternative: Ano ne, jitsuha, hajimetena nda. Yuru-sode ubuna kanojo to no shotaiken made, ato 87-nichi
synopsis:
“If I said I’m actually a virg*n you’d be… disillusioned, wouldn’t you…?”

Despite being referred to as the most popular at school, Jun has a secret that he’s actually a virg*n.

For the first time he got himself a girlfriend, and that girlfriend is someone he’s in unrequited love with for a long time—a girl named Hiyori, someone rumored to be the most loose at school.

However, she actually has been keeping a secret as well… the fact that she is inexperienced.

“Ah, my bra got unhooked… Can you hook it for me”

Even during a date when both are putting on a pretense, their heartthrob is uncontrollable.

“Eh? …L-Love hotel? We’re going there? S-Sure, I don’t really mind.”

Bluffs and unexpected events are bringing their hearts closer together.

“Umm, while doing it… I’d love it if you could call my name. Please?”

This is a story about the 87 days until they have their first time.

title: My Childhood Friend Called Me a Man of Convenience Behind My Back, I want To Reset My Favor and Live a Normal Youth
genre: Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Tragedy
alternative: Osananajimini kagede tsugōno yoi otokoyobawarisareta orewa kōio risettoshite futsūni sēshun'o okuritai
synopsis: Born with a unique upbringing, Tsuyoshi Toudo, a boy who cannot understand the hearts of others. Betrayed by his friends, Tsuyoshi decides to protect himself with his special power. That power—’Reset’—allows him to erase all emotions towards those girls. However, Hanazono Hana, a childhood friend who realizes she was ‘reset’ by Tsuyoshi due to a lie she told to hide her embarrassment, reflects on her inability to be honest, and starts approaching Tsuyoshi to rebuild their relationship from scratch. It’s a story of an awkward boy aspiring for ‘normalcy,’ regaining his youth by ‘starting over’ with the girls.

title: Only I, Her Future Husband, Know How to Make Her Sweet
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life, Supernatural
alternative: 彼女をデレさせる方法を、将来結婚する俺だけが知っている
synopsis:
Q: What was your motivation for applying to this high school?

A: Because my wife was going to go to school here.

I, who was already in my 30s, suddenly woke up and found myself back 15 years ago.

In front of me was my wife, Yuki, wearing a school uniform that I didn’t recognize.

Since we were supposed to meet only after becoming adults, we were still strangers at the moment

•

—But I knew everything.

I knew that at this time, she didn’t trust anyone, had no friends, and felt isolated.

I know how much she regretted those gray teenage years after becoming an adult.

Now, I’m going to change everything.

“Why do you know my personal secrets!?”

“Of course, because I’m your (future) husband.”

This is my story, of how I recolored my wife’s gray teenage years with my own colors.

title: Shujinkou no Osananajimi ga, Wakiyaku no Ore ni Guigui Kuru
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
alternative: 主人公の幼馴染が、脇役の俺にグイグイくる
synopsis:
There's a guy at my high school who's like a romantic comedy hero. He's an incredible guy who's unremarkable, but for some reason is super popular with beautiful girls.
I was killed in that guy's romantic comedy. He was tried for a crime he didn't commit, lost everything, and took his own life. --But then a miracle happened. I suddenly found myself back on the morning of my first year of high school entrance ceremony two years ago.
In this second life I was miraculously given, this time I'm not a romantic comedy.
[Kazuki Ishii, I love you. Let's get married.]
Why!? Mikoto Hidaka, the childhood friend and crush of the hero, confessed to me!!?? She's the 'Ice Empress' in class, but for some reason she's the only one who's been pushing herself towards me...!
Wait a minute, it's not me you like, is it!?

title: When the Introverted Me Got Surrounded by S-Tier Beauties After a Seat Change, a Secret Relationship Began
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life
alternative: Inkyā no ore ga sekigae de S-kyū bishoujo ni kakomaretara himitsu no kankei ga hajimatta
synopsis:
My peaceful school life… is officially over.

Izumiya Ryouta, an introverted otaku, suddenly finds himself surrounded by the top three beauties of the class after a seat change.

In front of him sits the little-sister-type Miyama Airi. To his left, the cool and detached gyaru, Ichinose Yuria. And to his right, the refined, black-haired class rep, Kuroki Ruri.

On the surface, they’re flawless beauties—but Ryouta stumbles upon secrets that none of them can ever let out…

“P-Please…! Just don’t tell anyone about this!”

“From now on, we’re in that kind of relationship.”

“This is a secret… just between you and me, Ryouta-kun.”

All he wanted was a quiet otaku life—so how did things end up like this?!

Caught between three troublesome girls, an introverted otaku desperately fights to avoid any more chaos in this love-comedy showdown!

title: Liar's Lips Fall Apart in Love
genre: Comedy, Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 嘘つきリップは恋で崩れる
synopsis:
The dull lonely man and the cultured sparkling woman.

Where will the mismatched pair’s youthful campus life lead to—?!

Souhei Sagara, a university student who champions the solitary lifestyle, lives next to the sparkling and fashionable beauty, Haruko, in his run-down apartment.

Haruko seemed like a creature from a different world compared to the drab Sagara. However, she actually was… a plain girl with no makeup who had successfully made her dazzling university debut!

Upon learning her secret, Sagara decides to help the defenseless Haruko to maintain his solo living.

“If you can become a sparkling girl, you won’t need to involve me anymore, right?”

“Sagara-kun, you’re so stubborn…”

If her true face is revealed, will her rosy campus life crumble for sure?!

The fate of the dull lonely man and the cultured sparkling girl’s unaligned youthful days—?!

title: Blue Outline
genre: Drama, Romance
synopsis:
Eye-catching. Stunning. Addictive. Mesmerizing.

Those were the impressions left upon those who had seen her paintings.

It was what I aspire to be, as a high school student who wishes to pursue art.

No matter what she created, they were all named as the works of “Genius”. An artist with unparalleled talent, Kashiwazaki Yuri.

“I came here just to see you. I only paint what I desire.”

The one closest to me, yet also the furthest away; my childhood friend.

One day she suddenly stopped painting. But I continued to stroke my paintbrush as I chased after her shadows.

“I’ll paint again and again. I won’t give up. Talent doesn’t matter.”

I’m going to make her enjoy painting again. And I’d show her that my creations are superior.

This is a story of an ordinary person who devoted his youth to painting, challenging the “Genius”—.

Winner of the 34th Fantasia Award 《Tachibana Koushi Special Award》

title: When I Saved a Girl Who Was About to Be Kidnapped and It Turned Out to Be a Princess Who Had Come to Visit in Secret
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Yuukai Saresou ni Natte Iru Kou Tasuketara, Oshinobi de Asobi ni Kitte Ita Ohimesama Datta Ken
synopsis:
A Half-Cohabitation Life Begins After Saving Her?”**

Seito Kiriyama, an ordinary high school student, finds himself in the middle of a kidnapping during summer vacation.

He rescues a girl named [Luna] , who was about to be taken away, and ends up living under the same roof with her because she has nowhere else to go.

Luna, who has a beautiful appearance, a stunning figure, and a cheerful personality, gradually draws Seito’s attention as they live together.

Then one day, on the first day of the new school term, Luna suddenly appears as a transfer student in Seito’s class.

It turns out that Luna is actually a princess from a certain country—and she likes Seito so much that she even proposes to him!?

“W-Well, I only do this kind of thing for you, Seito-sama… I wouldn’t do it for anyone else…”

A sweet and heartwarming high school romantic comedy with the elegant and refined princess [Luna]

title: I Got Engaged, But It Turns Out My Fiancée Is the School’s Famous “Villainess”
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen
alternative: 許嫁が出来たと思ったら、その許嫁が学校で有名な『悪役令嬢』だったんだけど、どうすればいい？
synopsis:
“You have a fiancée.” — One Saturday morning, Higashi Kujou Hiroyuki, a second-year high school student, was suddenly hit with this shocking revelation from his father. Hiroyuki was a member of the go-home club, had no girlfriend, and was living a peaceful life with no complaints. At least, that’s how it was supposed to be…

While Hiroyuki was left dumbfounded, the talks about his arranged marriage kept moving forward rapidly, and before he knew it, he was set to start living together with his fiancée!? And if that wasn’t enough, his fiancée turned out to be a “stunning beauty, top of her class, and an exceptional athlete”—the perfect young lady who also attends his school!

“I’ll tell you this upfront—you don’t have the right to refuse.”

With an icy tone, she declared. She was none other than the infamous “villainess” known throughout the school—!?!?

title: The Classmate Who Is Adored by Everyone Smiles Teasingly Only at Me
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Aisare tenshina kurasumeito ga, ore ni dake itazura ni hohoemu
synopsis:
Chika Satomi is a beloved and beautiful girl in the class known as the ‘Angel of Peace.’

Ichinose Sōma, who is a fanatic about making sweets, asks Chika to be a taster for him after school when he makes some sweets.

Saying things like,

「I also want to try various things――」

「…Ichinose-san’s embarrassed expression is really cute…」

Sōma ends up watching over Chika, who keeps teasing him.

Though usually passive, for some reason, Chika teases Sōma with a sly smile, showing her mischievous side only to him, and as a result, Sōma’s after-school hours become filled with sweetness!?

A sweet and thrilling romantic comedy with a naughty angel woven together by confections!

title: I Got A Cheat Ability In A Different World, And Become Extraordinary In The Real World Girl’s Side: The Adventures Of The Splendid Maidens Changed The World
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem
alternative: 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する ガールズサイド ～華麗なる乙女たちの冒険は世界を変えた～
synopsis:
Super popular cheat fantasy! The long-awaited spin-off series has begun!

Yuuya Tenjou is a boy who possesses cheats in every aspect. Behind his unparalleled feats, there are always ‘girls’―”We’re going on a journey to save those who are in trouble!―The journey of the girls who want to fascinate even the Cheat King (?) and change the world, begins!

title: The Top Idol Next Door Can't Help But Crave My Guilty Pleasure Meals
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Ore no Haitoku Meshi wo Onedari Sezu ni Irarenai, Otonari no Top Idol-sama
synopsis:
The ‘meddlesome’ high school student Mamori Suzufumi helps a starving neighbor who had collapsed in the apartment next door by some chance.

That person turned out to be the popular high school idol, Sasaki Yuzuki!

Yuzuki had been on an excessive diet to maintain her ideal idol image.

But when the worried Suzufumi serves her homemade cooking, she eats it with a face full of happiness while screaming,

「——Aaaaaah… I can’t take it anymore!」

With a face full of happiness, she finished her meal.

Falling in love with her hearty appetite, Suzufumi decides to tempt Yuzuki with her favorite foods to make her fall for him through ‘food seduction.’

Pork bowl, ramen, okonomiyaki——

「I definitely won’t eat it!」

That’s what Yuzuki says, but once again, she finds herself craving Suzufumi’s cooking today──

title: It Seems I Was Hitting On the Most Beautiful Girl in School Without Me Noticing
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 俺は知らないうちに学校一の美少女を口説いていたらしい
synopsis:
The person he consults with at his part-time job about love is actually his crush…!?

Rena Saito, the most beautiful girl in school, and Minato Tanaka became friends through their hobby of reading. They were supposed to be just friends, but the distance between them gradually narrowed!

One day, Minato, who is clumsy when it comes to love, goes to a senpai at his part-time job for love advice — but for some reason, her face is bright red…?

“… Don’t worry about it. Keep going, Tanaka-san.”

(I can’t believe you care about me so much…ugh, come on!)

Not realizing that the person he’s consulting with is his crush in disguise, he tells her all about his growing feelings, making her blush! An unconscious love comedy begins!!

title: The Villainess Whom I Had Served for 13 Years Has Fallen
genre: Action, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis: It’s a story about a man who got transported into a novel and possessed a slum boy. He met a noble girl and served her as a butler for 13 Years. Now the girl has already fallen from her noble life and lives in an abandoned mansion with paralyzed legs. Why did she become like that? Of course because she is the villainess in the novel.

title: After School, at a Family Restaurant at Night, With That Girl From My Class
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 放課後、ファミレスで、クラスのあの子と。
synopsis:
Time that feels somehow enjoyable—that’s the kind of comfort I’ve found.

The usual family restaurant—it’s my refuge, the place I escape to when being at home feels awkward due to my mom’s remarriage. A space that’s mine alone, where I don’t have to force myself to spend time with my new family.

At that very family restaurant, I always see a classmate, Kazemiya Kohaku. A beautiful, solitary girl who doesn’t seem to fit in with anyone. Apparently, she doesn’t have a place at home where she belongs, either.

Through an unexpected turn of events, we ended up sharing our secrets, and together, we formed the Family Restaurant Alliance—a pact to give each other alibis for staying out late.

From that day on, we became a pair who could be ourselves around one another. The dull hours spent at the family restaurant turned into an enjoyable time of trading complaints with Kohaku.

“—Let’s meet at the usual spot after school tomorrow.”

At the family restaurant after school, another day begins as the two of us search for reasons not to go home.

title: Soshiki no Shukuteki to Kekkon Shitara Mecha Amai
genre: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: 組織の宿敵と結婚したらめちゃ甘い
synopsis:
Yesterday’s enemy is today’s wife. A sweet home comedy about superpowered individuals living as a married couple!

“I hate you so much!”

“Incidentally, me too.”

They were once part of opposing organizations of superpowered individuals, and fought against each other for conflicting causes. Rouji Saigawa, known by the alias “Feather Hunter”, and Ritsuka Nagira, the strongest superpowered individual referred to as the “White Sourceer”. They spend their days washing blood with blood and have no proper social experience…

“I like you, Rou-kun.”

“Me too, Ritsuka.”

Somehow, after their organization disbanded, they ended up dating sweetly and even got married! The overwhelming hatred turned into 100 times the cuteness? Now they were a couple who kissed each other’s hands at the entrance every morning before leaving for work.

However, there was one problem for the husband.

Namely, he has never shared a bed with his wife. In other words, despite being married, he is still a virg*n!

This is a story full of hardships about a husband who gets into all sorts of trouble, but continues to try hard every day to deepen his love with his stubborn wife.

title: I Took the Female Lead’s First Time in a Romance Fantasy
genre: Action, Adult, Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Romance, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: 로판 속 여주의 처음을 가져가 버렸다
synopsis: He got drunk and took the heroine’s v*rginity in a romance fantasy.

title: Choose Me, and With Your Kiss, Let Me Be the Only Destiny's Girl for You.
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
I'm sorry. Let’s make sure we’re happy in the next life…

The sad voice of a girl keeps echoing in Shundo’s mind. Could this be a lover from a past life whose love ended tragically? Shundo begins to wonder about the true identity of the voice’s owner.

One day, a fragment of his memory returns when he attends a festival with Erena, his best friend’s younger sister. There, he realizes that Erena is the owner of the voice. She is Fiona, a girl to whom he once promised his love in a previous life.

You remembered, Senpai… No, Leo-sama! I’m so happy to be with you in this life, Erena says with deep emotion.

However, a transfer student named Rui suddenly appears. Rui exudes the same vibes as Fiona and says, Maybe we’re more compatible.

Now, Shundo faces a dilemma: who is the real Fiona? If he makes the wrong choice, the true Fiona’s life will be in danger!

To uncover the truth, Shundo decides to delve deeper into his memories of his past life. But the key to unlocking those memories turns out to be… flirting with both girls!

title: Elf Watanabe
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
Watanabe Fuka is the president of the gardening club. She may not stand out in class, but she’s a kind girl with an enchanting smile.

“I like you. I like you, Watanabe-san!”

“Actually, I… I like you too…”

And so, the troubled high school student, Oki Yukito, thought his youth was finally starting to take shape. Just before his first love could be fulfilled, however, her appearance suddenly changes. The person who appears before him is an Elf!?

“Did you, by any chance, see it…?”

Watanabe Fuka is… apparently an elf. A cursed girl from the San-Alfa tribe who fled from the other world, Nache Rivira, to modern-day Tokyo for a certain reason.

Uh, actually, I’ve… always been interested in you, Oki-kun. With a name like ‘big tree’ and Yukito… it kind of reminds me of Yggdrasil!

“Can I start my confession over!? ”

Thus, Oki Yukito finds himself swept into a slightly mysterious life in modern-day Japan with the “Elf Watanabe” and becomes embroiled in a grand spectacle revolving around the fate of the other world.

New Light Novel by “The Devil is a Part-Timer” Author Wagahara Satoshi

title: After I Was Confessed, the Young Lady Looked Strange
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 俺が告白されてから、お嬢の様子がおかしい。
synopsis:
Kagehito, the Tendou family’s servant, serves the perfect young lady, Hoshine. One day, Kagehito reports to Hoshine that he has received a confession from a girl in his grade. This news shakes Hoshine, who has hidden her feelings for Kagehito since childhood.

“I’m the one who has liked Kagehito for a long long time!”

And so Hoshine begins to attack Kagehito more vigorously than ever! Close contact in a crowded train, begging him to sleep together… Hoshine actively draws closer to Kagehito, who only wishes to fulfill his role as a servant! A lovely romcom about a young lady’s efforts to conquer her servant!

title: Have a Coffee After School, In Another World’s Café
genre: Fantasy, Seinen, Slice of Life
alternative: Houkago wa, Isekai Kissa de Coffee wo
synopsis:
Yuu found himself in another world, here he spends his time not adventuring in the town’s labyrinth, nor hunting down a demon lord, but running the world’s only café.

His days pass as he hopes for an upswing in popularity and works towards keeping his… eccentric regulars happy. One day, a student at the town’s magic academy finds his café when looking for a quiet place to study, how will things develop from here?

title: Regarding my Married Life with a Childhood Friend Whom I Thought Was a Boy Going Way Too Smoothly
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Danshi da to Omotte Ita Osananajimi to no Shinkon Seikatsu ga Umaku Ikisugiru Ken Nitsuite
synopsis:
Shuiti, a high school student, ended up marrying his childhood friend whom he originally thought was a boy.

When they reunited 10 years earlier, his childhood friend Yuika had transformed into a beautiful girl, which initially made Shuiti quite nervous.

However, as time passed, he gradually grew accustomed to the sense of closeness as best friends— And thus, their love story as an ideal couple with a charming touch of innocence begins!

title: Too Many Losing Heroines!
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
“Huh? Who are you calling loser?”

As the background of the class, I, Kazuhiko Nukumizu, witnessed a popular girl – Anna Yanami, getting rejected by another guy.

“Even though he said we’ll get married. Don’t you think he’s pretty mean?”

“When did he say that?”

“When we were 4 or 5 years old.”

That doesn’t count, right?

With this, the losing heroines like Remon Yakishio from the Track and Field Club, and Chika Komari, from the literature club.

“Nukumizu-kun. There are two types of girls. Childhood friends or cheating cats.”

“I see. Well, that’s a bold statement.”

There’s a fortune for those who shine only after losing. Losing Heroines— The curtain to the mysterious coming-of-age story “Makeine” opens now!

title: I Ended up Marrying the Girl I Hate in my Class
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: Kurasu no Daikiraina Joshi to Kekkon Suru Koto ni Natta
synopsis:
High school student Hojo Saito married his classmate, Sakuramori Akane, the girl who’s his worst enemy in school.

“If you tell the rest of the class we’re married, I’ll kill you”

“I don’t want them to know either. There’s no point in that.”

Their newlywed life wasn’t going so well, and they were constantly at odds. However, as they progress through their daily lives, the distance between them closes, they have more enjoyable moments together, and they gradually come to understand one another.

Saito learns about Akane’s cute side, which he never saw before, and Akane gradually began to recognize the feelings that she’s been keeping inside…

The heart-throbbing newlywed life of two people who just can’t seem to be honest with each other begins here!

title: Why Not Make Both Twins ‘Girlfriends’?
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
Meet Usami, an honor student at the top of her class. She views me as her rival at school, but after classes, she shows me a ‘different side’. She enjoys arcade games and displays a carefree smile, unlike her school persona.

To become friends with Usami, I spend time with her both during and after school. Our relationship grows, and unexpectedly, Usami confesses her feelings for me after school!

I accept her feelings, but just as I thought we were becoming a couple, another girl appears, claiming she was the one who confessed to me!

It turns out their names were Chikage Usami and Hikari Usami—they’re twins!

After an unusual turn of events where both twins confess to me, I end up dating both of them, as per their suggestion. Ultimately, our days are filled with alternating solo dates and times when all three of us hang out together——

title: Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky
genre: Drama, Romance, School Life, Seinen, Slice of Life
alternative: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
synopsis: On an April night in Tokyo, still too early for fireworks, university student Kakero Mano meets a woman named Koharu Fuyutsuki. She is a beautiful girl who stands out from the crowd, laughs a lot, and exudes a warmth that contrasts sharply with Kakero’s own introversion. But there was something Kakero didn’t know at first—she can’t see. Unlike Kakero, Koharu hasn’t given up on anything, even with her blindness. She attends university daily, shows interest in clubs, makes friends—and dreams of launching fireworks one day. Kakero wonders why, when she can’t see them…but maybe it doesn’t matter. And maybe he can start moving forward, too, for the girl who’s always been by his side.

title: There’s No Freaking Way I’ll be Your Lover! Unless…
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life, Yuri
alternative: Watashi ga Koibito ni Nareru Wakenaijan, Muri Muri! (*Muri Janakatta!?)
synopsis:
The me who threw away my past loner self and succeed in doing a high-school debut, Amaori Renako. But, as a shabby character it’s hard for me to live this kind of bright life! At that time, I met the school’s super star, Oozuka Mai, and we exchanged our problems with each other. Since then, we started our relationship as ‘secret friends’. As long as I have her as my friend, I could do anything! Is what I thought.

“It seems like I fell in love with you”
