It was a world ruled by the games of Gods and Demons called Gift Games. Homura, who met a lovely usamimi loli Kuro Usagi, has unexpectedly ended up participating in a super large scaled Gift Game!? He, along with Ayazato Suzuka and Kudou Ayato, who were summoned together with him and Izayoi Sakamaki, who he reunited with after 5 years, will challenge the Game of Fighting Gods and Buddhas that even rolled up the real world in it!!

title: Do you like being Captured by Cute girls?
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: Kawaii Onnanoko ni Kouryaku Sareru no Wa Suki desu ka
synopsis:
Let the clumsy, strategic, and sweet love game begin!

“Kitamikado-san, this is a love game, and whoever falls for the other first will become their s*ave.”

Having been lured into a trap by the youngest successor of the Nanjou Family who govern the dark side of Japan, Nanjou Kisa, Kitamikado Mikado was unable to resist. What awaited him was the start of the love game, where openly admitting that one had feelings for the other would spell defeat. If Mikado, a sheltered boy from a renowned political family, were to decline the game, things would escalate into a scandal.

Both of them bet their lives on this game, however Mikado slowly but steadily starts to lose his reason. That’s an obvious result, since he is starting to fall for Kisa. And that is the same for his opponent…

title: After A Heartbreak, My Bitter Childhood Friend Is Now Sweet Like Sugar
genre: Romance, Slice of Life
alternative: 失恋後、険悪だった幼なじみが砂糖菓子みたいに甘い ビターのちシュガー
synopsis:
Yu Sawatari is a high school student who has fallen ill after a painful accident.

He was having a hard time. Then his childhood friend Kokoa Shirayuki, who lives next door, decided to take care of him for an unknown reason.

“Why do you want to take care of me all of a sudden?”

“I’ll leave if it bothers you?”

After that day, the two, who had been growing apart, come closer.

Yu’s wounded heart is healed through his interaction with her.

Eventually, he is drawn to Kokoa.

This is a frustrating, sweet and slightly sad love story between a boy who has lost his love and a childhood friend who had a crush on him for a long time.

title: A Returnee Classmate, Number One On The List Of People I Want To Kill, Became My Wife
genre: Adult, Ecchi, Romance, School Life, Seinen
alternative: Koroshitai Rankingu 1-i no Kikoku Shijo Kurasumeito ga Yome ni Narimashita
synopsis:
“I like you. Kageo!”

At his home’s entrance, the girl ranked number one on the list of people he wanted to kill pushed him down and was sucking his penis

Just, what the hell is this situation!?

Although he saved her from falling down the stairs, a sudden expression of love with a fellatio is frightening. Kageo wanted to run away immediately.

“No problem-desu. I will suck more-desu”

“No, Sudou-san, things are already getting bad, though”

Is Sudou-san, a slut?

No way. Even though she looks so innocent

“Kageo, annoying!! I like you, true!! Believe-desu!”

Lalya made a sulky face. Because she was really beautiful, there was a punch when she got angry and it was overwhelming.

“I’m sorry!”

He apologized and ejaculated at the same time.

title: A Mysterious Job Called Oda Nobunaga
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Martial Arts, Romance
alternative: Oda Nobunaga to Iu Nazo no Shokugyo ga Mahou Kenshi yori Cheat Dattanode, Oukoku wo Tsukuru Koto ni Shimashita
synopsis:
The young Alsrod (Arusuroddo), is eagerly waiting for the day that he’s granted a “job” in the temple. In this world when one reaches adulthood, they are granted “jobs” like swordsman or magician by divine revelation, among them the one said to be the strongest is magic swordsman.

Alsrod is the illegitimate second son of a small feudal lord, and the seat is already succeded by his elder brother who already put him in the front lines, he’s in a position that could lose his life on the battlefield any day. If he became a magic swordman, a job that was possesed by the famous heroes of the past, he could change his situation.

However the job that’s granted to Alsrod is not magic swordman nor any of the other common jobs, it was a mysterious job called “Oda Nobunaga” that none of the temple’s people knew anything about!.

title: A New Life With An Elf Wife!
genre: Adult, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Do you want a bath? Do you want a meal? Or maybe an elf?

An elf I met when I was young became my wife to return a favor. A naive first time with Misha all sprinkled with magic and innocence! A commendable servicing blowjob and bridal veil naughty time. The new-wife elf wanting to get pregnant is too cute so s*x every night!? It’s a happy new life with an elf wife, a complete change from the dull everyday life.

title: A Reincarnation Romantic Comedy Of A Hero And A Witch
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
alternative: Eiyuu to Majo no Tensei Rabu Kome
synopsis:
Shiraishi Gomichi, an ordinary high school student, has a secret. He has a memory of his previous life. In another world, different from this one, Morimichi was a ‘hero” who saved humanity. However, this is only the story of his previous life. In this life, it was supposed to be a normal student life, but the appearance of Mai Shiina, a girl who moved into the same class as him, changes his ordinary life. She was a reincarnaited witch like Gomichi, who once plunged another world into disaster. They had killed each other many times in their previous lives, but when Gomichi asks her what she wants now, Mai tells him.

“I can’t live without you!”“What… ?”

title: A Heroic Tale About Starting With a Personal Relations Cheat (Ability) and Letting Others Do the Job
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Seinen
synopsis:
The hero and weapon are the strongest connections! An exhilarating fantasy that lurks from the back of the world!

Ned, a young man who has been behind many of the world’s greatest achievements, using a weapon known as human networking.

One day, however, he is judged by the selfish king to be a liability and expelled from the heroic party.

Ned decides to start as an adventurer from scratch. But his life as an adventurer is naturally out of the ordinary, as he is adored and connected with everyone from the leader of the knights to the princess of the mermaid tribe…

‘Can I get help from the Wisdom King and the Great Sage to find this person?’

Meanwhile, the King is coming to a realization. The heroes’ party was full of capable, but incredibly problematic children, and that it was Ned that controlled them..

Thus opens a new story of a hero who changes the world from behind the scenes with his motto of “using connections”.

title: A Gal Who Looks Good in Apron is Unfair
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
alternative: エプロンの似合うギャルなんてズルい
synopsis:
This is a story of reconciliation between estranged childhood friends.

The popular girl in my class, Yuzuki Amiru, is a so-called ‘gal’ with blonde hair, makeup and flashy fashion. And…she’s also my childhood friend.

Ever since she made her debut as a gal in junior high school, it became difficult to talk to her, and now we are completely estranged. I thought that she and I lived in different worlds, as I was more interested in studying.

But then one day, a teacher asked me to teach her how to study because she was getting bad grades, which led me to start talking to her again. What’s more, she’s also invading my personal life…!?

“I like doing housework and stuff.”

“How is it? I made the broth myself.”

Huh? Me and Amiru were estranged, right? Wait, don’t clean my room without permission!

title: 6 Main Heroines Who Absolutely Want to Monopolize Me
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 絶対に俺をひとり占めしたい6人のメインヒロイン
synopsis:
「Having fewer possessions is better. Both material things and relationships.」

Shinichi Hirakawa, a minimalist high school student who only socializes with the minimum number of people, is set to participate in a love study abroad program.

The program provides a perfect environment with unlimited funds for living expenses, and he will be living with six bride candidates――The catch is that he has to reject them one by one sequentially!

The candidates include an idol, an actress, a YouTuber, a childhood friend, a stepsister, and an ex-girlfriend, each with a unique approach to wooing him.

Shinichi is troubled by the task of determining who should be eliminated from these spirited and diverse beauties.

However, everything changes when an anonymous accusation surfaces, claiming――『Someone among us is cheating!』

Thus begins a love comedy where Shinichi decide the losing heroine, a romance built on the premise of rejection!

title: Christmas Comes Not For Us
genre: Drama, Romance, Sci-fi, Supernatural, Tragedy
alternative: Boku to Kimi Dake ni Seiya wa Konai
synopsis:
Once the words “I love you” passed her lips, she died, over and over.

It was December 24th, Christmas Eve, and High School Student Riichi’s long-held feelings for Natsumi had been returned. Yet before his happiness could sink in, she lost her life right in front of him. Once he regained his senses, he had returned to two days prior… He learnt that the words “I love you” had become a trigger to rewind time. He attempted to avoid the confession from his beloved but she would always do so, and die once again.

“I love you, Riichi. I love you.”

Trapped in an endless Christmas Eve, will Riichi manage to overcome the recurring tragedy and seize his future?

title: Nekonoyama Neneko Becomes a Neko
genre: Ecchi, Fantasy, Mature, Romance, Yuri
alternative: 猫ノ山寧々子はネコになる
synopsis:
“Is it wrong for a girl to want to become a prince?”

Nekonoyama Neneko is a demihuman in high school who can turn into a cat.

While hiding her true identity from the world, she is shy around everyone anyone except her family.

The only one she allows into her heart is her older sister’s friend, Mashiro.

Neneko lives while continuing to admire the cool and mysterious Mashiro.

One day, Neneko discovers that Mashiro is a vampire and proposes living together as her blood donor (partner).

This is a romance between girls clumsy at love.

title: Fated to Be Loved by Villains
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis: I was proposed to by the Final Boss.

title: Exiled for Being Too Honest, I Ended Up in the Ultimate Squad Made Entirely of Man-Hating Girls!
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
What would happen if an earnest, innocent, beautiful boy joined the all-female strongest unit?

Finn Teraward, an extraordinarily talented young man, was deemed a nuisance for being both a commoner and exceptionally skilled. As a result, his superiors temporarily assigned him—despite still being a trainee—to a deadly frontline unit, essentially a death sentence.

This frontline unit was composed entirely of women, led by the four strongest soldiers of the Luvankrum Empire's military. Rumors suggested that these women despised men.

Accepting his fate, Finn prepared himself for death. However, upon meeting the women of the frontline unit, he found them to be unexpectedly kind.

In fact, they were far too eager—so much so that not only were his days exhausting, but his nights were even worse!?

After witnessing Finn's strength, the women understood why he had been temporarily assigned to their unit despite being a trainee. However, when they learned the real reason why their kind-hearted new recruit had been sent to them...

title: Valkyrie Bullet
genre: Action, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mecha
synopsis:
When a Soldier Sets Foot on a Maiden's Battlefield, a Story Without Heroes Begins. The near future —

Earth is under invasion from otherworldly monsters known as "Gijuu," forced into a never-ending defensive war. Conventional weapons are useless, and the only means of resistance is the powered suit called the Valkyrie Dress — a mysterious force-equipped armor that only women can operate. The institution that trains and manages these women who fight clad in dresses of steel, Third Academy, receives a new transfer. His name is Hifumi Ren. Having survived a surgery with less than a 10% success rate, he is the world's only test pilot of an anti-Gijuu humanoid weapon —.

title: My Three Pure Girlfriends Who Want to Be My Number One
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
I became the boyfriend of the three most beautiful girls in the school year, but everyone's behavior is strange...

"Dating all three of us—that's the ideal love for Nii-san."

The latest matchmaking app developed by my younger sister, Rinne, who is a genius app developer, is an excellent compatibility test tool that analyzes whether the men and women being diagnosed will succeed in a relationship from every possible aspect.

I, her older brother, was chosen as a playtester, and the compatibility result I was given was unbelievable.

[If you date all three of the top beauties in your grade, including Rinne, at the same time, you have a 99% chance of success!?] And so began a four-way relationship that, on the surface, seemed to be going smoothly. However, as the distance between us shrank, the possessiveness and distorted approaches of the three girls escalated more and more.

This is an immoral, everyday romantic comedy woven by an unusual relationship and overwhelmingly heavy emotions from the girls.

title: From Fake to Genuine Hero
genre: Action, Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
The Fake Hero of a tear-jerker game world shatters the bad end to save the heroines—!!

The Fake Hero, Elmika. A mid-boss appearing in the guaranteed-bad-end tear-jerker game Viridistella Quest, he's a stepping-stone character who, having been mistaken for the prophesied Hero, behaves arrogantly as a result—only to be defeated in the end. Having been reincarnated as that hated character, I take on the role of the strongest previous Hero, using my knowledge of the original story and efficient leveling to save the heroines who are headed toward ruin.

"Now then, Lady Saintess. ...First, you don't mind if I deal with this scoundrel, do you?"

As a result, the original story's scenario somehow gets rewritten, and the Fake Hero Elmika rises to first place in the popularity rankings—!?

Reincarnated as the arrogant villain known as the Fake Hero in a tear-jerker game world, he saves the heroines and shatters the bad end—a tear-jerker-reversal fantasy!

title: I Risked My Life to Protect the Girls in a 1:30 Chastity-Inverted World, and Now Their Love is Way Too Heavy!
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
A world with a gender ratio of 1 to 30.

A world where c*astity roles were reversed.

Born into a knight family, Protelclus Garland (nicknamed "Tect") thought his life would be a dream harem come true. But reality wasn't so kind.

Unlike commoners, noble-men of knight lineage were obligated to form a harem. Worse, their houses were single-generation only and held no land. In other words, absolutely no appeal as husbands.

After racking his brain for a way to attract women, Tect reached one bold conclusion:

"If I become the kind of man who risks his life to protect girls, then I'll stand out, even in this world!"

There was only one problem.

Men couldn't use magic, their bodies were weak, and they were treated as fragile beings meant to be protected by women.

But Tect refused to accept that.

He trained his body to its limits.

Mastered martial arts.

Learned blacksmithing to craft custom weapons that covered for his shortcomings.

Finally, the day of his entrance into the noble academy arrived.

He made friends with girls.

And when danger struck, he threw his life on the line... and actually protected them.

That was where everything went wrong.

Even if a man wasn't born popular, the moment someone meant to be protected risked his own life, women's feelings turned into obsession.

A jet-black-haired beauty from a family of mad scientists.

A blonde twin-tailed noble loli who wrestled with giants.

A pink-haired drill princess commanding entire armies.

Tect soon learned the hard way:

Once you sear a girl's heart with reckless devotion, her love becomes terrifyingly heavy.

title: When I Reunited with My Older Childhood Friend, She and Her Sister Started Fighting Over Me: “Want to Test Which One of Us is Better?”
genre: Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis: ​I have two childhood friends who are sisters: the older Momo-nee and the same-aged Miu. Ever since I reunited with Momo-nee, the distance between us has become strangely close—she’s hugging me in her swimsuit and even inviting me on hot spring trips…

title: After Obtaining [Otherworld Guide Map] With 5.0★★★★★ (57,894 Reviews) Rating, I'll Enjoy a Leisurely Slow-Life Journey Through Another World, Relying on [User Reviews]
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Shounen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Yakumo Tabito, reborn in another world, obtains the [Otherworld Guide Map] —an overpowered skill that lets him see [User Reviews] for any location.

Yakumo Tabito had his spirit worn down by the daily grind of a black company.

But after being reborn in another world, he gains the Guide Map skill.

This cheat-tier ability allows him to check user reviews for any hunting ground, town, or even dungeons.

And the best part? It even comes with a spatial bag, hyper-maturation, and Area Pins that let him travel anywhere freely!?

This is a heartwarming tale of a travel-loving protagonist who, after meeting a cat-eared girl, sets off on a relaxed journey through another world.

title: Reincarnated as a Mandragora, Worshipped as the Flower Witch. ...If They Find Out I'm a Monster, Will They Hunt Me Down?
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life
synopsis: Misaki Hanazono dies wishing to be reborn as a beautiful flower, but is reincarnated as a mandragora, a monster plant with a deadly voice. Born into a world full of monsters, she dreams of living peacefully among humans. To do that, she takes on a human form, but the nature of her voice remains the same. Fearing exposure, Misaki stays completely silent as she enters human society. Her mysterious demeanor leads to misunderstandings, and before long, she's revered as the "Flower Witch." But her growing reputation draws attention from knights and court magicians, people who likely would kill her if they knew the truth?

title: The Corrupt Lord Who Got a Do-Over Doesn’t Repent!
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
The Corrupt Lord Runs Wild in His Second Life—Only to Be Hailed as a Benevolent Ruler for Some Reason!?

At the moment of his execution, the corrupt lord Furado time-leaps back to the past. Having been condemned in his previous life, you’d think he’d finally see the error of his ways—but of course not; for the sake of self-preservation, he sets his sights on a carefree existence as a commoner. Yet everything he does gets hailed as virtuous deeds, until at last he’s revered as a national hero!?

title: The Handsome Girl Who Stole My Girlfriend Seems to Be After Me Now
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
“Prepare yourself. I’ll make you fall for me in one month.”

“Ya-ho, Boyfriend-kun, are you watching?”

Souta Sakuhara, a first-year high school student. My first ever girlfriend was stolen by her. That guy—well, girl—is Shizuno Mizushima. With her boyish features and tall stature, she is the number one beautiful girl people “want as a boyfriend.” However, for some reason, she adopts an aloof attitude only toward me and constantly teases me; she is my hateful rival in love. And yet…

“My real target is you, Souta. Go out with me.”

T-This girl, she suddenly pinned me against the wall! Moreover, she started saying things like, “I’ll make you fall in love with me during a one-month trial dating period”… There is no way I’ll ever fall for someone like you!

A one-way romantic comedy where I’m seduced every day by a handsome beautiful girl!

title: The Villainess Who Has Been Killed 108 Times
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Tragedy
synopsis: Stabbed 7 times. Massacred 11 times. Beheaded 5 times. Hanged 3 times. Burnt to death 7 times. Drowned 8 times. Run over 3 times. Shot 12 times. Poisoned 6 times. Strangled 7 times, etcetera… Scarlett was a villainess whose life has repeated 108 times in total. The duke’s redheaded, red-eyed daughter summoned fear and terrorized the nation as a ruthless queen. In all of her 108 lifetimes, she always ended up dying at the age of 28. After 107 lifetimes ending by being killed by one of the five heroes and the flower-minded heroine, she died for the 108th due to an accident. Thus on her 109th life, Scarlett regains all her memories and tries to break free from the loop. Will Scarlett be able to break the chains of the Red Curse?

title: Rakshasa Galaxy: I Became the Character Who Dies Right at the Start, So I Did Whatever I Wanted and Somehow Ended Up a Hero
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Mecha, Romance, Sci-fi, Shounen
synopsis:
Before I knew it, I became Leo, the character who gets chomped up by aliens at the start of the ultra-hardcore epic RPG 'Rakshasa Galaxy'.

And, just my luck, right at the moment before getting eaten.

So, I thought I'd go out in style with an epic speech, but for some reason... I ended up becoming a hero instead!?

This is the story of a guy whose every move turns into a joke, featuring muscles, battles, and an ever-growing dark history.

title: My Life Do-Over After I Couldn’t Protect the Girls in My Class
genre: Action, Harem, Mystery, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
synopsis:
The Nishifuchū City Headless Schoolgirls Case.

On the morning after summer break, two beautiful high school girls—Noma Miyuki and Aoki Midori—were discovered in a gruesome, headless state.

Despite the police’s desperate investigation, the case closed unsolved.

Twenty years later, Kizuki Tōgo, the last person to see the girls alive before the incident, lay dying from an incurable illness, consumed by regret.

If only I could go back… This time, I’d protect them.

On the brink of death, the man’s desperate wish came true—he awoke as a first-grader, hurled back in time.

This time, I’ll save them. No matter what.

Tōgo apprenticed under his uncle, a master martial artist, and forged himself into the strongest high schooler alive.

This is the story of one man who will rewrite that day with his fists.

title: Asuka of the Scarlet Sky
genre: Action, Adult, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Romance, Seinen
synopsis:
Kashiwagi Yuuto, who was bored with his life, died in an unexpected accident. He was given the ability to create holy treasure tools from God after his death. Yuuto was thrown out to another world and met Asuka, the girl who wants to be a hero.

A scarlet swordswoman and a Captain of the Royal family imperial guard. A female hero who every citizen yearned for, was engulfed in the secret pleasures of a woman.

title: The Science Note by δ and γ
genre: Drama, Mystery, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Bittersweet yet fresh — a story of science, love, and mystery.

When I think about it, youth is a lot like a well-crafted detective novel.

The mystery of the cherry blossoms that once symbolized a love that never came true.

That faint feeling of something off during club recruitment.

The secret hidden in the age of a great old tree.

The hamster that vanished from a locked room.

And the desperate choices made by high schoolers, dedicated to a biology club on the verge of collapse.

Each seemingly unrelated cause and effect is actually connected somewhere —

and only when we look back do we realize:

Ah, so that was youth.

That’s when it finally hits us —

the important things we’d overlooked all along.

“Let’s test it… scientifically!”

This is the modest activity log of the Science Department at Tsunanagai High School,

where a group of science-loving students take on the countless mysteries hidden in everyday life.

— And this is the story of how one first love was finally unraveled.

title: Hideout in Another World: I Tried Building a Secret Base in the Middle of Nowhere
genre: Action, Adult, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Mystery, Psychological, Slice of Life
synopsis: A middle-aged man who got lost in another world discovers an oasis hidden in the untamed wilderness. Naming this perfect hideout “Hideout,” he gradually develops it and interferes with this world little by little. Sometimes, he enjoys a slow life, while other times, he does business in the city and increases his companions. If he feels his life is being threatened unreasonably, he may also engage in conflicts with his companions. It’s a somewhat reclusive otherworldly fantasy.

title: The Cheerful Girlfriend With a Broken Sense of Distance
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: 陽キャなカノジョは距離感がバグっている 出会って即お持ち帰りしちゃダメなの?
synopsis:
An adolescent school caste love comedy at the mercy of an overly daring girlfriend!
Sasagawa Ayano is the flower of the class. When he accidentally saves her from being picked up—

“Thank you, Fujimura.”

Since then, she brings me home on holidays, asks me to praise her like a kid, or stay and sleep over.

I thought I was enjoying my life as a loner in the shadows, but then I realized that her presence had become a part of my daily life…

I am a gloomy guy, and I never thought she would remember my name! On top of that, she became oddly affectionate toward me and started to visit…?!

“You’re coming home again today, right?”

“A loner? Then I’ll have you all to myself!”

“…Shouldn’t I think you’re special?”

He thought she was from a distant world, but now she’s zero distance away.

This is a youth caste love comedy in which he’s at the mercy of a girl who is too daring!

title: I Helped a Handsome High School Boy Who Was Being Beaten on The Train, And He Turned Out to be a Prince
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
“Eh, since when were you a girl!?”

Saito Kujo saved the handsome Rei Hoshina, who was being beaten by a thug on the morning train. Afterward, a secretly filmed video of the incident went viral, making him a celebrity at school. While he was getting closer to his female friend who sits next to him—Rinna Nishino, the most beautiful girl in the school—he also became friends with the victim, the handsome high school “boy” Rei, and they started hanging out together. However, lo and behold, Rei was actually a girl!

title: Surviving in a World Teeming with Monsters with the Useless Skill【Everyday Items Master】
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Shounen
synopsis:
Crowbar is the strongest! Crowbar is the strongest! Crowbar is the strongest!

After being a NEET for several years, I found the world had completely changed into one full of dungeons.

Apparently, the area I lived in had become a so-called "Dungeon Stampede Quarantine Zone," where monsters overflowing from the dungeons were roaming freely through the city. In order to survive, I used an app to awaken a skill—and what I got was 『Everyday Items Master』.

What an useless skill....Or so I thought. But somehow, I ended up saving a self-proclaimed S-rank adventurer girl and a famous dungeon streamer, and now they become way too attached to me...?

This was the survival story of a laid-back NEET who actually awakened the strongest skill, but misunderstood it as a weak one.

title: The Hero Creation Classroom of a Reincarnated Ordinary Person
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis: Endy, a reincarnator, possessed cheat abilities but grew to a mediocre strength and reached his growth limit, feeling anxious about his future as an adventurer. He loved money and leisure, so he opened a classroom for his second life, thinking he could have his students pay him. Although he started the classroom on a whim, the plan was going smoothly. The students who graduated from the classroom grew into world-class strong warriors and began sending him money. Endy thought he was living a perfect second life.

title: Dungeon’s Final Boss: Banished by My Boss, the Goddess, to Earth—So I’ll Continue My Past Life
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy
synopsis:
The boss (the goddess) didn't know about the final boss' struggles

After (possibly) dying from overwork, the protagonist, Jiro Hasegawa, found himself reincarnated as a dungeon monster in another world. Through sheer effort and continuous evolution, he eventually rose to the position of the final boss, entrusted with guarding the deepest part of the dungeon.

Even though he kept working hard, one day, his boss—the goddess—suddenly deemed him too costly to maintain and attempted to transfer him to another dungeon... or so he thought. Instead, he got fired.

However, the place he ended up in was Earth.

Taking on a human form, Jiro found that time had barely progressed on Earth. And so, he decided to enjoy the continuation of his previous life.

Anyway, time to enjoy my retirement life!~

title: The Girl I Met on the Matchmaking App Turned Out to Be My Student
genre: Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
alternative: Matching Appli De Deatta Kanojo Wa Ore no Oshiego datta Ken
synopsis:
Shugo Kizaki, a high school teacher, starts using a dating app after the wedding of a friend.

Through a chance encounter, he meets the highly popular (with over 1000 “likes”) beautiful girl “Sakuran” on the app.

However, Sakuran turns out to be—his student (a high schooler)!?

“You’re underestimating the app, Sensei! I’ll teach you how to become popular on the app!”

After saving Sakuran from a crisis, Shugo is taught the secrets to gaining attention on the app as a reward.

He begins his search for the ideal partner, charging ahead into the battlefield of dating apps!

From Jun Minosaki, the author of Hundred series, comes a love hunting guide and romantic comedy!!

title: Reincarnated as a Villainous Duke (37) Who Gets Condemned by His Daughter
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem
synopsis:
What Fate Awaits the Villainous Duke Who, Fearing Condemnation, Works to Raise the Affection of the Heroines (Including His Daughter)?

One day, a man realizes that he has been reincarnated as the villainous duke (37) in a certain game.

If things continue as they are, he will follow the villain route and eventually be condemned by the main heroine, who is none other than his own daughter.

Using his knowledge of the game, the man begins taking action to avoid his own condemnation. However, for some reason, his daughter repeatedly lets glimpses of her "Ice Lady" side show whenever the opportunity arises...

In this world where the game scenario has been unstable from the very beginning, can the man survive as a duke? And can he save the world in place of the protagonist who is destined for a ruin route? Thus begin the days of battle for survival and affection raising for the villainous duke (37).

title: The Time I Woke Up in Bed with My Childhood Friend—Who Happens to Be Way Too Good-Looking
genre: Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
The Most Vulnerable Side of You, the “Unattainable Flower”

​Amano Iori’s childhood friend, Yukimura Mizuki, is the school’s “unattainable flower”—the kind of girl everyone envies from afar. But ever since the day Iori was confessed to by another girl, Mizuki has suddenly started closing the distance between them. And now… before he even realized it, why are you sleeping right next to me looking like that?

title: The Path of an S-Rank Adventurer: The Boy Who Was Expelled from His Party Awakens to His True Power [Weapon Master] and Eventually Becomes the World’s Strongest
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
In a world where 40% of humanity awakens to unique abilities.

Magical beasts and dungeons are everywhere, making the adventurer profession one of the most lucrative paths.

Sasha, the leader of the team Sacred, was on the brink of being promoted to S-Rank Adventurer.

On the same day, another person was also confirmed to achieve S-Rank—a boy named Haise.

Haise was once a member of Sacred, an F-Rank adventurer who had been expelled from the team by Sasha.

Possessing an unusual ability, Haise struggled to understand its nature. Misunderstood and abandoned by his childhood friend Sasha, he was cast out of the team under the pretense that “Haise couldn’t keep up”.

The true reason behind his expulsion was Sasha’s desire to protect him—she didn’t want Haise to die while adventuring.

However, Haise refused to give up. Even on his own, he worked tirelessly to continue his journey as an adventurer.

One day, Sasha deceived Haise into venturing into a forest inhabited by a dragon, where he was nearly killed.

Betrayed by the trust he had placed in Sasha, Haise vowed never to believe in her again and resolved to grow stronger as an adventurer on his own.

At 16, both Haise and Sasha were recognized as S-Rank adventurers. Haise sought to become the strongest adventurer alone, while Sasha aimed to be the best alongside her companions.

This is the story of two childhood friends who once walked the same path but diverged onto separate journeys—paths that might one day cross again.

title: Hidden Reincarnated Hero: Enjoying a Second Life While Concealing Cheat Skills and the Hero Job!
genre: Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Shounen
synopsis:
One day, a hero summoning was conducted, but only the protagonist was reincarnated.

With a changed appearance, he introduced himself as Tooi and decided to live freely in another world.

Reincarnated as Tooi he happened to purchase a s*ave named Annelise, who had been left unsold. He had intended to buy Annelise and witness her final moments, but her true form turned out to be an unbelievably beautiful girl.

In that world, there were dungeons, and Tooi explored them alongside Annelise. As he received advice from Annelise senpai on dungeon exploration, Toi gradually grew, eventually reaching the pinnacle of humanity.

The abilities Tooi gained from his reincarnation allowed him to freely view his stats, change his abilities and jobs, and possess a unique skill for detailed appraisal and an item box. With these abilities, which were not exactly overpowered but still quite useful, Toi embarked on his journey of growth.

title: The Prince of the Otaku Club in a C*astity-Reversed World
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
It’s exactly what the title says. Welcome to the lust-fueled springtime of our youth!

In a world where the male-to-female ratio is one-to-twenty and it’s full of aggressive, carnivorous women, we just don’t stand out. We can’t get boyfriends. We’re not popular. We’re the kind of otaku who can’t even make proper eye contact with guys, able to do nothing more than laugh subserviently like, “ehehe.” The four of us otaku girls make up the ‘Modern Culture Research Club,’ and as the club president, I, Chihiro Takahashi, worked up the courage at a card game shop to recruit the boy who just joined—Ichirou Kajiwara. His loves are card games, manga, anime, and light novels, and he’s even interested in our creative pursuits, making him a truly precious male otaku. There’s no way we wouldn’t fall for the prince of our otaku club. Welcome to the lust-fueled springtime of our youth!

title: (Doujinshi) Mother Swapping
genre: Adult, Ecchi
synopsis:
Takuya has finally fulfilled his long-held dream: losing his virginity to his first love, Yukari. Discovering an incredible physical compatibility, the two lose themselves in a cycle of intense, repeated passion. However, Masato watches from the shadows, consumed by a growing jealousy as he witnesses Takuya shamelessly bed the woman he secretly pines for—his own mother.

Exploiting the fact that Takuya’s mother, Naoko, is still frustrated and lingering on the afterglow of her illicit affair, Masato begins plotting a scheme to tear the two apart. Before long, Naoko finds herself coerced into even more depraved and lewd acts...!?

A story of immoral swapping fueled by the love and hatred between mother and son! A son’s secret obsession for his mother drags everyone deeper into a quagmire of forbidden desire...!!

title: I’m the Eldest Son of a Poor Family, but My Magical Talent Awakened While Working Hard for My Family
genre: Action, Fantasy, Romance, Shounen
synopsis:
Itsuki Isshiki has three younger sisters and two younger brothers. With no parents around, the only one who can support the family is Itsuki, who graduated from middle school.

To provide for his family, he chose to venture into dungeons. All he wants is a normal, peaceful life. However, his extraordinary talent gradually starts to spread as a rumor.

“I’ll do anything if it earns me money.”

For the sake of his family, Itsuki steps into the depths of the dungeon.

“Hey, isn’t his magic kind of weird?”

title: Hundreds Years After I Was Called [Just Corpse], I’ve Become Strongest Undead When I Woke Up
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Shounen
synopsis:
Zion, a solo adventurer, recklessly entered a dungeon beyond his ability.

Alas, that was the last thing he did. Wandering inside a dungeon for hundreds of years, as an undead, he kept advancing into the dungeon. Slaying monsters left and right until his undead body underwent ‘evolution’ many times over――

――By the time he regained his ego, he had already become the strongest undead: 【No Life King】.

Humankind, who was made aware of the appearance of a new world-class disaster monster, felt dread as they fell into the abyss of despair. 「The world is… done for.」…Or so they think.

「It’s okay, do I look like an evil undead to you?（Smile~）」

「「「HIIIIIIIIIIIII?!」」」

「…SOMEONE PLEASE TELL ME WHYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY?!」

This was the tale of the humans who trembled in fear [out of their own convenience] and him, an undead, who actually had no intention to destroy the world.

title: (Manga) Mabarai-san Hunts Me Down
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Supernatural
synopsis:
My hobbies are shopping and searching for sweets. The rest- kill the vampires.

One day the girl who transferred to my school froze the class with her shocking self-introduction. She dyes my gray high school life bright red.

A unique youth romantic comedy by "Self-proclaimed vampire hunting gal" x "High school boy living in the shade"!!

title: Only I Level up My Dungeon Equipment!
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem
synopsis:
20 years ago, a huge tower that pierces the sky suddenly appeared in Tokyo Bay. And the dungeon weapon with mysterious power excavated from that tower changed the world.

The equipped item is said to be able to give various abilities to the wielder such as impervious to bullets, can fly through the air, and even crushes rocks with bare hands. People who explore the dungeon have such dream like obtaining power-giving equipment and in search for it.

The main character of this story focuses on Kenya Mitsurugi , one of the boys who also dreams of the same profession. However, Kenya was facing hardship along the way. He was being ridiculed as incompetent,exiled and fired due being possessing a profession of an alchemist

An Alchemist was a profession that be considered an incompetent profession which resulting many people to be cast away. As a result, Kenya gave up on his dream.

However, Kenya’s world changes completely with the power of an awakened alchemist.　

The hero who became the only one in the world who can evolve dungeon weapons rises with that power.　　　

This is a story full of dungeon adventure, dungeon encounters, and dungeon success.

title: The Runaway Wizard
genre: Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Slice of Life, Tragedy
synopsis:
That girl sacrificed her life with a smile.

Joining them on their journey to defeat the Demon King was a helpless young wizard. She had a cute smile, loved bread, and was happy to be of service to everyone. But her magic…was unleashed in exchange for her lifespan. Without telling anyone, without anyone noticing. She simply smiled and said, “I’m glad I was able to help,” and disappeared at the end of their journey.

Leaving behind nothing, not even a name or a past… Her companions still don’t know. What was the burden of this girl, known as “Wizard-chan”?

This is the story of a girl who saved everyone without accepting anyone’s love, who disappeared after saving them all.

However, in reality, the missing “Wizard-chan” was a member of a long-lived species that could live for tens of thousands of years. So it wouldn’t have been a problem if she had used up a little of her lifespan… But now that she’s gone, no one can explain that. And, for some reason, their adventure has ended up being aired as an anime in real life on Earth as a “Story of a World Enveloped in Kindness.”

It’s a Misunderstanding + Clouding + Bulletin Board Message format. The clouding affects the characters other than “Wizard-chan” and the anime viewers who were excitedly watching it thinking it was a normal slice-of-life anime. The moment it’s discovered that her lifespans have been consumed, hell begins. Everyone hope it has a happy ending.

title: Life as an Adventurer with the Banished Marquis Daughter
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Romance
synopsis:
Erika Solnzari was exiled from her country.

The reason was her friendship with the Maiden of Light.

Erika, who earned the enmity of the royal family and great nobles scheming to marry the Maiden of Light, was supposed to be expelled from the academy attended by the kingdom’s nobility.

However, due to the intervention of a third party aiming to create discord between the royal family and the chancellor by attacking Erika, the daughter of the kingdom’s chancellor, she was accused of attempting to assassinate the Maiden of Light.

As a result, Erika Solnzari was unjustly exiled.

Fearing that the kingdom might fall if the Maiden of Light’s heart was clouded, the kingdom concocted a farce that Erika had eloped in a mismatched love affair.

The partner chosen for this farce was Shin Longdagger, the poor second son of a viscount. Although he understood that accepting this story would mean the end of his noble status, he gladly accepted it.

The reason was that Erika Solnzari was his first love.

title: The Berserker of Infinite Healing I Reincarnated as the Youngest Son of the Most Insane Clan and Reached Worlds Strongest by Mastering the Underlooked Healing Magic
genre: Fantasy, Shounen
synopsis:
The House of Margrave Cravenheart a bloodline where battle maniacs who love to fight gather.

Ald, the youngest son of that house, possessed a passion for battle even as a reincarnator. Such a person set his eyes on a certain magic.

That was healing magic, which has continued to be underlooked. Those who use healing magic, which heals slower than potions, have no place to belong, but Ald came up with an idea.

The possibility that the berserker class could reach the pinnacle of strength. "If I master healing magic with this, couldn't I keep fighting while healing myself?" That very idea was the first step toward leading him to become the strongest.

Regenerating all wounds instantly and continuing to fight without pause, his form is truly that of an immortal berserker.

Healing through fighting, fighting through healing as an immortal berserker, Ald obtains power that loses to no one and makes a name for himself across the world.

This is the story of how the protagonist, while being a berserker, masters healing magic and reaches world's strongest.

title: TS Reincarnated Beauty Netora Reiko Wants to Be NTRd
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Psychological, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life, Supernatural, Tragedy
synopsis:
Aim for the Ultimate NTR Heroine!

“Whatever the case, I want to be a girl who gets NTR’d!”

A despicable villain who shattered countless couples in his previous life is reborn through TS reincarnation as the angelic beauty Netora Reiko. But this tr*shy girl has only one desire: to experience the ultimate netorare (NTR)!?

Reiko, a breathtakingly beautiful girl who also understands the male psyche, sets out to create her perfect NTR scenario. With calculated tactics, she seduces her childhood friend and even his best friends one after another!

This NTR-loving TS beauty is out to deceive everyone and mentally destroy her childhood friend in the process—

A wicked yet glorious romantic(?) comedy!

title: The Five-Star Gal is Obsessed With Me
genre: Comedy, Drama, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
The protagonist, Ikoi Kizuki, was the kind of guy who lived at his own pace and couldn’t care less about school caste drama.

In his class, though, there was a group of four girls everyone called the Five-Star Gals:

Hari Suitengu – the cool, queen-like gal.

Hinawa Hiwatari – the bright, energetic gal.

Miyu Chigira – the cute, small-animal-like healing gal.

Platina Kongouji – the lazy, mysterious gal.

Four dazzling beauties who turned heads wherever they went.

They’d been best friends since middle school, but to keep up appearances, each one pretended to have a boyfriend.

The problem? Not a single one of them had any real dating experience—eventually, the lies caught up to them.

So one day, during casual girl talk, one of them asked:

“Okay, putting aside our fake boyfriends… if you had to date someone from our class, who would it be?”

The first name that came up was Ikoi—the laid-back boy who never changed his attitude no matter who he talked to, and who ignored all the caste nonsense.

From that day on, the Five-Star Gals began making moves on Ikoi.

But what they didn’t know was that Ikoi himself was hiding a secret he couldn’t tell anyone.

“Maybe… to me, she’s like a star shining in the night sky.”

And so begins this “make-’em-fall” romantic comedy—where the very top of the caste, the Five-Star Gals, find themselves being pulled into the orbit of one boy who never cared about caste in the first place!

title: Exiled Heros Leisure Life (Slow Life) - I Also Got My Very Own Dearest Angel After Getting Free!
genre: Adult, Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life, Smut
synopsis:
Alek, 39 years old, suddenly dismissed from being a hero.

However, an encounter with a s*ave woman brings him about the happiest post-retirement life!

“Oh Hero Alek, thank you for all the hard work you have done. Go resign from being a hero and have a rest.”

Alek was at a loss when he was suddenly dismissed from being a hero after 30 years of service in the kingdom.

As he thought of a plan, wondering what to do, “That’s right! Let’s get a s*ave with common sense that I don’t have!” was what came up in his mind.

And then the one he encountered was a modest yet beautiful nun Lilicia.

Having gotten the kind-hearted Lilicia as well as learned love, Alek decides to live a happy life as an adventurer from now on for her sake.

Meanwhile, a new team of heroes has been organized in the kingdom that exiled Alek, but they have been unable to successfully carry out a simple subjugation and were bringing about confusions…

This is an adventure tale of a new life of an exiled, former hero who has become free and found love!

title: (Doujinshi) Divorced With Children
genre: Adult, Smut
synopsis: Batsuichi literally means "one strike out" and describes a woman who has been divorced once. Enjoy this amazing hentai doujinshi from artist Minahon which you will love!

title: That Stupid Runt Who Reunited with Me After 10 Years Is Now Transformed into a Beautiful and Innocent High School Girl
genre: Comedy, Harem, Romance, School Life, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Arizuki, who quit his job in Tokyo, decided to look for a job in his hometown of Shizuoka. He bumped into a high-school girl when he was about to re-start his life.

That very girl, was the girl who lived with him next door. That very girl with whom he used to play a lot, but Arizuki was yet to notice that at all. All because of her transformation …

title: The Villainess who Only Had 100 Days to Live Had Fun Every Day
genre: Drama, Fantasy, Josei, Romance, Slice of Life, Tragedy
synopsis: The Duke’s daughter, Lelouche, received a revelation from God: “You’ll die in 100 days.” Instead of despairing, she makes a bet with God. If she can show Him a beautiful death, she will be rewarded in her next life. With only 100 days left, Lelouche sets out to fix her family's issues and live without regrets.

title: The Strongest Prophet Who Had Trained 100 Heroes is Admired By His Apprentices Around The World Even As An Adventurer
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life
synopsis:
—The master of the strongest heroes is even stronger, but now he travels secretly to his apprentices—

Eisen is a man who raised 100 heroes and saved the world by ending the war with an evil god. He had recovered from the wounds inflicted on his body in the「Other World」in exchange for protecting the heroes. During the times he has been recuperating, the heroes he had saved became successful due to his tutelage and developed the 「Human World」 as leaders of various countries. As a result, each of the hundred heroes reported to their Eisen-sensei whom they admired saying—

“Please, come visit our countries.”

Reading all of these, Eisen one day decided—

“I’m going on a journey around the world and see these places that my apprentices recommended me. It looks fun.”

“It sure sounds fun, Eisen-sensei. So, have you sent your apprentices a letter about this?”

“Nope, everybody’s in a tough position. I’ll just quietly visit and greet them so I won’t be a bother.”

Thus, Eisen the master of heroes, secretly set out on a journey to visit each of his apprentices and to sightsee different countries.

title: The Overpowered Mage Starts a New Life ~Breezing through a World 1000 Years into the Future as the Strongest Mage
genre: Action, Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Romance, School Life, Seinen
synopsis:
Having become overwhelming strong, a mage was bored with his life and decided to reincarnate in another era about 1000 years later.

But after reincarnation, the mage now known as Kurt saw a world where magic had declined, and the mages of the era are overall much weaker than those of 1000 years ago.

It also seems that Kurt is being look down upon for his Gold Magic as it is called defective magic power in this era.

In order to investigate the mysterious decline of magic in this era, Kurt enrolled into the Magic Academy at the Royal Capital and showed his extraordinary talent where he would become unparalleled in this second life of his too!?

title: 29-Years-Old Bachelor Was... Brought to a Different World to Live Freely
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Psychological, Romance, Seinen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
29-year old Taichi Mitsuba lives a lonely life as a salaryman with his only comfort being video games. He dreams of becoming the hero of an RPG-like fantasy world. Going to bed after another boring day, he gets his wish fulfilled and is summoned to the world of Eliard by a god.

Bestowed with powerful abilities, he decides to live a free life. But on the first day he gets entangled with a girl who wants to marry him and from that point he keeps picking up more girls and running into more troubles.

‘I will continue to live without losing to these difficulties.’

genre: Action, Mecha, Sci-fi, Seinen, Supernatural, Tragedy
synopsis:
The Republic of San Magnolia.

For a long time this country was attacked by it’s neighbor, the Empire, which created a series of unmanned military vehicles called the Legion. In response to the threat, the Republic successfully completes the development of similar technology and reflects the enemy’s attack, having managed to do without casualties. But this is… the official version. In fact, there were victims. Outside of the 85 districts of the Republic there was actually another one. “The non-existent 86th district.” It was there that battles continued day and night in which young men and women from the detachment known as Eighty-Six participated—they fought in drones…

Shinn is the leader of a squadron of eighty-sixers. Lena is a “handler” who commands the detachment from the remote rear with the help of special communication technology.

The farewell story of the severe and sad struggle of these two begins!

title: A Late-Start Tamers Laid-Back Life
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Sci-fi, Seinen, Shounen
synopsis:
he Law of Justice Online, also known as LJO, is the hottest new VRMMORPG of the season, and office worker Yuta Sasaki is one of the lucky few granted access to the official launch.

After some careful research, Yuta is chomping at the bit to start his virtual life as a Tamer, a class that harnesses the powers of wild monsters. Luckily, upon building his character, Yuta manages to land not only his chosen class, but a heap of bonuses to boot! He soon finds, however, that his abilities are not all they're cracked up to be, and that the talents of the rare first monster he is granted lie not in combat... but gardening!

Already well behind the other adventurers, and facing a long and slow progression path ahead of him, Yuta is left with two choices—start over from scratch, or make the best of what he has been given. For Yuta the choice is obvious: When life gives you manure... start up a farm!

title: A Story of a Cannon Fodder who Firmly Believed He was the Protagonist, Misunderstood the Actual Protagonist as the Cannon Fodder, and Ended up Victorious
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Shounen, Tragedy
synopsis:
God: “I’ll lie to this guy and tell him that I reincarnated him as the protagonist, when actually I just reincarnated him as cannon fodder (LOL).”

A high school boy who longed for the protagonists that appeared in fiction got hit by a truck and died. He was then called before God, who told him that he will be reincarnated inside a game based on a novel. Our boy was happy to be told that he was going to be reincarnated as Protagonist… However, he was actually reincarnated as mere cannon fodder inside utsuge!! (T/N: Utsuge translates as “melancholy/depressing game” and that’s basically it.)

And so, the guy was played by god’s scheme … Well, such a thing didn’t happen though. He firmly held onto his belief and the vision of his ideal which then changed the world.

title: A Tale of the Secret Saint
genre: Action, Adventure, Dragon, Fantasy, Magic
synopsis: Born into a long line of knights, Fia is determined to become a knight herself, just like all her siblings. But a brush with death awakens memories of her past life as a Saint--a woman who wields rare, powerful healing and protection magic--along with the ability to use that magic herself! The downside is that Fia also remembers her past life's untimely death, and the danger she will be in if anyone finds out what she really is. She vows to stay on her knighthood path and keep her powers a secret forever! But how can she resist using her newfound powers when they're just so useful?

title: The Villainess, Cecilia Silvy, Doesnt Want to Die, so She Decided to Crossdress
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Shoujo, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Dear father and mother.

Please forgive this daughter who is tainted.

I, Cecilia Silvy, will strive to continue to live peacefully…

I have decided to become a man!

High school student Hiyono Kanzaki reincarnated as Cecilia Silvy, the villainess lady of the otome game “Wruhel Academy Saint Princess 3”.

In order to avoid her miserable future, she decided to spend her time at Wruhel Academy, the main stage of the game… as a man.

Will she be able to complete her school life without anybody discovering the truth?!

title: I Dont Want to Become a Villainess, So I Aim at Becoming a Perfect Lady Together with the Prince!
genre: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Shoujo, Slice of Life
synopsis:
I’m a villainess… it seems!? No, no, I’m not such a bad woman-!!

Liz Beltran is an arrogant, selfish young woman, and a villainous one at that.

When Liz arrives for her formal marriage meeting with the first prince, Alan, she is shocked to hear his younger brother’s voice speaking to him.

What do you mean, “villainess”? I’m not such a lousy woman!

She is shocked and teary-eyed, but her marriage partner, Alan, tells her: “I’ll be your fiancé and help you out so you don’t end up becoming a villainess.”

She struggles to understand incomprehensible words such as “target” and “game world”, but, at the same time, she is thrilled by the too-sweet guidance of the beautiful Prince Alan as she strives to get back at the prince’s brother!

With the help of the prince who is “apparently” about to break off their engagement, Liz strives to become a perfect lady in this unique romantic comedy about a villainous lady!

title: Story of a Country Girl Reincarnated as a Villainess Trying To Avoid a Bad End ~I Tried To Become Stronger Than the Last Boss Because I Dont Want to Die~
genre: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, School Life, Shoujo
synopsis:
There was a girl who lived an ordinary life and met a sudden death. She cursed her life for being boring and dying without achieving anything.

She wished for a life with a purpose, like the characters she read about in books.

And so, she was reborn. In the same world as the story she loved, as a character with a proper role. But…

Why did I have to be the villainess with only a tragic end!

Her reincarnation was as the antagonist heroine of the protagonist. She would have her fiancé stolen by the protagonist, be bullied, join forces with the Demon King, and ultimately be betrayed and killed by him.

I absolutely hated that future!

In order to live and obtain happiness, I would show everyone that I could become stronger than anyone else.

Even the Demon King, bring it on!

title: My Reincarnation as the Villainess and My Reincarnation as the Villain Prince
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, School Life, Shoujo
synopsis:
I, who was Reincarnated as the Villain, and ‘Me,’ Will We Get Engaged to Avoid the Bad End!?

“I (Claris)” and “Me (Ediardo),” who were both reincarnated as the villainess and villain prince of the novel. In the original story, their fates were to become jealous of the protagonist and saint and eventually fall into darkness.

To avoid the impending doom and to stand against the final boss, they chose a different path from the original story. Unaware of each other’s reincarnations, they became engaged and gradually started to understand each other’s hearts.

I (Me) won’t let this person become the villain prince (villainess)!

The twisted wheel of fate for the two who fell in love begins to turn!

title: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
genre: Fantasy, Romance
synopsis:
Sometimes Fire and Ice are perfect for each other.

Brigitte Meidell belongs to a noble family, which means high expectations were placed upon her spirit contract. However, her bonded spirit turned out to be a weak no-name, and ever since, she has been a source of shame to her family. She thought her engagement to the prince would turn her life around, but when he publicly breaks off their relationship, she finds herself alone again. After her haughty, villainous behavior as the prince's brideto- be, no one shows her much sympathy—except for the duke's son Yuri, who attends the same magic academy. Yuri is feared for his incredible abilities and icy personality, but with him on her side, her fortunes might have changed...

title: When the Villain Joined the Knights to Avoid Doom Flags, but Somehow the Heroines Started Approaching Him
genre: Action, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
Yulis, the second son of a Count’s family, is a character who always gets condemned by the heroines in every scenario of the game Akashic Academy.

The protagonist, having reincarnated into this villainous role, makes a firm decision:

“If I don’t bother avoiding the doom flags and just join the Knights, where the heroines aren’t around, then I should be fine!”

The story’s setting is a prestigious academy attended by nobles. All of the scenarios that the heroines trigger only start after entering the academy.

So, if he avoids the academy and keeps his distance from the heroines, he should be able to avoid all the doom flags.

Being part of the Knights, who protect the country’s peace, should also keep his parents from complaining.

With this plan in mind, Yulis hones his skills, passes the exam, and finally manages to join the Knights.

However…

“…Hey, why are the heroines even following me to the Knights?”

“Heroines…? I don’t really get what you mean, but I’m your devoted personal maid, so I’ll stay by your side♪”

Even the princess, the daughter of a prestigious knight family, and the personal maid, who were supposed to dislike him, start approaching him willingly…

title: I Like Villains, so I Reincarnated as One
genre: Action, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Shounen
synopsis:
Reincarnated as the villainous noble who gets killed early in an SRPG world!?

"Yessssssss!!! I've been reincarnated as my favorite character!!"

I woke up in the body of Weiss Hamilton, a villainous noble from the game I played to death, Valhalla Tactics, right after he'd been stabbed by his enraged citizens and left severely wounded because of his scummy rule. However, the territory is in ruins, corruption runs rampant, and the people's patience has hit its limit. At this rate, a rebellion is bound to happen, and even if I somehow avoid that, I'm still fated to be destroyed by the protagonist.

"Don't worry, Weiss… I'll save you. I've always imagined how to save you, so leave it to me!!"

Believing I was reincarnated to save my favorite character from his tragic fate and bring him happiness, I used all my game knowledge to rescue him and his allies, putting my all into building the strongest nation. As a result, the story began to diverge from the game's original plot, and not only did I save Weiss, but also other characters doomed to die, such as the villainess and the false saint. For some reason, even the protagonist started to admire me.

title: Is It Too Much to Ask to Be Supported by a Spoiled Older Instructor?
genre: Action, Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Shounen
synopsis:
“I shall provide for you from now onward…”

I suddenly received a fervent love confession from my senior instructor!?

When a demon tried to attack the instructor, I covered for her and got injured. But, she felt responsible and now was trying to provide for me…!? This is the story of my pampered life with my beautiful instructor.

title: Anata wo Akiramekirenai Moto Iinazuke ja Dame desu ka?
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
Shiroki Tsubasa and Amami Nanato were your run-off-the-mill pair of childhood friends. But after their parents decided to declare them fiancées, they both grew more conscious of the other, and right as a sweet and heartwarming romcom would have awaited them—Nanato was forced to move away with his mother!

Five years later, however, the two of them are reunited during their first year of high school. Tsubasa aims to tell Nanato of the feelings she had kept all these years, but Nanato’s new gal friend and rival Chiba Reina won’t let her! Once the both of them realize they each hold feelings for Nanato, they decide on a bet: The one who makes Nanato confess to them wins! But what happens when both girls have practically zero experience to show and fail at every attempt of seducing Nanato?! And will the old-fashioned promise of being fiancées triumph over everything after all?!

title: Together with the Black Knight!
genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance, Shounen
synopsis:
“Please, help me travel through the labyrinth to save our kingdom!”

The elf girl he saved pledged as the adventurer Alba was about to turn on his heel. With the labyrinth having the rumour of granting whatever you may desire, it actually harbors the secret to ruin the kingdom. Having mistaken Alba for the legendary Dark Knight, the elf girl, the 7th princess of the kingdom, is now asking for his assistance.

“Declining the request of a girl is really lame, right.”

Having been given that world view by his grandfather, as well as the jet-black armor and blood-riddled greatsword, Alba agrees to help them in conquering this deep labyrinth. With the legend of the Dark Knight as its basis, another legend is about to begin!

title: Apocalypse Witch
genre: Action, Harem, School Life, Sci-fi, Tragedy
synopsis:
New magic and old magic. A school battle fantasy over the title of strongest begins here!

Crystal magic is the cutting edge of magical technology. Covering one’s entire body with crystal flower armor can produce a variety of supernatural phenomena. But due to a mistake, Utagai Karuta did not receive that special armor and instead receives power by summoning the obedient crystal girl Aine.

“Sacrifice-sama, how long are you going to tease me? I’m going to enter a rebellious phase at this rate.”

“That isn’t how rebellious phases are supposed to work.”

But at ocean-top Crystal Magic Academy Grimoire, where Karuta and everyone learn crystal magic, an upperclassman from the previous generation has been called in as a guest. That user of god-worshiping magic is known as the world’s strongest, and they step up onto the podium and speak to the entire student body. This begins a clash between the forces of new magic and old magic.

“Every last one of you is incompetent. Thus, Grimoire will be shut down.”

title: A Thirty-Something Becomes a VTuber
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis:
After quitting a toxic, overworking job on the brink of burnout, I, a thirty-something, somehow ended up becoming a VTuber named Kanzaka Rei under the virtual talent agency “UnderLive,” all thanks to my little sister’s persuasion.

“I don’t really get this VTuber thing, but I’ll give it my all!” I thought, brimming with enthusiasm. However, in the female-dominated world of UnderLive, just being a male VTuber gets me bashed by viewers.

To make matters worse, on just my second day, a fellow debutant causes a massive scandal, leading to their firing! Will this thirty-something VTuber, swarmed by haters, have any future at all!? …Well, it’s probably still better than working myself to death, right?

title: Are you Okay With Slightly Older Girlfriend
genre: Age Gap, Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis: First-year high school student Momota Kaoru just saved a beautiful high school girl, Orihara Hime, from a train molester. One thing leads to another, and they end up going on a date! They have a lot in common: they both love video games, they both jam to their favorite songs on mixtapes, they were even both born in the Year of the Snake. Except... Orihara’s first game console used cartridges... and her old mixtapes are all on MiniDisc... and, oh, her birthday is actually 12 years before Momota’s! When her secret comes out, she thinks it must all be over... but will Momota really let something like a little age gap get in the way of his love for Orihara? Find out if love really can transcend generations in this sugar-sweet romantic comedy!

title: Arifureta - From Commonplace to Worlds Strongest
genre: Action, Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Mature, Seinen, Supernatural
synopsis:
Seventeen-year-old Hajime Nagumo is your average, everyday otaku. However, his simple life of pulling all-nighters and sleeping in school is suddenly turned upside down when he, along with the rest of his class, is summoned to a fantasy world!

They’re treated like heroes and tasked with the duty of saving the human race from utter extinction.

But what should have been any otaku’s wet dream quickly turns into Hajime’s nightmare? While the rest of his class are blessed with godlike powers, Hajime’s job, Synergist, only has a single transmutation skill. Ridiculed and bullied by his classmates for being weak, he soon finds himself in despair.

Will he be able to survive in this dangerous world of monsters and demons with only a glorified blacksmith’s level of strength?

title: The Relationship of Play
genre: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life
synopsis: A romantic comedy where everyone hides secrets and plays at love—let the game begin! Kotarou Tokiwa, the stand-in manager of the board game café “Kurumaza,” is smitten with Mifuru Takanashi, a high school gyaru working part-time. “You’ve got to roll the dice to spark a romance!” he thinks—but with her boyfriend in the picture, confessing his feelings is a move he can’t make… yet!

title: Did You Know That a Playboy Can Change His Job to a Sage?
genre: Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
The Jester ―― More commonly known as the ‘Playboy’ Dylan, was fired from the party of the Heroes. The self-centred Heroes didn’t understand Dylan’s importance to the group.

They were just a group of one-man teams. Not interested in cooperation at all. Any failures are blamed on the jester. Dylan, who was disgusted with such companions and was sick of playing as their comedic foil, happily accepted being kicked out.

The Heroes didn’t know. After saving them many times over with his magic tricks, the level 99 jester can change his job title to that of a ‘Great Sage’.

“Life, how about a rewrite?”

He’s done being the clown. From here on out, he’s going to take the leading role.

title: For Some Reason, the Internet Cafe Where I Work Part-Time Has Become a Hangout Spot for the Beautiful Girls in My Class
genre: Adult, Harem, Mature, Romance, School Life, Smut
synopsis:
In a small private room, a relationship that’s a secret from everyone in class…?

When I helped the school’s most beautiful girl after she collapsed in front of the internet cafe where I work, she ended up becoming a regular!?

Furthermore, her friends, the second cutest sporty girl in class and a mature gal, started coming as well and I found myself growing intimate with the beautiful girls I’ve always admired in the private room of the net cafe…

title: Battle Divas
genre: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
Once upon a time, our world was blessed by the Valkyrie, a goddess of war whose fleeting beauty shone brilliantly on the battlefield. Her campaign against the wretched Demon King proved victorious, with the evil being sealed away by the beautiful warrior.

Many years later, the young King Alnoa has just returned home after staving off another invasion of his homeland. Before he can even change out of his battle attire, his sister Cecilia comes to him with startling news: Sharon and Lesfina, both princesses and Divas blessed with the power of the Valkyrie, seek his hand in marriage.

Alnoa isn’t fond of the idea, but his feelings mean little in the face of politics. He arranges to meet them one month apart and will choose one to be his bride, ushering in a new era for his kingdom.

Now it’s time for our young king to meet the first candidate. He awaits her at the castle gates… But wait! Both candidates showed up at the same time!?

title: Berserk of Gluttony
genre: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Harem, Mystery, Psychological, Romance, Seinen, Supernatural
synopsis:
Fate, a gatekeeper who had been working for the castle, leads a troublesome life.

Constant hunger attacks triggered by a power forced upon him at birth. A useless skill, it only serves to make him hungrier; however, unbeknownst to him, it has a concealed ability.
One day, having killed a thief sneaking into the castle, he finally noticed its true power.

A skill that feeds upon the very soul of the subjects he kills, depriving them of all their powers. Finally, his constant hunger had been satiated for the first time.

With just that, the man who had been treated like a pile of tr*sh slowly started raising his head. Having exceeded the concept of levels, he strikes fear with his terror-like strength, earning him the nickname…

title: Antiquarian Bookshop Biblias Case Files
genre: Drama, Mystery, Romance, Seinen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou is a mystery series in which Shinokawa Shioriko, a young owner of a bookstore in Kamakura, unravels the mysteries of the ancient books that are taken there.

The story begins with a young man named Daisuke, who practically grew up without reading books due to his phobia, who brings the complete (and autographed) collection of works by Natsume Soseki, (Japanese writer of the Meiji era) that he inherited from his grandmother, to the mysterious bookstore. Will the shy and introverted Shioriko solve the mystery of the books?

title: How to Keep a Distance from a Beautiful Girl
genre: Comedy, Romance, School Life, Shounen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
One day, the self-proclaimed “Selective Bocchi” Kusuba Ren, saves Tachibana Rika, a beautiful girl who is called “Takatsuki no Hana”, by chance.

Rika forced him to get paid back, but his relationship with Rika did not end there. Their favorite shop is the same, they have a mutual friend, and they live next to each other. No matter what they do. They are, apparently, always together.

“Why are you here…”

“That’s my line.”

However, as they continue their routine, they gradually open up their hearts to each other.

“Hey, let’s go home now.”

“I think Kusuba-san is a good person.”

“I want to be friends with Kusuba-san.”

A love story of two opposites who become friends and then…

title: A Wonderful World of Chastity Reversal Where One Can Live By Indulging in Beautiful Girls and Passionate Encounters
genre: Adult, Ecchi, Harem, Mature, Supernatural
synopsis:
Miyanaga Yuki, 19 years old, lives day to day while switching between being unemployed and working part-time jobs. Before he realizes it, he becomes a resident of a world with a male-to-female ratio of 1:1000.

Furthermore, the men in this world have very weak s*xual desires and it’s normal for them to release it once a month. If they can do it once a week, they’re considered very virile. As Yuki realizes that men in this world can easily sell their bodies, a beautiful woman who matches his preferences approaches him as they pass each other on the street.

“How about 500,000 yen for the night?”

This story is set in a world where pick-up lines that would never work in the original world have a 100% success rate — a tale of a world with incredibly convenient circumstances.

title: Black Bullet
genre: Action, Drama, Harem, Horror, Mature, Mystery, Romance, Sci-fi, Tragedy
synopsis:
A near future, where humans have been defeated by the viral parasites named Gastrea. They have been exiled into a small territory and live in despair, side by side with terror.

In this world trapped in darkness—

Rentaro, a boy living near Tokyo and member of the “Civil Security” – an organization specializing in fighting against the Gastrea – is used to accomplishing dangerous tasks. His partner is Enju, a precocious young girl. They fight thanks to their peculiar powers until one day, when they receive a special assignment from the government. This top secret mission is to prevent the destruction of Tokyo…

Set in a near future, this thrilling heroic-action story… starts now!

title: My Magical Career at Court Living the Dream After My Nightmare Boss Fired Me from the Mages Guild!
genre: Adventure, Fantasy, Josei, Romance
synopsis:
Magic is everything to Noelle. She loves it so much that she puts up with her horrible job at the Mages’ Guild to practice it. The hours are long, the pay is rock-bottom, and the boss is a nightmare! But as long as she has magic, she can withstand the hardships. At least, until the day she hears these dreaded words:“You’re fired.”

Noelle’s hometown in the outskirts of the kingdom doesn’t offer many alternatives for a career in magic—especially now that she’s been blacklisted from guild work! Just when it seems like all hope is lost, Noelle’s old friend Luke shows up to give her an opportunity she never could have imagined: a job as a royal court magician.

Now Noelle is living the dream, rubbing shoulders with the kingdom’s greatest magicians and showing off her skills. She has a beautiful new workplace and a generous new boss, but how will she cope with intense entrance exams, her marriage-obsessed mother, and the rules of etiquette? What awaits Noelle in her magical new career?

title: Black Summoner
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Isekai, Romance, Seinen
synopsis: Waking up in a strange new place with no memory of his past life, Kelvin learns that he's bartered away those very memories in exchange for powerful new abilities during his recent transmigration. Heading out into a whole new world as a Summoner — with his first Follower being the very goddess who brought him over! — Kelvin begins his new life as an adventurer, and it isn't long before he discovers his hidden disposition as a battle junkie. From the Black Knight of the Ancient Castle of Evil Spirits to the demon within the Hidden Cave of the Sage, he revels in the fight against one formidable foe after another. Join this OP adventurer in an exhilarating and epic saga as he and his allies carve their way into the annals of history!

title: The S*ave of the Black Knights Is Recruited by the White Adventures Guild As an S-ranked Adventurer
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Harem, Romance
synopsis:
I worked like a s*ave in the chivalric order, where all the outcomes were exploited my senior, but I was scouted by a pretty little girl who called herself a guildmaster.

Initially I accept it half-jokingly but after I was shown a great sum of advance payment, I decide to leave the chivalric order. When I went to the guild, even the title of S-rank was prepared.

—This is a success story of a man who has never had a good thing since he was born.

title: To Every You Ive Loved Before
genre: Romance, School Life, Sci-fi
synopsis:
A heart-tugging story of young love that transcends parallel worlds! To Every You I’ve Loved Before and To Me, The One Who Loved You (also from Seven Seas): two novels, one multiverse–and don’t miss the two anime films!

In a world where people regularly travel between slightly different parallel universes, Takasaki Koyomi lives with his mother after his parents’ recent divorce. Awkward and studious, he has trouble making friends at his new school until his classmate Takigawa Kazune seeks him out. She claims that she’s moved here from another world where she and Takasaki are in love… but could he be the one who’s actually from a parallel world instead?

title: Boku no Bungeibu ni B*tch ga Irunante Arienai
genre: Comedy, Ecchi, Harem, Romance, School Life
synopsis:
Real beautiful girls are mostly b*tches.

With that motto in mind, Ikuno Kousuke used his literature clubroom to enjoy his otaku life.

One day, he was told that [However, as it is, the literature club will be disbanded] by the student council president’s assistant, the bishoujo (actually a neat-type b*tch) Shinonome Ibuki.

In order to avoid that, he must help the student council as a consultant together with Ibuki.

Their first job is to help the girl who —with Shinonome Ibuki— splits the fame in school into two, the blonde, big-breasted bishoujo Aizawa Manaha.

Although there are rumors about her dating many boys, she actually doesn’t have any experience about love so she wants Kousuke to be her fake lover….!?

The love comedy bit*h x OTAKU begins.

title: My Sensei is my Cute Fiancee After School
genre: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Romance, School Life, Seinen, Slice of Life
synopsis:
Under a single roof, a Sensei and a student secretly agree to live together!?
